name: John King
subject: They don’t think a Black candidate can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
It’s clear some in the establishment still believe in the outdated, disproven, and outright racist idea that leaders who look like me don’t have a place in politics.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43027103/335382150/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b345e3f9-36a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ1ZTNmOS0zNmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31rZ9kqGH66gZe4pPLP3FObzfGN655QaSx5J2h-CnLA=)
---
| Peter, I want to take a moment to write to you about the recent offensive statements made by a Maryland Democratic Party official. In an article released by Axios, it was revealed that an email was sent among establishment insiders claiming that Black candidates cannot win in Maryland. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43027104/335382151/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b345e3f9-36a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ1ZTNmOS0zNmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31rZ9kqGH66gZe4pPLP3FObzfGN655QaSx5J2h-CnLA=) **As someone whose family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president in just three generations, I am incredibly disappointed by this backward thinking from within my own party. ** _More than disappointed, I’m tired. _ In 2022, there is no place for outdated, disproven, and outright racist ideas about the electability of leaders who look like me. Especially in a state where 44% of the voting population is people of color, this kind of backward thinking has no place in the future of the Democratic Party of Maryland – and it’s up to us to prove them wrong. _**[So I have to ask: will you take a moment to help our campaign show folks in the establishment that we won’t tolerate racist remarks and we have what it takes to win this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43027105/335382152/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b345e3f9-36a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ1ZTNmOS0zNmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31rZ9kqGH66gZe4pPLP3FObzfGN655QaSx5J2h-CnLA=)**_ Our campaign has received nearly 5,000 individual donations, putting us in the top tier of this election with over $2.5 million raised — including contributions from every county in the state and Baltimore City. But despite our successes, we are still being put down and underestimated because of the way I look. Race shouldn’t be seen as a limiting factor, but so many of us have been told to stay in our place time and time again just because of our skin color. And in 2022, it’s appalling that many people still believe that there are things we can’t do. It’s going to take everything we’ve got to overcome the misguided notion that Maryland can’t elect a Black governor. _**[Every single contribution you make — whether it’s $5 or $500 — makes a difference in our grassroots campaign to move our state forward, not backward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43027106/335382153/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b345e3f9-36a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ1ZTNmOS0zNmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31rZ9kqGH66gZe4pPLP3FObzfGN655QaSx5J2h-CnLA=)**_ | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43027107/335382155/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b345e3f9-36a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ1ZTNmOS0zNmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=31rZ9kqGH66gZe4pPLP3FObzfGN655QaSx5J2h-CnLA=)
---
Thank you,
John King

name: Team Lasry
subject: Back on the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Ron Johnson is going to do whatever it takes to win another term so we have to do everything we can. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43027403/335383448/1638233481?refcode=EM_FR_220316TVFR_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBhMTRmZi0zN2E1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N8CdEMAwv8Pn6QIim3Uqd_57woxP1CwtJMtNezPFEuY=)
---
Peter,

We’re going back on the air with another statewide TV buy to continue to reach out to voters across Wisconsin.

National Republicans and Donald Trump have made it very clear that they’re not backing down from winning this race, and Ron Johnson is raising millions and is going to do whatever it takes to win another term.

From elected officials to organized labor to everyday people, we are building the statewide grassroots campaign that’s necessary to beat Ron Johnson. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I Will Not Bend the Knee to Woke Corporations
body:
[****](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59849546:J6fI_NoNr:m:1:3317145305:6108AEB5058D12EE55E445A9A2437098:r)

Peter,
Being a leader requires standing up for what's right even when the powerful are arrayed against you.
I'm not going to kowtow to woke corporations, no matter how powerful they might think they are. I will ALWAYS fight back and do what's best for the people of Florida.
**[>>> RUSH IN $25 TO HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT <<< ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59849546:J6fI_NoNr:m:1:3317145305:6108AEB5058D12EE55E445A9A2437098:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/i-will-not-bend-the-knee-to-woke-corporations")**
This is not the time for elected officials who are spineless and willing to do anything to keep themselves from being attacked by the Left. We need leaders who have the courage to hold the line and who won't cave to virtue-signaling liberals on Twitter.
Floridians know I am going to bat for them every single day and no woke executive or corporate bully is going to change that.
**I won 't be forced into harming Floridians to appease woke corporations, but I need your help to continue my fight, DeSantis. [Can I count on you to rush in a contribution of $50, $25, or $15 to help me continue to fight against the woke corporate tycoons and their business partners in the media?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59849546:J6fI_NoNr:m:1:3317145305:6108AEB5058D12EE55E445A9A2437098:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/i-will-not-bend-the-knee-to-woke-corporations")**
Thank you for your continued support,
Ron DeSantis

[CHIP IN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59849546:J6fI_NoNr:m:1:3317145305:6108AEB5058D12EE55E445A9A2437098:r)

name: DASS
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team: thanks to generous supporters like you, we were able to hit last night’s critical mid-month goal!
We just wanted to say thank you – and to let you know how we will use this momentum to build a stronger democracy.
DASS is dedicated to protecting voting rights, expanding ballot access to all eligible Americans, and electing Democratic Secretaries of State who will stand up for our most fundamental rights.
But your input is crucial to informing how to direct these resources, and how we can make the most difference in your communities and nation-wide.
Team, can you take just a few minutes to fill out our voting rights priorities survey and help us plan for the lead-up to November? We need to hear from you! >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/surv-voter-suppression]
Take the survey! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/surv-voter-suppression]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]
This email was sent to: email. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on our Democratic agenda. body:
This is a huge step for our campaign. Read more >>>
| | | [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/282ea259aa5a0d4cc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, Today, I’m proud to announce that our campaign’s first TV ad is up and running! To take a look at this commercial, which will be hitting the airways TODAY, click the video below:
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/9a4b1502bafc2535c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Our first commercial does a great job of explaining who I am and why I’m running for Congress. With your immediate contribution, we will be able to get this ad in FRONT OF EVERY ELIGIBLE VOTER in Alabama’s 5th Congressional District. Will you chip in $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or more to help get this ad on the air and spread our America First message?

[**$10**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/b99dea5507b483a8c3d6b838967d376c/36963)

---
[**$50**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/03e52e6a7f453874c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
[**$100**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/11a346264d3aab01c3d6b838967d376c/36963)

[**ANY AMOUNT**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/4eba95c9dbd8a371c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
When President Trump appointed me as his Assistant Secretary of the Army, he said he placed **_“special trust and confidence”_** in my abilities. And I didn’t let him down. When Republicans failed to build Trump’s border wall, I changed the Army's hiring rules so **_450 miles of the wall could be built_** in record time. And during my service in the Trump Administration, I _**fought to keep Critical Race Theory** **out**_ of the Army and West Point. My rock-solid conservative record speaks for itself. Now I’m asking you to help me **[spread the word](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/5d3ecacb31732f7cc3d6b838967d376c/36963)** about my campaign by chipping in today. Thanks in advance for your vital support, Casey Wardynski PS - _I need your help to get it in front of every eligible voter in Alabama’s 5th District, will you[**contribute $20.22**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9ec7aedb7c7e09f1/21f7bd9840e8944dc3d6b838967d376c/36963)now to make sure this happens?_

name: Freedom First Project
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue-views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-KyN2UXUcT2pIwlmUQ)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics-too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention-and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDc1LWUzNDI3NjgyZmQxODQ2YWFhNjg4MTcxMjY0MWYxNDI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/ccUP2wJ--mWlc5ysSHaFkw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: One Year on the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
We need you now more than ever | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen.com/one-year-on-the-campaign-trail?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Today marks one year [since we launched this campaign](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2bbaff12f3&e=33b11688c1) to be Minnesota's next governor. I've been blessed and humbled by the support of so many - from our volunteers, to our donors, to our hardworking and talented team. Over the past year we have built a real groundswell movement, and it **hasn't slowed down** :
* **We[set a record](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2dcbd4b731&e=33b11688c1) for off-year small dollar fundraising** for a challenger candidate. Our average donation is just over $50, we've taken no money from big tech and big pharma, and we've not held any big, fancy lobbyist fundraisers to get there. Over 80% of our donations came from in the state of Minnesota. We have raised over $1.5 Million as of today. Nothing like this has ever been done!
* **We built a volunteer network of over 2,000 Minnesotans** who have pitched in, made calls, been social media warriors, and have helped our field development efforts! We are best positioned to win in November!
* **90,000 people have joined our digital communications list**! We are getting new people off the sidelines and involved all over Minnesota.
* **We have built a social media presence which reaches hundreds of thousands** of Minnesotans every day on [Facebook](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=fbcb760df1&e=33b11688c1), [Twitter,](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=40da180b7d&e=33b11688c1) [Instagram](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c6132fd463&e=33b11688c1), [T](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=603d531dc5&e=33b11688c1)[ikTok](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7a5e4fcb40&e=33b11688c1) (even though they banned us twice) [Gettr](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=781e995af0&e=33b11688c1), [YouTube](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=67d5768dbe&e=33b11688c1), [Rumble](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f5d63c5898&e=33b11688c1) and throughout the internet. We are pioneering a new type of campaign which meets people where they are! We even started a campaign [podcast](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f2f27a294a&e=33b11688c1), which consistently ranks in the top 100 of political podcasts _nationwide_ \- and we were the first campaign in history to use [NFTs as a fundraising mechanism](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=4a4ab22a26&e=33b11688c1).
* **We won the MNGOP[Caucus Night straw poll](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c760fefafc&e=33b11688c1) by an incredible margin!** The grassroots know we can win and we're working every day to unify Republicans in this state, instead of tearing each other down! We need every Republican and Independent ready to go in November to vote Tim Walz out!
* **We are neck and neck[with Tim Walz in polling](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=95b9c82f02&e=33b11688c1) **\- and we consistently have the highest favorability ratings of any other Republican candidate. We are performing well in the suburbs and throughout the state in key areas we have to win!
* **We added a strong[running mate in Matt Birk](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9d06934a46&e=33b11688c1)** \- who is a Super Bowl Champion, Minnesota Vikings legend, small business owner, and a staunch advocate for pro-life policies and education choice! He and his wife Adrianna have 8 kids and still found time to start a Catholic High School! Matt will be a phenomenal Lt. Governor, working side-by-side with me to make Minnesota the best state it can be. You can check out [his awesome website](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9c488283ef&e=33b11688c1) too!
* **Most of all, we are thankful.** Our entire team is thankful for you: for your engagement, your passion and your willingness to help us win. Tim Walz has never been more vulnerable than he is now; he can be beat if we are unified behind a movement that can win. You have helped create that movement!

---
|
---
| We will continue to lead on the issues. Our campaign is committed to protecting the unborn, defending our 2nd Amendment rights, creating new opportunities for small business, and making our state a state that WORKS for all Minnesotans. Tim Walz promised "One Minnesota" and divided us more than ever could have imagined. This campaign has proven over the last year that we can win and replace his failed policies.

I hope I've earned your trust and support! I know if we're together, we can win and make our state the best it can be.

Humbled and Thankful,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=91e9211d5c&e=33b11688c1)
---

clean_body: We need you now more than ever | | | | | | | Peter, Today marks one year to be Minnesota's next governor. I've been blessed and humbled by the support of so many - from our volunteers, to our donors, to our hardworking and talented team. Over the past year we have built a real groundswell movement, and it hasn't slowed down : We for off-year small dollar fundraising for a challenger candidate. Our average donation is just over $50, we've taken no money from big tech and big pharma, and we've not held any big, fancy lobbyist fundraisers to get there. Over 80% of our donations came from in the state of Minnesota. We have raised over $1.5 Million as of today. Nothing like this has ever been done! We built a volunteer network of over 2,000 Minnesotans who have pitched in, made calls, been social media warriors, and have helped our field development efforts! We are best positioned to win in November! 90,000 people have joined our digital communications list! We are getting new people off the sidelines and involved all over Minnesota. We have built a social media presence which reaches hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans every day on , , (even though they banned us twice) , , and throughout the internet. We are pioneering a new type of campaign which meets people where they are! We even started a campaign , which consistently ranks in the top 100 of political podcasts nationwide \- and we were the first campaign in history to use . We won the MNGOP by an incredible margin! The grassroots know we can win and we're working every day to unify Republicans in this state, instead of tearing each other down! We need every Republican and Independent ready to go in November to vote Tim Walz out! We are neck and neck \- and we consistently have the highest favorability ratings of any other Republican candidate. We are performing well in the suburbs and throughout the state in key areas we have to win! We added a strong \- who is a Super Bowl Champion, Minnesota Vikings legend, small business owner, and a staunch advocate for pro-life policies and education choice! He and his wife Adrianna have 8 kids and still found time to start a Catholic High School! Matt will be a phenomenal Lt. Governor, working side-by-side with me to make Minnesota the best state it can be. You can check out too! Most of all, we are thankful. Our entire team is thankful for you: for your engagement, your passion and your willingness to help us win. Tim Walz has never been more vulnerable than he is now; he can be beat if we are unified behind a movement that can win. You have helped create that movement! | | We will continue to lead on the issues. Our campaign is committed to protecting the unborn, defending our 2nd Amendment rights, creating new opportunities for small business, and making our state a state that WORKS for all Minnesotans. Tim Walz promised "One Minnesota" and divided us more than ever could have imagined. This campaign has proven over the last year that we can win and replace his failed policies. I hope I've earned your trust and support! I know if we're together, we can win and make our state the best it can be. Humbled and Thankful, Dr. Scott Jensen Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR. SCOTT JENSEN FOR GOVERNOR.

name: Val Demings
subject: I want you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I cannot win in Florida without you.
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $32 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029908/335396325/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2626-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQxYzFhNy0zZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GK5AIZlgvE8uKVVyKE0_xjkPHhz-sTzBoFUxOb_gpNQ=)
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029909/335396326/-144803992?refcode=jtk2626-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQxYzFhNy0zZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GK5AIZlgvE8uKVVyKE0_xjkPHhz-sTzBoFUxOb_gpNQ=&emci=0ca27afb-18a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7dd1c1a7-3ea5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0ca27afb-18a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/7dd1c1a7-3ea5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQxYzFhNy0zZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GK5AIZlgvE8uKVVyKE0_xjkPHhz-sTzBoFUxOb_gpNQ=&id=123159867). body:
the hardest two years of my career. Between the remote learning and keeping my kiddos engaged, every day was a challenge -- even my days off. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029972/335396810/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA2YjM1OC0zZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jplSNI251BylP1WucIqi2pWVAxkrU3XHDlAT0DwaFmk=)
I'll never forget the early days of the pandemic.

As a middle school teacher in Bakersfield, it was the hardest two years of my career. Between the remote learning and keeping my kiddos engaged, every day was a challenge --_even my days off._

**I'll also never forget when Kevin McCarthy posted a stupid cartoon on social media depicting teachers as “vacationing” while schools where closed due to the pandemic.**

It was disgusting, lacking in empathy, and it showed me that he really had no idea what was going on in our schools.

You may not know this, but Kevin McCarthy lives just a few streets from me -- his kids actually went to high school with mine.

Folks around the country buy into his big-shot persona. Folks here see a guy who punches down in order to lift himself up the political ladder. McCarthy has been in office for 15 years, and after 15 years nothing has changed for struggling families.

Teachers in our community deserve better, and so do working families, students, and their parents. That's why I'm running, and it's why I need your help:

**[Today marks our mid-month fundraising deadline, but we're coming up $8,210 short of our weekly goal to fully fund this campaign. That means we need to see A TON of supporters chip in for a grassroots donation. Can you kick in $3 today to help us DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029974/335396811/-217444029?refcode=em-3.15.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA2YjM1OC0zZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jplSNI251BylP1WucIqi2pWVAxkrU3XHDlAT0DwaFmk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029976/335396813/-217444029?refcode=em-3.15.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA2YjM1OC0zZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jplSNI251BylP1WucIqi2pWVAxkrU3XHDlAT0DwaFmk=)

Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

Hey, it’s Taylor. My job at the Clay Campaign is making sure we have enough money in the bank to reach as many North Carolina voters as possible. Let me break down the numbers for you:
Days Until the Election 62
Days Until our 60 Day Deadline 2
Amount Left to Raise $38,411
I told Clay this morning that if we don’t hit our goal he is going to be spending a lot more time fundraising and a lot less time talking to voters — that’s why we need your help.
Clay needs the resources to be out in the community talking with voters every day. Can I count on you to give $23 today, before our 60 day deadline hits in TWO days? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03162022_60DayFR_2&amount=23]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03162022_60DayFR_2&amount=23]
Many thanks,
Taylor Bollhagen
Campaign Manager
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 4th congressional district. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Thank you for telling Congress NOT to move

their reckless agenda.

is NOT over. In fact, it's just beginning. Congress is STILL
trying to pass these dangerous pro-China laws… We're
calling on our strongest advocates to send another letter ASAP!

That's why we set a goal of delivering 10,000
letters TODAY.

We need to act immediately to make sure our
voice is heard!

Send A Letter Now!
Tell Congress to Abandon Its Pro-China
Agenda!

To Any American Who Owns a Cell Phone** == If you own a cell phone, then mobile service providers hope you never get to see this video that could soon go viral. It was shot in downtown Denver by a multi-millionaire, who exposed sensitive truths about mobile phones and 5G. His experiment could strike a bad chord with mobile phone companies. But you’ve got to see what this man discovered and what it means for phone users in the weeks ahead. | | == | | Dr. Kelli Ward 1990 McCulloch Blvd D-228 Lake Havasu City, AZ 86403 (C)2018 - 2022 , All Rights Reserved PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD | | | =

DeSantis is well ahead of all Democrat challengers, including Turncoat Charlie Crist. While I'm extremely excited that DeSantis is ahead, the election is less than 9 months away and we can't take a victory lap yet. Governor DeSantis continues to showcase his leadership that should serve as an example to governors across America. During CPAC, he reminded us to don the "armor of God" and the "shield of faith" as we continue our battle to save America from Joe Biden and the woke, radical left. **[That's why I need you to dig deep and help us ensure DeSantis sails through November with your $25, $50, $100, or $250 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850795:6_aGqNo1N:m:1:3317145305:638DCA8AC8604993B4420F6DE924EA21:r "That’s why I need you to dig deep and help us ensure DeSantis sails through November with your $25, $50, $100, or $250 donation today.")** It is no surprise that Governor DeSantis is leading in his race, as Florida was a beacon of freedom during the COVID crisis with DeSantis as Governor. Imagine what Charlie Crist would do if he were in power during the next COVID outbreak? The past has taught us that nine months is a LONG time for voter sentiment to change. Even this current Ukraine/Russia crisis could affect how voters feel about Democrats in November. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850795:6_aGqNo1N:m:1:3317145305:638DCA8AC8604993B4420F6DE924EA21:r "Headline")**WE CAN 'T LET THAT HAPPEN!** Conservatives must remain vigilant and remind the voters of the damage Democrats will do if they win the Governor's office in November. Despite this poll's good news, we can't afford to become complacent. We must keep our momentum going to fight against the Left inevitably sweeping in with Soros' and Bloomberg's funding like they did last election and take the wind out of our sails. **The choice this coming November is clear: freedom or tyranny.** If we don't fight to keep Governor DeSantis in office, the left will feel emboldened to expand their tyranny and treat all of us, nationwide, as second-class citizens. **[Help us KEEP FLORIDA RED by re-electing Gov. Friends,

Heidi Ganahl here. I am beyond excited to be running for Governor of Colorado and give this **GREAT** state the leadership it deserves! There is a movement brewing across this state and all across this **GREAT** nation!

First, I want to be clear and outline my top priorities as your next Governor:

**[SAFETY:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs1mkvfbs04cgkef2at11uud3131710u8eqmprmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
_→ Return to law and order
→ Support law enforcement
→ Address addiction with compassion
→ Stop rampant homelessness _**

| [**CRACKDOWN ON CRIME**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zup4sqtdud6a2j92eb0arl0de5571emq3rpgtmoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
---

**[COLORADO FREEDOM:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp25dmbc709u24uvqqnu2505gsvijaiao9m33ne8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
_→ Lower taxes
→ End mandates
→ Remove unneeded regulations
→ Create policies that encourage job creation
→ Restore voter confidence_** __

[**TRUST THE PEOPLE, FOLLOW THE CONSTITUTION**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqkq5grk4nreb4tmc5s80ti3avhfcnoflm6sbq40_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
---

**[FAMILY:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6cqovve4vqko0molicavi4abqc6nnclvqcog01o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
_→ Make Colorado affordable again
→ Fund the student, not the system.
→ Focus on reading, writing, and math rather than critical race theory.
→ Address our state’s mental health crisis._**

[**FIX OUR KIDS’ FUTURE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp62h1ci03th7idhjujhnhgpteor5mefesn3istg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
---

**[RESPECT RURAL COLORADO:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znchrlqdd4u3rvkq49jrgtl78jg5rcp6ernfodf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)
_→ Ensure we have affordable energy that is clean and safe.
→ Protect farmers, ranchers, and property owners.
→ Fix the roads across our state.
→ Manage our forests to address fires.
→ Develop broadband in gap areas and create employment opportunities. _**

[**RESPECT RURAL COLORADO**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0261gfqqjpt4jjii8qpmveuprtok888p03929e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5gm6ob4cph2bs)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5c0ddbfa2d6b43058bedbb616e0b7656&_e=VvvNBLikMCeTl1dF63PRGw3nXWgig7Sob2HnnkSdqU4C7itP3aElneNpEdpPx11TMxM7IhuiaaqccLgBvBAJ-3Vo12eIA2pZiHViSKumRCxDRp86LdA2NEfUA2BDWcRyJXkWlRZfkDpW-kLRHu0Tp3ODn7BVpjo-0XajE6UXpeplXHYMKmQX8IeqFoBq4SVnG12Cg5KIWAQcDiBa8aJeQ5Bw-MdbhZsaCM6pA5zEYI2-3bUwYTLqjkYsetCmFGhR02klGyRB-LIuOWqUJ1uwl9qsJb1nSRqQJC2XSSOYrvuEdknuIfxxREfpu6bpRgwikuPa00GVSGOHcFq8dLirfy8jDWtTFUokrW-crq8XHLrLg6m-cKRWnG1IdscnXbkc83qNcZlvdBmbxooFu986B-3C3hWDFTvpFXOlqjPnsJ6FxJhZSvdebE9sP9V9KN160DRksLziNfGujIu5LLxz3L0sLWv_GsbNasPzFLWpYiofXmieCz160p3PG8wmPus6-W4XnyvmIC7I0Xz419aeI7FUqfK28nYfpSBiggizco4ksSPOnXQsxU2R43Jw9bQp)
---
Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5c0ddbfa2d6b43058bedbb616e0b7656&_e=VvvNBLikMCeTl1dF63PRGw3nXWgig7Sob2HnnkSdqU4C7itP3aElneNpEdpPx11TMxM7IhuiaaqccLgBvBAJ-3Vo12eIA2pZiHViSKumRCxDRp86LdA2NEfUA2BDWcRyJXkWlRZfkDpW-kLRHu0Tp3ODn7BVpjo-0XajE6UXpeplXHYMKmQX8IeqFoBq4SVnG12Cg5KIWAQcDiBa8aJeQ5Bw-MdbhZsaCM6pA5zEYI2-3bUwYTLqjkYsetCmFGhR02klGyRB-LIuOWqUJ1uwl9qsJb1nSRqQJC2XSSOYrvuEdknuIfxxREfpu6bpRgwikuPa00GVSGOHcFq8dLirfy8jDWtTFUokrW-crq8XHLrrbJOmUo-r6ugZaaq7fZ2D1Wkgxq9S7YF1U7BCDqyYLsGTav2qBk_k2-c0QvXXS1I3zjsNpQ6Cke-GPfzqAPyZGhJEHVb7CCrd6FgYwArpWWQZ7PIXPF7q7206hps0h1TVF0dcFVbzLh6di6XKUKivfnMRFZmwB7fR8DOqEtIYbp8UkDswYwjZXc60FH-hIP1_REmYeBXlKZ9VFjf7M1Vf)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5c0ddbfa2d6b43058bedbb616e0b7656&_e=VvvNBLikMCeTl1dF63PRGw3nXWgig7Sob2HnnkSdqU4C7itP3aElneNpEdpPx11TMxM7IhuiaaqccLgBvBAJ-3Vo12eIA2pZiHViSKumRCxDRp86LdA2NEfUA2BDWcRyJXkWlRZfkDpW-kLRHu0Tp3ODn7BVpjo-0XajE6UXpeplXHYMKmQX8IeqFoBq4SVnG12Cg5KIWAQcDiBa8aJeQ5Bw-MdbhZsaCM6pA5zEYI2-3bUwYTLqjkYsetCmFGhR02klGyRB-LIuOWqUJ1uwl9qsJb1nSRqQJC2XSSOYrvuEdknuIfxxREfpu6bpRgwikuPa00GVSGOHcFq8dLirfy8jDWtTFUokrW-crq8XHLqBABpm83RONtQ2EUINFiDmwAKCu9Z6OCDLBCa2pVnXrVAtGmYj6OSTaLtne_g-q9ZPyoVYDr19WXsKbuXXebrXdCzIbf9HGHOTAG0JU77nnGjJlsZ0f_X5zxHa11nmH0FF-N_yx0eTW_XCxbEWdmCWoEZMsEqFk5NT8Xv34N1nZ_HQVZ2YquydaVxwd54SOgdXWmXEn_elN9_89ccusou0)_**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington.

**[Will you stand with us and endorse our campaign today in this critical race?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5c0ddbfa2d6b43058bedbb616e0b7656&_e=VvvNBLikMCeTl1dF63PRGw3nXWgig7Sob2HnnkSdqU4C7itP3aElneNpEdpPx11TMxM7IhuiaaqccLgBvBAJ-3Vo12eIA2pZiHViSKumRCxDRp86LdA2NEfUA2BDWcRyJXkWlRZfkDpW-kLRHu0Tp3ODn7BVpjo-0XajE6UXpeplXHYMKmQX8IeqFoBq4SVnG12Cg5KIWAQcDiBa8aJeQ5Bw-MdbhZsaCM6pA5zEYI2-3bUwYTLqjkYsetCmFGhR02klGyRB-LIuOWqUJ1uwl9qsJb1nSRqQJC2XSSOYrvuEdknuIfxxREfpu6bpRgwikuPa00GVSGOHcFq8dLirfy8jDWtTFUokrW-crq8XHLrosT2XP4ihEIGvLS7xe14nF5SJdGfhBFKMs1iJF31rlhdbpq25PLH4tDhp1QMkmGzqpN0dGTADgSDqvX2IEGai3l5XVzycundXNYTEKxyquCI9L3EDnTKiMYvr3EYClPy2v-MYAVoipcHDC1QAJk5kwDCTlnplz4kGTIxzPjXmBsTMNtywj--SIkDhSYK43vAUls_qMvdYw19iiCiOdTIq)**

Sincerely,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5c0ddbfa2d6b43058bedbb616e0b7656&_e=VvvNBLikMCeTl1dF63PRGw3nXWgig7Sob2HnnkSdqU4C7itP3aElneNpEdpPx11TMxM7IhuiaaqccLgBvBAJ-3Vo12eIA2pZiHViSKumRCxDRp86LdA2NEfUA2BDWcRyJXkWlRZfkDpW-kLRHu0Tp3ODn7BVpjo-0XajE6UXpeplXHYMKmQX8IeqFoBq4SVnG12Cg5KIWAQcDiBa8aJeQ5Bw-MdbhZsaCM6pA5zEYI2-3bUwYTLqjkYsetCmFGhR02klGyRB-LIuOWqUJ1uwl9qsJb1nSRqQJC2XSSOYrvuEdknuIfxxREfpu6bpRgwikuPa00GVSGOHcFq8dLirfy8jDWtTFUokrW-crq8XHLrCU5Tc0OEinJLkU1FutTjKegqTqu0Sq5uJB7EgCcyAJCKgbFARWUiCQNpvjtfNhddTnSSJfqtGDvRUc8qu4htXMly840VIkIezY8Lvhkm0jcuNm_Y8N3VTGIEcEahmpU18Z3UMfsUm4Em4h0PHliINuaR6XavoDmQ53xMlCsxZRCTPMdgW8j-gxpkLpBrtun0J1E6pCPIdkEFeKzrfQAuT)

clean_body: It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | Fellow American, We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat. The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America. President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including: We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side. I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: TODAY: Testify for a $19 minimum wage!
body:
| | | Friend,
Today the House Labor Committee will hear Representative Brianna Henries' bill to raise the minimum wage to $19 an hour. For years the cost of basic needs like healthcare, childcare, and housing have skyrocketed while wages have stayed stagnant. Every Rhode Islander should be guaranteed a living wage which is why Matt and Cynthia have made raising the minimum wage to $19 an hour a core part of their platform. **[Today will be the first time EVER that a bill for a $19 minimum wage bill is heard in Rhode Island. We need to show that there are working people all across the state who support this legislation. Will you sign up to testify?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnlTxb0G3v2vA1rftI8KmncY4tKuc0tt2HzIG3Czb9I9WWISu_BWHjiUvlpumfotQt8zD9-pwezBf_962dwr1Q6wxmn61fw3mNnt4IyA-HJgSHuxN0acs5VkhQYsTxUE1VY3GNaATN53NwKIhxgOaDplcCUHx93sCSHCpA0DshkXqKaovlaZNKVEDfFGY9Hf3tSCtSz2ZDIU8gBLgpg_7UhjPwrgTPOqdWZGNUeFicDKeZ0DS1D5shRTUHVk5gqsUGPwSBuYV2tjsM8_6lUXXBWlpcaW29m8i9cz1cPNAi2tg/3ke/r2EC8lPySmq94IA1p3O7Ng/h0/qt3nJwFuuFx6md8Lcnr9hDWxZTGmdgFbzy8p38Jdbu8) ** [**Pledge to testify for a $19 minimum wage**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnlTxb0G3v2vA1rftI8KmncY4tKuc0tt2HzIG3Czb9I9c01PpDpb3B6K1X2FnPX3lCHpGrFlWOSefftXlU7KgbKAB3m_F5RUMFkTeDXT25XvS0QRjwWBNn31j7HLvoawS1z6r_M5lEhhkKU_mB09yTrm7KBWxbXXOYNbXgJG13l2b5HKqw8adegZOxIXTtUrpUYXpNjwi6fwXVf4d1EEMd905CfgEdaEFdXh5wT5MA1A6USM3Hkr-XIVhoOV4qtNsb3a86FcRBBXZMRp8AuQ6tt6I-rB7RyNvUt0RWIX3AtVQ/3ke/r2EC8lPySmq94IA1p3O7Ng/h1/qBOm3FhpDfhWaMVeYbZk-YUmkYFLtIE8eQqB75dV0Io) The hearing begins at 4pm at the State House. | | Peter, When it comes to Maryland’s next Governor, there’s really only one woman for the job – Democrat Laura Neuman. Plus, Maryland is one of the few states in the nation that has a real chance of electing a Democratic Governor this year. But to make that happen, we need your help. Laura has a crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up, and right now she’s falling about $7,345 behind. [**Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more today to get Laura back on track?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43035177/335409924/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220316_FR_OneWoman_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDViZjA1Ni00NmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H5YYQ1jAYJsbPjV3kq7gwrJWTBF55H3GcaXYANbAPY8=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43035180/335409927/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220316_FR_OneWoman_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDViZjA1Ni00NmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H5YYQ1jAYJsbPjV3kq7gwrJWTBF55H3GcaXYANbAPY8=)

Laura is the only candidate in the crowded Democratic primary who has seen the best and worst of what Maryland has to offer.
She left an abusive home when she was just a teenager, and despite structural failures in our state that left Laura with little support or resources, she finished her GED and eventually went on to excel in an MBA program.
Since then, Laura turned around multiple struggling businesses as an entrepreneur, and as an executive for one of Maryland’s largest counties, she fought to bring good-paying jobs back to our state.
Laura has firsthand experience of what it’s like to be overlooked and undervalued by the institutions in our state – and she’s running for Congress to provide opportunities for every Marylander regardless of how their story starts out.
[**If you’re on board with Laura’s vision for Maryland and agree that someone with her experience and expertise is the only woman for the job, will you chip in $25 or more today ahead of her end-of-month deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43035183/335409930/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220316_FR_OneWoman_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDViZjA1Ni00NmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H5YYQ1jAYJsbPjV3kq7gwrJWTBF55H3GcaXYANbAPY8=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, When it comes to Maryland’s next Governor, there’s really only one woman for the job – Democrat Laura Neuman. Plus, Maryland is one of the few states in the nation that has a real chance of electing a Democratic Governor this year. But to make that happen, we need your help. Laura has a crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up, and right now she’s falling about $7,345 behind. = | | | = Laura is the only candidate in the crowded Democratic primary who has seen the best and worst of what Maryland has to offer. She left an abusive home when she was just a teenager, and despite structural failures in our state that left Laura with little support or resources, she finished her GED and eventually went on to excel in an MBA program. Since then, Laura turned around multiple struggling businesses as an entrepreneur, and as an executive for one of Maryland’s largest counties, she fought to bring good-paying jobs back to our state. Laura has firsthand experience of what it’s like to be overlooked and undervalued by the institutions in our state – and she’s running for Congress to provide opportunities for every Marylander regardless of how their story starts out. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = – Neuman HQ | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Kevin Hern
subject: ** Big Announcement **
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/6e573a6f83dec1f8/da833860bad5c92bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Dear Peter, Our country is in crisis. The American people are crying out for leadership, but Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi have failed them at every turn. Americans are paying for radical Democrat policies - through record-high gas prices, crippling inflation, and potential tax hikes unlike anything we've ever seen. To make matters even worse, America has lost the respect of our allies and the fear of our adversaries. While President Trump fought to restore American excellence, Biden has turned us into a laughingstock. It has never been more important to have strong conservative leaders in our nation's capital, which is why **_I am going to focus on winning back the House and FIRING Nancy Pelosi! _**
---
[**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/6e573a6f83dec1f8/2aa816b5db522f56c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Only in America can a guy like me, who grew up on food stamps and without running water, have the opportunities to work hard, build a business, and live the American Dream. For all this country has given me, it is my sacred responsibility to give back and serve my community in Congress. I'm humbled by the support and encouragement I've received from so many Oklahomans. I look forward to continuing our work together. Thank you, Kevin Hern Member of Congress
---

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a critical public service, delivering everything from daily mail to lifesaving medical supplies. In recent months, millions of Americans have depended on the USPS to ship COVID-19 tests provided by the Biden administration to keep them and their families safe. But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – including of the Biden administration's free COVID tests, a key part of our country's pandemic response.**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy and save the Postal Service. **But we can't stop him without grassroots support, so we need to hear from 54 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please, friend, tell us now:**

body:
This is a HUGE moment for our campaign that this grassroots team – you! – helped make possible.
Did you read Abby's message about the big news, Peter? **Abby formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate. (Photo below!)**
---
This is a HUGE moment for our campaign that this grassroots team – _you!_ – helped make possible. Unfortunately, we fell short of the $10,000 we'd hope to raise within 24 hours of filing.
With the Senate GOP campaign arm sitting on more than $41 million in the bank to attack challengers like Abby, we really can't fall short of our own grassroots fundraising goals.
There's still time to get back on track though, and when I meet with Abby tomorrow morning, I really want to be able to say we came through on this goal. **[So please, can you donate $**5** before tonight's midnight deadline to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43037263/335416337/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk786-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiNWMzNy00YmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqHaRbYmhzgFS-tWxAtMyTBS6axLwLEvwbpXWNJOjj8=)**
Now that Abby's on the ballot, we're entering the most important phase of this campaign. Thanks for fighting hard with us each and every day.
Amanda (Abby's Campaign Manager)

From: **Abby Finkenauer**
Date: Thu, Mar 10, 2022
Subject: really exciting update from Iowa!
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter – I'm emailing to share an exciting update with you about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley: **moments ago, I formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate! **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43037265/335416339/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk786-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiNWMzNy00YmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqHaRbYmhzgFS-tWxAtMyTBS6axLwLEvwbpXWNJOjj8=)
**[**During this critical moment, we've set a 24-hour goal to raise $10,000. If you're with me to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority, please rush $5 right now to help us flip this seat blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43037266/335416342/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk786-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiNWMzNy00YmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqHaRbYmhzgFS-tWxAtMyTBS6axLwLEvwbpXWNJOjj8=)**
Now that we've officially made it onto the ballot – all thanks to grassroots supporters like you – I wanted to take a quick step back to talk about what's at stake here in Iowa and what's ahead for our campaign.
You see, Sen. Grassley has spent the last 47 years in Washington pushing his extremist agenda and failing families back here in Iowa. He's voted against affordable health care, against protections for unions, against our right to choose and against working-class families like mine. **We must defeat him to give Iowa the leader it deserves and expand our Senate majority so that we can truly deliver for American families.**
Thankfully, this year, we have an incredible opportunity to do just that. Iowans are fed up with Sen. Grassley's failed leadership and his far-right agenda. Voters here are turning against him like never before: **h****e's facing record-low approval ratings, and experts at The Hill are calling this a "tough race" for him**.

As I’ve traveled across the state, I’ve seen how vulnerable he is firsthand. The momentum is building, and we have a real chance at retiring Chuck Grassley this November.
Peter, we are building a movement, and I know that we can flip this seat blue and finally show Sen. Grassley the door with you on our team. But we have to keep the grassroots pressure up – **Republicans have $41.6 MILLION in the bank to take back the Senate and defeat challengers like me.** We've got to be ready to counter GOP spending and far-right attacks.
Now that we're officially on the ballot, we've entered a critical stage of this campaign. The work we do in the months ahead will determine who wins and who loses on Election Day.** I just checked the numbers for our 24-hour goal, and we're still short of where we need to be!! [I know you care about what this campaign is doing for Iowa, so please, before our 11:59 p.m. deadline, can you rush $5 to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and elect real leadership for Iowa?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43037267/335416345/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk786-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiNWMzNy00YmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqHaRbYmhzgFS-tWxAtMyTBS6axLwLEvwbpXWNJOjj8=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43037268/335416348/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk786-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdiNWMzNy00YmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqHaRbYmhzgFS-tWxAtMyTBS6axLwLEvwbpXWNJOjj8=)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A powerful event for conservative women
body:
Right this moment, the team at Turning Point USA is preparing to host our Young Women's Leadership Summit in Texas. THOUSANDS of our top female student activists will be invited to attend for three days of exciting conservative speakers, activist training, and networking. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9620%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kTkdibtWxkSrPCWtEFHrFg&sysid=1)

name: Jonathan Feldstein
subject: Help Us Feed Ukrainian Refugees
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Headline") Dear Peter: **The temperature is dropping below 32 degrees** as thousands of Ukrainian Jews escape the bombing of their homes. This is a humanitarian crisis against a people who have faced years of oppression and extinction under both Nazi and Communist regimes. I saw this firsthand when I was there helping Soviet Jews emigrate to Israel back in the 1980s. Now, refugees from Ukraine need your help. **[Help us feed, shelter, clothe, and resettle these Ukrainian Jews fleeing the war with your tax-deductible donation of $100, $50, or $25 today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Help us feed, shelter, clothe, and resettle these Ukrainian Jews fleeing the war with your tax-deductible donation of $100, $50, or $25 today.")** We are seeing hundreds of Jewish refugees arrive daily and many more are trying to get out of Ukraine, waiting at borders literally for miles. They were utterly unprepared to flee Ukraine as we all were shocked by Putin's sudden invasion. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Video")We even had children from a Jewish orphanage arrive the other day. My heart breaks as I see the hopelessness in their eyes. Parents are being separated at the border with men not allowed to leave because Ukraine needs all able-bodied fighters. Women are crossing the borders with their young kids, but no possessions other than the clothes they wear. As the conflict in Ukraine grows, so does the humanitarian crisis facing the Ukrainian Jews. **[We desperately need your help to ensure those on the front line can feed and clothe these refugees. Can I count on you to chip in $500, $250, or $100 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "We
desperately need your help to ensure those on the front line can feed and clothe these refugees. Can I count on you to chip in $500, $250, or $100
today?")** Genesis 123's mission is simple: we build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. That's why I'm asking you to step up and help the Ukrainian Jews fleeing their war-torn country. Ukraine has a bad history with its Jews, and often, when conflicts come--under the Czars, Soviets, Nazis, and now the Russians, Jews suffer uniquely because they are Jews. Can I count on you to make a sacrificial gift to help these suffering refugees? | | [Feed 100 Refugees for $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850832:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Feed 100 Refugees for $250")
---
| [Buy 20 Coats and Gloves for $500](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850833:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Buy 20 Coats and Gloves for $500")
---
| [Shelter 250 Refugees for $1,000](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850834:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Shelter 250
Refugees for $1,000")
---
Deuteronomy (Devarim) 10:18 commands us to defend the cause of the fatherless and the widow, and love the foreigner residing among us, giving them food and clothing.
We're witnessing a humanitarian crisis in Europe not seen since WWII. **[That's why it's vital you help us feed, clothe, and shelter these Ukrainian Jewish refugees with your tax-deductible donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "That’s why it’s vital you help us feed, clothe, and shelter these Ukrainian Jewish refugees with your tax-deductible donation
today.")**
May the Lord Bless You and Keep You,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Jonathan Feldstein")
Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59850831:6X1e5NosN:m:1:3317145305:32A4E7E66138B4C7668E84432DFD19E0:r "Genesis 123 Foundation")
---

name: Republicans for Energy Independence via Team
subject: AAA: Highest Prices At The Pump EVER RECORDED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When will it stop? When you sign on to reinstate the Keystone Pipeline.
Patriot, we asked Republicans to tell Joe Biden to reinstate the Keystone XL Pipeline, and the response was OVERWHELMING -- [**but we would really like to hear from you too!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851565:6vkrUNoNA:m:1:3299561967:CCD8D93D1480EB67387AA873D44C3EF6:r)
_**First,** Biden shut down the project and shackled American energy..._
_**Then,** he sent his cronies out to BEG Venezuela and Iran to sell us tons of oil..._
**_And NOW,__according to AAA: Americans are facing the highest gas prices EVER recorded!_**
**[REGISTER YOUR SUPPORT FOR THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851565:6vkrUNoNA:m:1:3299561967:CCD8D93D1480EB67387AA873D44C3EF6:r)**
President Trump made it his top priority to make us energy independent and he enabled American industry.
The result? Lower prices at the pump and energy freedom from our enemies.
[**But now we 're facing a major crisis across the nation as gas prices reach peaks never seen before.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851565:6vkrUNoNA:m:1:3299561967:CCD8D93D1480EB67387AA873D44C3EF6:r)
**[REGISTER YOUR SUPPORT FOR THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851565:6vkrUNoNA:m:1:3299561967:CCD8D93D1480EB67387AA873D44C3EF6:r)**
The prices at the pump have spiraled out of control. We must reinstate the Keystone XL pipeline right now. [**Patriot, that only happens if you go on the record with your support.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851565:6vkrUNoNA:m:1:3299561967:CCD8D93D1480EB67387AA873D44C3EF6:r)
Thank you,
**Republicans for Energy Independence**

Hey, team — it's Conor again. Like I mentioned earlier this week, fundraising has slowed down in March, so Gabe and I set a mid-month goal of raising $5,000 from emails like this one by yesterday at midnight. **Unfortunately, I just did the math, and we came up a little short.** But it’s okay! We still have time to make up the difference and get back on track for the month before the quarter ends. **[We were just $743 short of reaching our goal. Thanks for anything and everything you do to help fuel this campaign to the June primary!

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Geoff Diehl: Protecting Mass. Taxpayers from the Gas Tax Since 2014
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
You've probably seen a lot of recent headlines about Geoff calling for Massachusetts lawmakers to suspend the state gas tax amidst sky-high inflation rates.
---
|
---
| "I'm calling on members of the Massachusetts Legislature to support Massachusetts residents coping with price shocks at the gas pumps by using a supplemental spending bill as a vehicle to immediately suspend collection of our state gas tax. We should also suspend the motor vehicle excise tax."
\- Geoff Diehl, March 8, 2022
---
|
---
| But there's nothing new about Geoff wanting to protect Massachusetts residents from the gas tax. In fact, it's something Geoff's been doing for almost a decade.
Geoff led a ballot campaign back in 2014 that successfully struck down automatic increases in the state gas tax that were tied to the rate of inflation.
With inflation currently running at about 7.9%, can you possibly imagine what would have happened if Geoff hadn't stepped forward to protect taxpayers all those years ago?
Fortunately, Geoff was there back then to fight against unfair taxes. He's here now, campaigning hard against Beacon Hill's greed. And he'll continue to be there every single day to protect taxpayers once he's elected to serve as our next Governor.
There is no question that Geoff is committed to making Massachusetts a more affordable place to live.
The only question that remains is: can Geoff count on you to stand with him? Can he count on you to support his candidacy for Governor?
If you're able to, please consider making a donation in support of making Geoff our next Governor.
---
|
---
| | [Click Here to Make a Donation to Geoff's Campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TFPdXJN9afKWn4c0gTAXnCH-Gle646kb1M6G4Gp4TbXjiqhFDmeDzx_8Lw3NJNsqoNwO-k0ju2I1uoluFOBp8Mj0b4N_Pgsrj1VohsV7TYfUYWgePFSzqQOyPbTi4d-HRH9HLKMy2FsU42j8_rX7CvTrfkHamZdws7cI8MeGBuX98BZ_m6DrHQ==&c=26oV0BC3szouhIrsZXt3kbqveAUXEV916yFGY82U0iQXBXGNOS9bPQ==&ch=fOCEh2E3tHJogDlsvy2__6i9hEUdUre4MBAIpgd4fJgFuyAN3GdFeQ==)
---
|
---
| Thank you for your support!
---
| |
---
|
---
| Paid for privately by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606

name: Jonathan Feldstein
subject: Help Us Feed Ukrainian Refugees
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Headline") Dear Peter: **The temperature is dropping below 32 degrees** as thousands of Ukrainian Jews escape the bombing of their homes. This is a humanitarian crisis against a people who have faced years of oppression and extinction under both Nazi and Communist regimes. I saw this firsthand when I was there helping Soviet Jews emigrate to Israel back in the 1980s. Now, refugees from Ukraine need your help. **[Help us feed, shelter, clothe, and resettle these Ukrainian Jews fleeing the war with your tax-deductible donation of $100, $50, or $25 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Help
us feed, shelter, clothe, and resettle these Ukrainian Jews fleeing the war with your tax-deductible donation of $100, $50, or $25 today.")** We are seeing hundreds of Jewish refugees arrive daily and many more are trying to get out of Ukraine, waiting at borders literally for miles. They were utterly unprepared to flee Ukraine as we all were shocked by Putin's sudden invasion. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Video")We even had children from a Jewish orphanage arrive the other day. My heart breaks as I see the hopelessness in their eyes. Parents are being separated at the border with men not allowed to leave because Ukraine needs all able-bodied fighters. Women are crossing the borders with their young kids, but no possessions other than the clothes they wear. As the conflict in Ukraine grows, so does the humanitarian crisis facing the Ukrainian Jews. **[We desperately need your help to ensure those on the front line can feed and clothe these refugees. Can I count on you to chip in $500, $250, or $100 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "We
desperately need your help to ensure those on the front line can feed and clothe these refugees. Can I count on you to chip in $500, $250, or $100
today?")** Genesis 123's mission is simple: we build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. That's why I'm asking you to step up and help the Ukrainian Jews fleeing their war-torn country. Ukraine has a bad history with its Jews, and often, when conflicts come--under the Czars, Soviets, Nazis, and now the Russians, Jews suffer uniquely because they are Jews. Can I count on you to make a sacrificial gift to help these suffering refugees? | | [Feed 100 Refugees for $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851098:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Feed 100 Refugees for $250")
---
| [Buy 20 Coats and Gloves for $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851099:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Buy 20 Coats and Gloves for $500")
---
| [Shelter 250 Refugees for $1,000](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851100:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Shelter 250
Refugees for $1,000")
---
Deuteronomy (Devarim) 10:18 commands us to defend the cause of the fatherless and the widow, and love the foreigner residing among us, giving them food and clothing.
We're witnessing a humanitarian crisis in Europe not seen since WWII. **[That's why it's vital you help us feed, clothe, and shelter these Ukrainian Jewish refugees with your tax-deductible donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "That’s why it’s vital you help us feed, clothe, and shelter these Ukrainian Jewish refugees with your tax-deductible donation
today.")**
May the Lord Bless You and Keep You,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Jonathan Feldstein")
Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851097:6NegUNoNy:m:1:3253819041:5ED6344C4868C2FD9599A95F93D62905:r "Genesis 123 Foundation")

For over 25 years Harriet Hageman has been on the FRONT LINES fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming.
She has fought back against Federal agencies that try to usurp our rights with overbearing regulations. And as an attorney:

* She battled Bill Clinton’s attempt to block access to one-third of our National Forest Lands.
* She stopped the EPA’s efforts to take control of our irrigation infrastructure and operations.
* She blocked the USDA from forcing our livestock producers to use radio-frequency ear tags and register all of our ranches with the federal government.
* And more!

Instead of protecting the Wyoming energy industry from the radical, Green New Deal policies of Joe Biden and the Democrats in Congress, Liz Cheney spends her time teaming up with them.

clean_body: | | | | Wyoming First. | Peter, For over 25 years Harriet Hageman has been on the FRONT LINES fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming. She has fought back against Federal agencies that try to usurp our rights with overbearing regulations. And as an attorney: She battled Bill Clinton’s attempt to block access to one-third of our National Forest Lands. She stopped the EPA’s efforts to take control of our irrigation infrastructure and operations. She blocked the USDA from forcing our livestock producers to use radio-frequency ear tags and register all of our ranches with the federal government. And more! Instead of protecting the Wyoming energy industry from the radical, Green New Deal policies of Joe Biden and the Democrats in Congress, Liz Cheney spends her time teaming up with them. | It’s time to elect a TRUE leader, it’s time to support Harriet Hageman! Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

##
**Your Blue Wave Fund Update**
**Friend,**

I wanted to send you a personal update on the progress of our Blue Wave Fund. So far, we're 63% of the way to our goal and only 2 days left in the week to hit it!

I can't tell you how excited we are by these numbers. Can you help us keep the momentum going?

Hello,
Russia launched an unprovoked, full-scale attack against Ukraine. And there is nothing “smart, “savvy,” or “genius” about it – no matter what Donald Trump says. We must stand with the people of Ukraine.
For 4 years, my opponent Chuck Grassley applauded as Mr. Trump tore up our treaties and eroded America’s reputation abroad by alienating our allies and capitulating to Vladimir Putin. The result is what we see now.
More than ever, we need people in leadership right now who understand the costs of war. As a retired three-star admiral with over 36 years of service in the U.S. Navy, I would be the most senior military person ever elected to the Senate.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley because I defended democracy around the globe. You can be sure I’ll defend it every day in the United States Senate.**
All the polling shows we are in for a nail-biter of a race, and the stakes could not be higher. If we defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority.
The only way to fight back against the millions of dollars Trump and McConnell’s Super PACs are going to spend against me is with your help now. **We need to raise $20,000 before midnight tonight, but we’re still falling short. If I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now.**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43039493/335426162/-42398318?refcode=em20220316mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmEzOTNlNy01MmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p7vxcZU_d27-sksePXFk_4NctuDc0YzAooaG6-BLaDg=)

Each gift today will help send America-loving young women to this special Summit and give them the support they need to stand up to the toxic ideology of the radical Left. **[_Please take advantage of this special, limited-time matching opportunity and join me in making that push.
