name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Thanks again
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We thought it important to pause for a moment just to say thank you.
#

Friends —
We sent a number of fundraising emails leading up to yesterday’s mid-month fundraising deadline, so we thought it was important to pause for a moment just to say thank you.
Lots and lots of people chipped in, especially yesterday, and we made great progress toward our goals.
You probably know this, but these individual donations are how we fund this campaign, most of them coming in response to the emails we sent earlier this week.
And they’re important because the money we raise is the only way we’re able to respond to the attack ads running constantly against Mark.
So, thank you again. This is one of the most important races in all of 2022. Not just because of what it means for the country, but because we need more leaders like Mark in the Senate, not less.
Thanks,
Team Kelly
* * *

**One thing you can do today is add your name as a personal endorser of Mark Kelly’s campaign. We’re hoping for another 15,000 signatures before the end of the weekend. Thank you.**
**[ENDORSE MARK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-march/?source=em220316-1-7&refcode2=2364.6688874.l0MTZW&t=1&akid=2364%2E6688874%2El0MTZW)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2364%2E6688874%2El0MTZW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| Yesterday, David visited Sound Choices Pregnancy Clinic in Columbus and learned about their work to protect life.

**_"Pro-life clinics like Sound Choices are an outstanding resource in the community, and I’m proud to support their mission."_
– David Perdue**
David has always been a staunch defender of the unborn and believes in creating a culture that values life. He is proud to be [certified pro-life](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=33d865cd1a&e=89fb4d5220) by the Georgia Life Alliance.
As Governor, David will continue fighting for pro-life policies, just as he did in the U.S. Senate. It’s time to make Georgia the strongest pro-life state in the country and the safest state for the unborn.

– Team Perdue

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Putin 2.0
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: We just witnessed a major injustice wrought by a despot who has zero regard for human rights. No, not Putin... President Joe Biden. Just like in Canada, a Freedom Convoy of Truckers descended into Washington to protest the unjust vaccine mandates and mask laws. They planned to exercise their 1st Amendment rights and petition their government with a list of grievances. How does King Joe respond? He threw up a fence around the Capitol and deployed National Guard Troops to prevent these truckers from even coming INTO Washington D.C. **ARE YOU KIDDING ME?** Under King Joe you aren't allowed to even protest your leaders! **[I refuse to let Biden's tyranny go unanswered, which is why I need your help to make sure I stay in Congress and fight back. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me stop Biden the Tyrant.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851631:6dN20NoNO:m:1:3317145305:7C56C589C30A292B72C5A23988809799:r "I refuse to let Biden’s tyranny go unanswered, which is why
I need your help to make sure I stay in Congress and fight back. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me stop Biden the Tyrant.")** You know, Biden and Putin are two peas in a pod. Both are working overtime to end democracy in their country. **Have you seen Sleepy Joe lose it when someone dares question him?** **That 's why I say Biden is Putin 2.0.** He and the Left have been following Putin's lead and heading toward a China-style dictatorship. Just look at what they've already done under the auspices of COVID. Harmful mask mandates for school children, vaccine passports, and vaccine mandates on most businesses And he's not stopping there because Biden and the Democrats will use any excuse to trample on our rights from COVID to the unjust war in Ukraine. You can be assured Biden is studying Trudeau's unconscionable move in Canada to freeze the bank accounts of those who simply disagree with his policies. Just imagine if Biden does the same to these Truckers who came to Washington D.C. or those of us who question the legitimacy of the 2020 Election results. **[That's why I need you to chip in $50, $100 or $250 today and help make stay in Congress to fight back.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851631:6dN20NoNO:m:1:3317145305:7C56C589C30A292B72C5A23988809799:r "That’s why I need you to chip in $50, $100 or $250 today and
help make stay in Congress to fight back.")** Biden and the Leftists know I'm a threat to their plan to usurp our democracy. That's why they've enacted a plan to defeat me in November by gerrymandering my district and funding both my Democrat opponent, and a RINO to primary me. You've been here for me before, and you know I'm here fighting for you, but I truly need your support of any amount to keep up this fight. I can't count on the GOP Establishment to help me or else they risk upsetting Liz Cheney's supporters. **[If you value liberty and freedom, I need you to dig deep. I'm not facing one, but TWO of the biggest elections in my life. Can I count on you to donate $50, $250, $500, or any amount up to the Federal Maximum of $2,900?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851631:6dN20NoNO:m:1:3317145305:7C56C589C30A292B72C5A23988809799:r "If you value liberty and freedom, I need you to dig deep.
I’m not facing one, but TWO of the biggest elections in my life. Can I count on you to donate $50, $250, $500, or any amount up to the Federal
Maximum of $2,900?")** The more Biden fails, the more he will try to tamp down dissent through any means necessary. I won't let that happen, but I desperately need your help to make sure I'm still in Congress to stop Biden's tyranny. **[Please donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59851631:6dN20NoNO:m:1:3317145305:7C56C589C30A292B72C5A23988809799:r "Please
donate today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Today I want to share why I'm in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I took a call to protect and serve the most vulnerable members in my community
| | |
---
Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you and why I'm running and why this campaign means _so_ much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
**Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home.** He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life.

I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. **That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040598/335430351/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmRlMGMwMi01NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvHA78vo4CYjSF818CJz97VXapfQozRWCmmiRNqm-u8=)
Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police, and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat:
**"You have to run for Congress," he told me.**

Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed.
But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: One in seven kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity?

That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I can – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida can grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal.
**[I'll never tire of an opportunity to do good and to serve the most vulnerable members of my community, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help send me to the Senate and continue my work of building a better future for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040599/335430352/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmRlMGMwMi01NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvHA78vo4CYjSF818CJz97VXapfQozRWCmmiRNqm-u8=)**
Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive.
**For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable.**
[**That's the long and short of why I'm in this race, friend. If you're ready to help me build a better future, will you donate to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040600/335430353/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmRlMGMwMi01NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvHA78vo4CYjSF818CJz97VXapfQozRWCmmiRNqm-u8=)

Thanks for reading my story,

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040601/335430354/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmRlMGMwMi01NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvHA78vo4CYjSF818CJz97VXapfQozRWCmmiRNqm-u8=)
---

clean_body: I took a call to protect and serve the most vulnerable members in my community | | | Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you and why I'm running and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home. He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life. I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy. = Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police, and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat: "You have to run for Congress," he told me. Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed. But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: One in seven kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity? That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I can – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida can grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal. = Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive. For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable. = Thanks for reading my story, Val Demings | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Hey First Name, Ross here – Alek Skarlatos’ campaign manager. I’ve been with Alek’s campaign since he announced his first campaign for Congress in 2019. I haven’t written to you in a while and am doing so today out of necessity. We’re coming up EXTREMELY short of our March end-of-quarter goal and I realize that we’re all a bit more strapped for cash than we were in 2020, but things are only going to get worse if we don’t send DEMS packing in November. We’re FIVE SEATS away from taking the majority and our race is going to be one of races to put us over the finish line. HOWEVER: Just 797 conservatives have made a donation to our campaign this month, leaving us in a bit of a bind. We need to double that number by the end of the month. Starting today we need 50 donations every single day in order to reach our goal of finding 1,594 donors by March 31st. You probably won’t recall, but in 2020 we raised more than $2.5 million for Alek’s campaign, making the contest against Peter DeFazio the most expensive in state history. We had a hell of a time, but as you know in the end, we came up short of victory. We didn’t lose due to a lack of money – we actually outspend our opponent. But the fact is, our erstwhile foe had spent more than 36 years building a reputation in our district that proved a little too hard to beat. BUT NOW , Peter DeFazio is retiring and it’s a whole new ball game. We’ve got a new far-left opponent who we still have the opportunity to tell people about before she can do it herself. BUT – we’re behind and we’re asking for your generosity to help us get to where we need to be. Sincerely, Alek Skarlatos | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

| | Friend,

In just a few hours, I'll file my paperwork to become an official candidate for Congress but this exciting news can't wait.

Thanks to President Trump's endorsement of our campaign, his rally in the Pee Dee, and your support, we are SURGING in the polls.

Late last night, my campaign team sent me a confidential memo outlining the state of the race. They urged me to keep it private but you're one of my biggest supporters and I had to share the details with you.

On the initial ballot test, we're up 21 points over Trump-impeacher Tom Rice!

When uninformed voters learn about Trump's total and complete endorsement of my candidacy, that lead swells to 30 points and well above 50%!
[>>>View the polling memo here <<<](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=10818357dd&e=7aa6ac5965)

Russell Fry

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Because change can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Wow, I’m so glad to share that because our team stepped up, we met the goal for our mid-month fundraising drive. Thank you to everyone who chipped in -- your support is already making a huge difference!
Our movement has come so far in just a few months because change can’t wait. Folks here in Maryland’s Fourth Congressional District -- and across our state and country -- are struggling. We need leaders that listen and deliver results, not rhetoric, to the families they represent.
Now that our primary election has been moved to July 19, we must continue to do all we can to win this critical open seat for progress.
Together, we have the opportunity to transform our country and move towards a more just and equitable society.
We’ve got to keep putting in the work to elect fresh, effective, progressive leaders wherever we can.
So honored to have you on this team,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis

P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Moira Marek
subject: meet the moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress

Our team set out a challenging goal, and together, you’ve exceeded all expectations.

| Peter,

#TeamFoushee is an absolute force. Our team set out a challenging goal, and together, you’ve exceeded all expectations.

**First:** We see our most ambitious fundraising goal to date, $13,000 in under 72 hours.

**Then:** We got 75% of the way there late yesterday, with a surge of grassroots contributions.

**Now:** It’s time to close it out.

[_**If everyone reading this email pitched in $8 we’d meet our goal before lunch. name: Team Benson Action Center
subject: How confident are you that democracy will survive?
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

There’s no question about it. Around the world democracy is under its greatest threat in decades, including right here in our own country.
Election conspiracies are running rampant. State legislatures are passing draconian bills all designed to restrict access to the ballot box. And in 2022, election extremists are going to try to take control of our election process and end democracy as we know it once and for all.

Friend, as a member of Team Benson you know that under Jocelyn’s leadership our elections have remained safe and secure. And you know, more than anyone, that Jocelyn is the best line of defense against any assaults on our democracy.

The question is: do you have confidence that our democracy will continue to remain strong?

Jocelyn wants to know what her supporters think about the state of democracy in America. Take our survey now and tell Jocelyn exactly what you think.

Fill out the survey>> https://secure.ngpvan.com/_x1ONrD3FE2MX7ACgXIOwg2

Thanks for making your voice heard, friend.
-Team Benson Action Center

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: A headline the GOP would love
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Peter brings home real results, but we have to win this race together.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
Hello,
We’re more than halfway through the month, but we aren’t halfway towards hitting our fundraising goal for March. And our biggest FEC deadline yet will be here before we know it. [**Can you chip in $15 right away and help get things back on pace? Together, one fundraising deadline at a time, we’ll elect Peter as Vermont’s next Senator.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=3&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=14&amount=3&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=16&amount=15&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=18&amount=28&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=20&amount=50&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=10&amount=100&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=12&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---

---
With the Senate hanging in the balance, this race is shaping up to be one of the most consequential in the country. And we already know that national Republicans are willing to do whatever it takes to win this seat and retake the Senate majority.
If we fall behind at this mid-month marker, we might not hit our first public quarterly fundraising goal of this election year—the first since a Trump appointee launched a campaign for this seat. That’s a headline the Senate Republicans would love to see, and it could lead to them dumping millions of dollars into Vermont to flip the seat red.
Throughout Peter’s years in public service, he’s brought home real results, but he hasn’t done it alone—we’ve rallied by his side.
We’re looking to grow this coalition—this movement—into an unstoppable force by election season. But that doesn’t happen by chance, and it doesn’t happen overnight. It happens because people like you decide to make it happen.
[**If you’re able to chip in right now, a $15 contribution will go a long way to help hit our mid-month target and reach our goal by March 31. Pitch in today and help lead this campaign to victory.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1531?t=7&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
Thank you!
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22mar?refcode=em_20220316_f_t_mm2&refcode2=135_61531_rY_tex&akid=135%2E61531%2ErY_tex)
---

---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Missaukee County Prosecutor Endorses Brown for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Michael Brown, Republican candidate for Governor, announced today that he has been endorsed by David Den Houten, the Missaukee County Prosecutor. | | | |
---
| | | Peter – I'm pleased to announce that I've been endorsed by David Den Houten, the Missaukee County Prosecutor.

David stated, “I am endorsing Michael Brown for Governor as he understands that criminal justice reforms must be made with an eye toward victim rights and community safety.”
---
|
---
| “With crime rising nationally and in Michigan, his many years in law enforcement and the knowledge and compassion that his experience brings, are exactly what Michigan needs for Governor,” he added. “I wholeheartedly endorse Michael Brown."

I’m thankful for David’s support. He has been on the front lines of our criminal justice system and understands the importance of standing up for the rights of victims of crime.

David’s support adds to the growing list of endorsements of my campaign. I've also been endorsed by Representative Beth Griffin, Hillsdale County Sheriff Scott Hodshire, St. Joe County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite, Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli, Chairman of the Berrien County Board of Commissioners Mac Elliott, former Berrien County Treasurer Bret Witkowski, rock star Ted Nugent, and many business and community leaders.

I'd be honored to have your support as well. Please head over to my website and add your name.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [ENDORSE MICHAEL BROWN](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=2e002cadd2&e=0636b97700 "ENDORSE MICHAEL BROWN")

name: Team Franchot
subject: 100,000 Jobs for Marylanders
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Hi Peter,
As Maryland’s chief fiscal officer, Peter Franchot understands just how hard our working families and small businesses have been hit during this ongoing pandemic. That’s why if he’s blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, he will implement a bold plan to create 100,000 new family-supporting jobs in industries of the future.
Infrastructure will be a major part of Peter’s vision. Investing in core assets like municipal broadband, world-class public transportation, and renewable energy infrastructure will improve our state’s competitiveness while also protecting and restoring the environment. These projects will create good-paying jobs that offer healthcare, retirement benefits, and pathways to home ownership for our working families.
To ensure that our workers are properly supported, Peter will also partner with unions to create a statewide jobs training program that helps place workers in these emerging opportunities.
Additionally, Peter will also help strengthen unions by making sure Maryland’s public works are paired with robust Project Labor Agreements and Community Benefits Agreements. Marylanders deserve a leader who isn’t afraid to fight for economic justice. As Governor, Peter will have labor’s back, so that we can strengthen the middle class and lift our families into the high quality of life that they deserve.
If you agree that we need a Governor who will create new jobs and shore up our economy for the 21st century, then will you show your support by signing on to Peter’s plan as a Citizen Co-Sponsor? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/h51J8i_9GkCA0r0PkQLslQ2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

| **Did you hear? We are going to be live streaming all day this _Saturday for Convention Super Saturday!_**

Team Benson will start live streaming on Facebook at 9:00 AM as we travel the state! I'll be taking your questions, talking with voters, and sharing my favorite campaign and capitol memories.

**[Right now, you can RSVP for the live event on Facebook to be sent a reminder and submit questions in advance, if you choose.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=07a53b45fd&e=9d6926af69)**

Start watching first thing in the morning or join us throughout the day.

I look forward to connecting with you!

Sincerely,

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Your Crypto Book Is Awaiting Shipment
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---

name: Rick Scott
subject: America will be dependent on NO other country
body:
Peter,
America should not rely on our enemies to stay afloat.

_And we certainly shouldn’t have to rely on them for energy._

**It’s time for America to be energy-independent and build supply chains that NEVER rely on our adversaries.**

_**I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and putting AMERICA FIRST with energy independence is a critical part of our plan.**_

But first, I need your input.

subject: ICYMI: Colonel Swan in the News
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Team Swan,**

As I’m sure you’ve noticed, our campaign is picking up steam and becoming **the** campaign to beat. Why? Because we’re focused on the issues that everyone is thinking about but are just too scared to talk about. Cancel culture and leftist's “woke” culture keeps people silent on the issues that really matter. The thing is, I served in the Marine Corps for 30 years – I’m not scared of the Left.

On a recent episode of his show, Bill Maher made light of American military strength and readiness. To liberals and coastal elites, this is all one big joke. They haven’t served a day in their lives, and despite the tragedies we see unfolding overseas, they make the strength of our military the punchline of their jokes.

I’ve seen enough, so on Monday I released my first campaign ad that finally says what we’ve all been thinking: what’s happening in our military ranks is **insane.** You can view the video below. I know I’m not alone in this. Fox News picked up our ad in an exclusive piece. Give it a read [here](https://colonelswanforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0368302df230e4a82cd29bd86&id=17aa41668d&e=85e5151e18).

If we’re learning anything from the horrific scenes coming out of Ukraine, it’s that we should never take our freedom for granted. Freedom and peace do not come without strength. Strength will not come while we’re focused on social experimentation in our military ranks, so it’s time to stamp it out while we still can.

Semper Fidelis,
Colonel Swan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you support a Windfall Profits Tax on Big Oil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
A plan to take on Big Oil’s price gouging. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43042476/335439235/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3U_OIL_E_20220316_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU3MmE1Mi01ZGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kt6yxr9-NvWJV-9mHh5WzbkfWTwlf-6ME0GHeNTMHeE=&emci=14572a52-5da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=15572a52-5da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
Let’s talk about why gas prices have gone up so high. Putin’s horrific war on Ukraine has increased the price of oil around the world. But that’s not the whole story. When hugely profitable oil companies see their costs go up, they don’t just raise their prices by that same amount — they raise them by a lot. Why? To take advantage of an international crisis to pad their already-massive profits — no matter how much harder they make it for their customers to make ends meet. **I’ve teamed up with Senator Sheldon Whitehouse and a bunch more colleagues on a plan to fight back and deliver relief for Americans: a Windfall Profits Tax.** It would apply to the biggest oil companies, like ExxonMobil. If they’re out there price gouging, they’re going to have to give up a big chunk of their ill-gotten gains — with a 50% tax on the difference between the average price of a barrel from 2015 to 2019 and the price today. **And we’d use that revenue to send four rebate checks a year to Americans struggling with high gas prices.** [_**We've got to raise our voices to beat the fossil fuel lobby in Washington and get this done. Will you add your name to say you support our plan for a Windfall Profits Tax on Big Oil?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43042477/335439236/-1826173260?refcode=EMZ3U_OIL_E_20220316_V1S1&ms=EMZ3U_OIL_E_20220316_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU3MmE1Mi01ZGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kt6yxr9-NvWJV-9mHh5WzbkfWTwlf-6ME0GHeNTMHeE=&emci=14572a52-5da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=15572a52-5da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908) At the same time we’re working to address high gas prices, we’ve got to double-down, triple-down, and quadruple-down on transitioning to clean energy. Russia’s whole economy relies on exporting oil and gas. So here’s the way I see it: the more we rely on fossil fuels as a nation, the more power we put in the hands of Putin. For the survival of our planet — and for freedom, democracy, and security around the globe — we must move as fast as we possibly can away from fossil fuels and onto green energy sources like wind, solar, and hydropower. That includes getting a whole lot more electric vehicles on the road and fueling our public transit with renewable energy. I’m in that fight all the way. And even though Big Oil is getting a lot of headlines right now, I’m not letting other giant corporations off the hook for their role in squeezing working families. We see a lot of the same story in other parts of our economy, like food. When corporations see supply costs go up, they pass those costs onto consumers, but they sure don’t stop there — they seize the opportunity to swell their profits even more by jacking up prices even higher. And it helps drive up the inflation we’re already seeing from the pandemic and supply chain problems. **I’m going to keep fighting to bring costs down for families. But Washington needs to hear that the American people are demanding action. This is how we put our government on the side of families — not fossil fuel giants.** [_**Add your name today to say you support a Windfall Profits Tax on Big Oil and rebate checks for people struggling with gas prices. Let’s fight side by side to get this bill over the finish line.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43042478/335439237/-1826173260?refcode=EMZ3U_OIL_E_20220316_V1S1&ms=EMZ3U_OIL_E_20220316_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU3MmE1Mi01ZGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kt6yxr9-NvWJV-9mHh5WzbkfWTwlf-6ME0GHeNTMHeE=&emci=14572a52-5da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=15572a52-5da5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4055db6546&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The CCP is threatening us and Joe Biden is doing nothing to keep our country safe. The reason for this is obvious.

**[_It’s because Biden is sympathetic to the country that his son, Hunter, has very deep ties with_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6c99796f8c&e=645b3b1338)!**

As Russia continues to invade Ukraine, China is aiming to take over Taiwan. The Chinese sent an intimidating message to the U.S. and NATO, threatening us with war as they become more and more powerful!

Biden and the Democrats are silent as China threatens us because they are **WEAK**! Our country is laughed at by the world because of our president!

_Under Biden’s failed leadership and the Democrat-controlled Congress, our economy has crumbled, gas prices have exploded and our borders have remained unsecured_.

[**_This never would have happened under Trump_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=823369f716&e=645b3b1338).

To protect this country, we **need** to regain a majority in Congress and I need to be reelected.

The Left is doing all they can to get rid of me because I refuse to bow down to China and any other country that threatens my nation. I will always put America **FIRST**!

The Democrats are working with the mainstream media **_nonstop_** to attack and lie about me.

I need your help to fend off their dirty campaign tactics and continue advocating for true Conservatism in Congress!

Chip in $10, $20, $50, or $100 to my reelection campaign so your voice can be heard by the radical Left. [**We can stop the Democrats from destroying this country but only if we rally together in support of strong Republicans like myself**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=56d39d401c&e=645b3b1338).

Donate [**TODAY**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e3adaa8619&e=645b3b1338) to join me in strengthening America!

Thank you in advance for your generosity.

_**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=00f1f9dcd0&e=645b3b1338)**_

body:
Abbott will flood Texas with attack ads, but we’re building the biggest organizing program this state has ever seen.
#
Here’s what we’re seeing in Texas.
Beto is igniting massive grassroots energy in every part of the state. He recently won the primary race with more than 90% of the vote. And on top of that, over 53,000 volunteers have already signed up to join our fight.
But Greg Abbott plans to spend more than **$100,000,000** trying to drown us out.
**[Abbott will flood Texas with attack ads, but we’re building the biggest organizing program this state has ever seen — and we can out-organize his $100,000,000 if we raise enough resources. That’s why we’re counting on you to donate $3 or any amount you can spare today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54011?refcode=ema20220316-180590&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=180590%2E444211%2EhVK4RP)**

And on top of that, over 53,000 volunteers have already signed up to join our fight. But Greg Abbott plans to spend more than $100,000,000 trying to drown us out. This is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history. After all, Greg Abbott has price gouging corporate executives writing him massive six-figure checks, and that doesn’t even take into account the right-wing super PACs that will swoop into this election to spend tens of millions in the months ahead. Beto isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs. He’s running to serve the people of Texas, and in turn, we’re counting on grassroots donors to power everything we do in every part of Texas. Thanks for being part of this, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

body:

Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e826fa6489304ffd9f939f956e5543af&_e=nJV5lvMpsgnBSjYp5OnML7hFE-K2BYg1wN8_2ykHPy1OdylVOeonVVNN1XSrFm73kO9r8-Ls_d8jX3_6x-dhhVyfcebjdBHjY59xt6Y6MHuKNpeA09Qj9iCoyn6kmJHdoKN6ji53vfiM84BCewZsyRE8lZajMrT2aujblCcD4yi6N70QtyoBtotH3fCf-2EGh7Dfk3RuEICcxQJKf-OXudbdaBx20Oo0BHbxUFqGPuvJoafVwQ9hUx66T7WctQsHGLgKBJDYJw_T1scRK09G3Ep2UwiWhizIHkv2OXH1iF8AXzUNJAX8Pv2zVR8BdgSl8GlxCAisTKjGgBsfC3iaFPtNRDOGBNkGI0I-JZYaZFCfcLhdygpRwS-x6MKaArXGZ2VMzXg6LUvsy0zaF6JX8QgY97folJDnHKh5A1vb08zLUbOGvLXYo16NpxSlTjNs3C0AoDXZRk6jCRu8d5nx_Uz6D1x60MP9Oie6r6rZgiHaaIgXuOgEySuxirdhyIs3Ase1gPrmBsmOQfH2CHxq2d1mDWEgFxr4e7Fwl_8QgqGN6FkmaqDKyvDMr56x0_hH)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e826fa6489304ffd9f939f956e5543af&_e=nJV5lvMpsgnBSjYp5OnML7hFE-K2BYg1wN8_2ykHPy1OdylVOeonVVNN1XSrFm73kO9r8-Ls_d8jX3_6x-dhhVyfcebjdBHjY59xt6Y6MHuKNpeA09Qj9iCoyn6kmJHdoKN6ji53vfiM84BCewZsyRE8lZajMrT2aujblCcD4yi6N70QtyoBtotH3fCf-2EGh7Dfk3RuEICcxQJKf-OXudbdaBx20Oo0BHbxUFqGPuvJoafVwQ9hUx66T7WctQsHGLgKBJDYJw_T1scRK09G3Ep2UwiWhizIHkv2OXH1iF8AXzUNJAX8Pv2zVR8BdgSl8GlxCAisTKjGgBsfC3iaFPtNRDOGBNkGI0I-JZYaZFADkooZPuCMk-u_YeGKOCxCeIITnVE5ByedR8oDHexMwdgeVnLhMWDebMGFtst4dMJbVMxK8A-JuJzifq5JwEAORzo4wG76o9oq2-i6CID-VeREapTKD1_HN1QFPo336QTKcL5RMFx-JjDqEFpCzNd9D6xJjx90tgJvBMRz-Ksw_EvThOIT5NzL4YaFyqSPXJJWuE1kQnTw1AL_4m3vuvNY)_**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington.

**[Will you stand with us and endorse our campaign today in this critical race?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e826fa6489304ffd9f939f956e5543af&_e=nJV5lvMpsgnBSjYp5OnML7hFE-K2BYg1wN8_2ykHPy1OdylVOeonVVNN1XSrFm73kO9r8-Ls_d8jX3_6x-dhhVyfcebjdBHjY59xt6Y6MHuKNpeA09Qj9iCoyn6kmJHdoKN6ji53vfiM84BCewZsyRE8lZajMrT2aujblCcD4yi6N70QtyoBtotH3fCf-2EGh7Dfk3RuEICcxQJKf-OXudbdaBx20Oo0BHbxUFqGPuvJoafVwQ9hUx66T7WctQsHGLgKBJDYJw_T1scRK09G3Ep2UwiWhizIHkv2OXH1iF8AXzUNJAX8Pv2zVR8BdgSl8GlxCAisTKjGgBsfC3iaFPtNRDOGBNkGI0I-JZYaZFBRhzA6D9Yuxt9kNq7533NktM87kC5gGtcUTf2QXJQCg1j4htuv8jQeluuOdgZbNu70KkJ_LZklW_BZ3jpTi01HZvX0i2-7lvGIx_csbj7QALDH0Lpx3PICOT9euoMJQ_e3jZfWE52_fLlc7IN3HkkwiiGuV7AHjvgx2gvI7AHGxFPGXWzRzw07gg69mNmoCeq3Uhuc1RKIR8bArWu0D_46)**

body:
Check out our weekly newsletter...
---

| Hello from the campaign trail!
We now have less than 50 days until the primary and #TeamGibbons is going strong.
This past week, I met with voters all over the state, including Crawford County, Hancock County and Stark County. In the next few days, I'll be headed south to meet more voters and participate in Senate candidate debates. Check out my upcoming stops below!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sC9NrHMofyj3gH5Rd_47UzKCYR-9pFqyWgWGcm0tfFovVJ0qkRDWNCulzJMsnIxfZjlbB7CckNRHkyX-plQHZgi4mHLjDEiUxyK9BJ6Q7DODDv6532VpYjSyxdVUHx5T94chpYAk3MNRt-IkzsSLpviS7eWkIfOD9LQjC41ozoltiNIv3hj4ZtXD1huxZ4lD_3oxzSpCxJw=&c=zlMumq1GooxXLwxf9b6kJQC7aa_vlfBbNnEa6Ia_OMPU6qd9ZD-lAQ==&ch=XBmFpNAv6Se5WM2-8mTcTXlR_1vnLpaQ4_2ptKwLA7aJFnMHx1MLag==)

| | |

| This week, I was proud to sign America's Declaration of Energy Independence. It's disturbing to see what happens when Democrats force us to rely on foreign energy sources instead of our own supplies. It's not acceptable to take away affordable energy, which is exactly what they have done intentionally.
---

| Ohio investment banker Mike Gibbons has shot to the top of the polls in the state's Senate GOP field in recent weeks ahead of what is expected to be a bloody final sprint to the May 3 primary.

| Our growing team is full of hard-working patriots who have dedicated their time to help us win across Ohio. Thanks to our Wood County Captain Tiffany Densic as well as Geauga Conservative Club Chair Mario Innocenzi for your support!

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Summer can win this race
body:
The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress.
#
Peter,
I need to tell you about our next Justice Democrats primary, and ask you to be a part of our next winning campaign.
Summer Lee is running in Pennsylvania’s 12th Congressional District. Redistricting just recently shook up this race and split Summer’s old district in half. AND, a Republican-funded Super PAC called Democratic Majority for Israel (DMFI) endorsed one of Summer’s opponents. DMFI ran smear campaigns against Bernie and Jamaal Bowman in 2020.
Summer’s campaign is in a sprint towards her May 17 primary. And we’re right there with her against the political establishment. **Just yesterday, Summer filed more than 7,000 petition signatures to get on the ballot — thousands more than any other candidate in the primary.**
**Summer can win this race** — she’s an organizer and a state representative with a track record of fighting for her communities. But here’s the thing: Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. Most recent data shows the fundraising numbers are close in this primary.
Summer has a chance to fundraise more this quarter than her opponents — even though she’s raising money only from the grassroots and NOT from corporate PACs. Every single dollar counts right now, because of how much this race has changed just in the last few weeks. With our support and the support of grassroots donors like you, we can still win.
We’re helping Summer build a campaign that can win. Just like we’re doing for Jessica Cisneros. Just like we did for Greg Casar this year, Cori and Jamaal in 2020, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in 2018.
Wall Street, fossil fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to opponents in our races. So, we’re relying on a flood of grassroots donations — $5, $27, $50, whatever folks can afford — to win another critical primary race.
The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. Corporate Democrats don’t want to see Summer and her support for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal rise to Congress.
**So, Peter, can you make a contribution directly to Summer Lee’s campaign right now?**
[→ Yes, I can donate $3 to help Summer win another primary for the people and expand the Squad.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97729?refcode=em20220316-22416&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=22416%2E1203867%2ERRgei5)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97729?refcode=em20220316-22416&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=22416%2E1203867%2ERRgei5)**
Thank you so much for your support as we enter the busiest stretch of primary season.
In solidarity,
Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=3&akid=22416%2E1203867%2ERRgei5) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=4&akid=22416%2E1203867%2ERRgei5) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220316-22416-footer&t=5&refcode2=22416_1203867_RRgei5&akid=22416%2E1203867%2ERRgei5)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=22416%2E1203867%2ERRgei5)

name: Matt Schoonmaker
subject: FWD: 👀 Our FIRST ad is up! Check it out here >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| Just making sure you saw John’s email from yesterdayy. Hey friend, I just quickly wanted to forward John’s email, since **Cranley for Ohio just launched its first campaign ad.** Since we’re neck and neck with our primary opponent, this ad will go a long way in helping us share John’s vision for Ohio. Plus, name recognition goes a long way at the ballot box, and we’re determined to put this ad in front of as many eyes as possible. But I want to be transparent: **Keeping our ad up on the air is a _huge_ expense, and if our campaign can’t afford it, we’ll lose _crucial_ momentum before the primary.** **[Friend, I hate to ask, but we need our strongest supporters to step up here. Chip in $20 to help us keep our ad on TV until folks head to the polls>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029959/335396796/-696567944?amount=20&refcode=ea.d906b358-3fa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.d906b358-3fa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTA2YjM1OC0zZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmzUT5K-Sn7pW6yKFvJW4czYL085PFXdtiV8kHvLK1U=)** **[DONATE $20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029960/335396797/-696567944?amount=20&refcode=ea.d906b358-3fa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.d906b358-3fa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTA2YjM1OC0zZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmzUT5K-Sn7pW6yKFvJW4czYL085PFXdtiV8kHvLK1U=)** **[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43029961/335396798/-696567944?refcode=ea.d906b358-3fa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.d906b358-3fa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTA2YjM1OC0zZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmzUT5K-Sn7pW6yKFvJW4czYL085PFXdtiV8kHvLK1U=)** You’ve shown us before that grassroots energy _can_ power a winning campaign. body:
---
| | **_[I have an unprecedented chance to UNSEAT Republican Congressman Steve Chabot. He’s one of the most dangerous -- and vulnerable -- Republicans in Congress who’s left the people of this district behind for far too long. I’ve set an ambitious goal -- 1,000 gifts before midnight -- to prove my campaign has what it takes to flip this seat for Democrats. But if you don’t have the time to read my whole email, can I count on your $15 right away? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043153/335442103/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)_**
* * *
This run for Congress is personal.

**[I’m running for my mom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043154/335442104/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)**

She taught special education in public schools for decades.

She believed in her core that every young person had God-given talents -- and that it was up to the adults to identify and lift up those talents.

Her students were being forced into one-size-fits-all testing that wasn’t serving them at all.

So she decided to take a bold step and turned her entire classroom into a cafe where her students would learn skills that would benefit them for the rest of their lives.

Through my career in education and public service, I’ve always kept my mom’s determination to take on tough odds and make a difference for families struggling to get by.

**_[But I’ve watched Republican Congressman Chabot fight against us every step of the way. We need a voice in Washington who will fight to increase funding for public schools -- not fight to stop the funds we needed to reopen schools safely. Can I count on your $15 before my deadline to help me fully fund my campaign and defeat Steve Chabot? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043155/335442105/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)_** **[I’m running for every child and family that Chabot has left behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043156/335442106/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)**

I’ve spent my career fighting for families.

I helped lead the Preschool Promise to provide two years of quality preschool for our 3 and 4 year olds.

It has helped thousands of children and families, as well as our schools and small business preschool providers succeed.

But instead of working to support our district’s hardworking families, Congressman Chabot voted **[AGAINST](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043157/335442107/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)** making childcare and seniorcare more affordable.

**_[I believe the people of this district deserve a Representative who will make life easier for families, instead of harder. But to unseat Chabot, I need your urgent help to close the budget gap before midnight. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043158/335442108/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)_** **[And finally, I’m running for hardworking people like you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43043159/335442109/1092196856?refcode=20220316_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWNjN2Q5NS02MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xtx1aY704SCTVefPkmIDj7ePBlnm0-GoVjiA9-aXEh0=)**

The anxiety and uncertainty we’re all feeling is a direct result of the choices made by folks like Congressman Chabot.

But if you want something better for you and your family...

If you want someone who will deliver for the big issues our community faces...

clean_body: | | = This run for Congress is personal. = She taught special education in public schools for decades. She believed in her core that every young person had God-given talents -- and that it was up to the adults to identify and lift up those talents. Her students were being forced into one-size-fits-all testing that wasn’t serving them at all. So she decided to take a bold step and turned her entire classroom into a cafe where her students would learn skills that would benefit them for the rest of their lives. Through my career in education and public service, I’ve always kept my mom’s determination to take on tough odds and make a difference for families struggling to get by. = = I’ve spent my career fighting for families. I helped lead the Preschool Promise to provide two years of quality preschool for our 3 and 4 year olds. It has helped thousands of children and families, as well as our schools and small business preschool providers succeed. But instead of working to support our district’s hardworking families, Congressman Chabot voted = making childcare and seniorcare more affordable. = = The anxiety and uncertainty we’re all feeling is a direct result of the choices made by folks like Congressman Chabot. name: Dr. Annie HQ
subject: Families are in need and our opponent doesn’t care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
At last weekend’s Trump rally, extremist Republican Katie Arrington, who could be our opponent in November, showed her loyalty lies not with the people of our state, but with Donald Trump and his special interest backers.

| | At last weekend’s Trump rally, extremist Republican Katie Arrington, who could be our opponent in November, showed her loyalty lies _not_ with the people of our state, but with Donald Trump and his special interest backers.

**See for yourself:**

name: Crystal Vanuch
subject: Re: 98 Days
body:
| | | Peter, _Did you see this email?_ Our **Republican Primary** election for Virginia’s 7th U.S. Congressional District is now only __97 days away__ _,_____ and now its come to light that _along with extreme liberal Spanberger_ , at least two of the "_front runners_ " in the Republican Primary don't even live in our district. **_Let's elect someone who actually lives in the district!_** Sincerely, Team Vanuch
---
|
---
| | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/29d372c052252ba9/66c5569bc5fc3132c3d6b838967d376c)
---
Peter, Our **Republican Primary** election for Virginia’s 7th U.S. Congressional District is only __98 days away__! I know you've been bombarded with emails from candidates - and soon we'll all likely be flooded with a barrage of mail and nonstop TV ads. _I get it._ But this race and beating Abigail Spanberger (_**who does not even live in the district**_) will be the key in flipping the U.S. House and retiring Nancy Pelosi! We've put Spanberger on notice. We will not be represented by her extreme liberal agenda that's hurting Virginia families. My name is Crystal Vanuch, and I am running to take on the radical Democrats in Washington, defend our conservative values, and lead on commonsense policies that help every Virginian.
---
[Can you chip in today to help us beat Spanberger?](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/29d372c052252ba9/0fe6f8d5aa6f194ac3d6b838967d376c)
---
Here's what you need to know about me -- I was born, raised, educated, and _**still live right here in the heart of the new 7th District**_. Like many Virginians, I was born into a lower-middle-class family. My father was a Marine and Prince William County Police Officer, and my mother raised our family full-time on my father’s public servant income. I am married to a Marine who fought in Iraq for our very freedoms that have been under constant attack by the extreme Democrats in Washington, D.C. With the support of so many in our community, I've worked hard in my career and as the Chair of the Stafford County Board of Supervisors to produce results. Peter -- [Now, I'd like to bring my record of conservative results to Washington, D.C. and fight for you.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/29d372c052252ba9/fc4cefe81e0397abc3d6b838967d376c) As your Congresswoman, I will fight for Virginia families, stop the Biden-Pelosi-Spanberger liberal agenda, and support commonsense policies that help all Virginians.
---
[Can you chip in today to help us beat Spanberger?](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/29d372c052252ba9/1640a3ac644c057bc3d6b838967d376c)
---
Abigail Spanberger has let us down too many times. Now she wants to represent us from outside of the district in Henrico? **Worse yet** \- _at least two of the _"front runners"_ in the Republican Primary don't even live in our district._ We need proven conservative leadership that understands the needs of our community. Leadership you can __trust_._ **_I would greatly appreciate your continued support and vote on Tuesday, June 21st._** Please spread the word to your likeminded friends and neighbors. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress
---
[Donate Today!](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/29d372c052252ba9/1bba1c319ab6232cc3d6b838967d376c)
---
P.S. -- _I need your help._ Please donate to help spread our shared conservative message to voters at [crystalvanuch.com/donate](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/29d372c052252ba9/3f7a65380237e936c3d6b838967d376c) or by mailing a contribution to Crystal Vanuch for Congress, P.O. Box 549, Stafford, VA 22554. **Thank you in advance for your support!**
---
| |
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
This email was sent by: Crystal Vanuch for Congress
PO BOX 549 Stafford Virginia 22554
[Unsubscribe](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476&c=40203&jid=29d372c052252ba9) | [Profile Center](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476&c=40203&jid=29d372c052252ba9)

It’s time for another update from the Campaign Trail! It's been a couple of busy weeks for David talking to voters all around the 10th Congressional District! It’s no surprise that people are ready for a change and someone who will fight for the American people in Washington. Inflation is through the roof and Americans are suffering. Just a month ago we recorded a video about diesel prices rising over 72%. Since then it has only gotten worse now reaching over 100% of what it was just a year ago.****

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6745%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gyvnw7DehT24hLkbWZ6sQQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69318%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0%2b7mDLA3fV4mVPUb1nZ2yg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69319%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F2jY7ppxHeqbfEPDKAa0BA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69319%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F2jY7ppxHeqbfEPDKAa0BA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6745%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gyvnw7DehT24hLkbWZ6sQQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6745%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gyvnw7DehT24hLkbWZ6sQQ&sysid=1)

name: Team Inslee
subject: The freeze is over -- and we have no time to waste.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We'll be honest, this is scary for us, too.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/9bq3hRWLj7SR/MHhUNHRyOUFYaWhnRDBhWjk0cEJBSGRsY2Zvcjl6TjhxVzJucWZhRHZmNkZMNFByRmRPUUN5RmZacnlzOFpqUCtSQWJkblNzeTFiSXZvdy9QMDk1SjF1TEtMT3dYRERGQWJpMGVPU3ZiaU09S0/K3dPVDRrdEZQeDR2bG9oWEZwYkFBN1lkcVJ5TnY4VGhSYm5idTV4REpSND0S1) Friend -- A few days ago, Jay emailed you about three things:
1. All that we accomplished this legislative session, including the Move Ahead Washington package (a once-in-a-generation investment in sustainable transportation infrastructure to tackle the climate crisis).
2. A seriously frightening new U.N. report about how the dangers of climate change are mounting -- and how we're not moving quickly enough to stop them.
3. **The 500 grassroots donations we need before this week wraps to power this next, urgent stage of our climate work together.**

Our fundraising freeze is over, and we frankly have no time to waste. [_**Please, chip in $10 right now so we can hit this post-freeze fundraising goal.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/EqrVC4mwDqTE/MHhUNHRyOUFYaWhnRDBhWjk0cEJBSGRsY2Zvcjl6TjhxVzJucWZhRHZmNkZMNFByRmRPUUN5RmZacnlzOFpqUCtSQWJkblNzeTFiSXZvdy9QMDk1SjF1TEtMT3dYRERGQWJpMGVPU3ZiaU09S0/K3dPVDRrdEZQeDR2bG9oWEZwYkFBN1lkcVJ5TnY4VGhSYm5idTV4REpSND0S1) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/KaG2s3WXzqhx/MHhUNHRyOUFYaWhnRDBhWjk0cEJBSGRsY2Zvcjl6TjhxVzJucWZhRHZmNkZMNFByRmRPUUN5RmZacnlzOFpqUCtSQWJkblNzeTFiSXZvdy9QMDk1SjF1TEtMT3dYRERGQWJpMGVPU3ZiaU09S0/K3dPVDRrdEZQeDR2bG9oWEZwYkFBN1lkcVJ5TnY4VGhSYm5idTV4REpSND0S1)

We'll be honest, this latest climate report released by the U.N. is scary for us to read, too.
Per the report, over 40% of the world's population is "highly vulnerable" to our swiftly mounting climate crisis. That means entire ecosystems, species, and cities -- even nations -- could cease to exist.
But let us be clear: There is hope. We have time to take action to mitigate the worst of the damage. But it's up to us. Here in Washington state, we're proving progress really is possible.
[_**So, let 's reach this fundraising goal to show the world that we're ready to sustain the progress here in Washington state. Will you chip in $10 right now to power our work?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/EqrVC4mwDqTE/MHhUNHRyOUFYaWhnRDBhWjk0cEJBSGRsY2Zvcjl6TjhxVzJucWZhRHZmNkZMNFByRmRPUUN5RmZacnlzOFpqUCtSQWJkblNzeTFiSXZvdy9QMDk1SjF1TEtMT3dYRERGQWJpMGVPU3ZiaU09S0/K3dPVDRrdEZQeDR2bG9oWEZwYkFBN1lkcVJ5TnY4VGhSYm5idTV4REpSND0S1)
Thanks so much for being a part of this team.
Team Inslee

[CHIP IN NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3hwVGZdQr/MHhUNHRyOUFYaWhnRDBhWjk0cEJBSGRsY2Zvcjl6TjhxVzJucWZhRHZmNkZMNFByRmRPUUN5RmZacnlzOFpqUCtSQWJkblNzeTFiSXZvdy9QMDk1SjF1TEtMT3dYRERGQWJpMGVPU3ZiaU09S0/K3dPVDRrdEZQeDR2bG9oWEZwYkFBN1lkcVJ5TnY4VGhSYm5idTV4REpSND0S1)

name: Team Tina
subject: We are just getting started!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43031337/335403314/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmFlZDBkYy00MmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFV_37IVqVzTmQC-j9RzIEK4JUyAe-376yvnUCWWtRE=&emci=744b48c5-70a4-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d6aed0dc-42a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15353729)

Hi Peter,

We can think of no better way to mark Women's History Month than with some exciting endorsement announcements!

The **Women's Investment Network Political Action Committee (WINPAC)** recently announced their endorsement of Tina for Governor. This amazing group is one of Oregon's leading organizations working to elect pro-choice Democratic women around the state. And Tina, as a long-standing champion of women's rights, is honored to be recognized by WINPAC.

This endorsement follows endorsements already made by **EMILY'S List, Planned Parenthood PAC of Oregon, Pro-Choice Oregon, and The Mother PAC.** One thing is especially clear here: Team Tina is building a powerful coalition of passionate advocates championing the rights of women. We have momentum, and _we are just getting started._

subject: URGENT: The Supreme Court hangs in the balance

body:
If we give them the opportunity, the GOP is going to dismantle all the progress we’ve made.
#
It’s this simple, Peter:
We know from experience that the GOP isn’t going to make confirming Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson an easy task. Now more than ever, the fate of the Supreme Court and the direction of our country is hanging in the balance.
That means we need to step up and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November. With so much left to accomplish, we can’t miss the mark.
**[We’re close to hitting our mid-month fundraising goal, Peter. Will you chip in $5 before midnight to help us stay on track to win in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43031324/335403289/-1716492716?refcode=dd_em_220316_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGFkMzhkNi00MmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NGi_0xEnk1aFwWanAReiKh6ZbOQvdwdx25NwpxwRWnU=)**

Are you with us?

Thank you,
Team Durbin

body:
Donald Trump NEVER says a bad word about Vladimir Putin. Even as Ukraine was invaded, he called him “very savvy.”
#
Derek -
Donald Trump NEVER says a bad word about Vladimir Putin. Even as Ukraine was invaded, he called him “very savvy.”
When Trump was impeached for trying to extort Ukrainian President Zelenskyy — threatening to withhold the weapons he needed to defend Ukraine unless Trump got dirt on Hunter Biden — the Republican Party refused to convict.
When Russia needs its disinformation laundered through American media, where does he turn? The Republican Party’s favorite network and their favorite host: Fox News’ Tucker Carlson.

Donald J. Trump March 16th, 2022
People forget so quickly, with the help of the Fake News, that it was me that got the 20 out of 28 delinquent NATO countries to start paying the money that they owed in order to rebuild a floundering NATO. Nobody knew things would happen so rapidly, but NATO was poor and now it is rich, and all of the Fake News commentators that said Trump was tearing down NATO should be ashamed of themselves for telling lies. Not only was the United States being taken advantage of by the EU on trade, but it was forced to pay the costs of the many delinquent NATO countries. Bush and Obama did nothing but make speeches and talk—I acted, and acted strongly. I said to them, “if you don’t pay up, no protection.” They all paid up, and paid up quickly. It’s a story that’s never reported, but that’s only because we have a corrupt press in our Country!

Donald J. Trump March 15th, 2022
Endorsement of Madison Gesiotto Gilbert
Madison Gesiotto Gilbert will be a great Congresswoman for Ohio’s 13th Congressional District. She has been a vocal supporter of mine for many years, and now we have a chance to support Madison. She is a small business owner, attorney, and columnist, and will make our voices heard in Washington. In Congress, Madison will strongly fight for Border Security, to Protect Life, Election Integrity, Defend the Second Amendment, and Support our Military, Vets, and Law Enforcement. She will fight against the menace of human trafficking, and get drugs off our streets. Madison Gesiotto Gilbert is an America First patriot, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement!

body:
[1]Erica Smith

The North Carolina primary is right around the corner, and we need your
help to win.

We’re ramping up our campaign operations to send Erica Smith to Congress —
traveling across Eastern North Carolina, planning voter outreach events,
and having conversations with supporters about what issues we should focus
on.

Unfortunately, we can’t talk to all of you in person. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202203-survey/?source=em20220316-1000&t=1001&akid=1000%2E3698%2Eely5b9 ]And that’s why we’re reaching out
today. If you have a few moments to spare, can Erica and the team count on
you to take our quick March Priorities Survey? »

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202203-survey/?source=em20220316-1000&t=1002&akid=1000%2E3698%2Eely5b9 ]Take the Survey

We’re a people-powered campaign, and we couldn’t care less about what
corporate PACs or fossil fuel lobbyists have to say.

We want to hear from you. Your input will allow us to focus on the
specific issues facing our communities right now, and your thoughts will
make our campaign stronger as we fight to give power back to everyday
people.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202203-survey/?source=em20220316-1000&t=1003&akid=1000%2E3698%2Eely5b9 ]So please, will you take our March Priorities Survey? You are an
important part of our campaign, and we want to make sure your feedback is
in before we share the results with Erica.

Thank you for your time!

— Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220316-1000-footer&t=1004&refcode2=1000_3698_ely5b9&akid=1000%2E3698%2Eely5b9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1000%2E3698%2Eely5b9

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

subject: In only two weeks, DeSantis has done incalculable damage to Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
imagine what he could do with another four years ... or if he runs for president! |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044193/335449583/1828375930?refcode=20220316_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Z8hOcV9e57l5HxHuDS_Hd1ARRpmDPEx47lOjRfmW0s=)
