Friend,

**We’re only halfway through March, and _already_ Ron DeSantis has done incalculable damage to our state and harmed millions of Floridians. **
• FIRST, he said he’d sign an extreme 15-week abortion ban.

•THEN, he signaled support for the far-right “Don’t Say Gay” bill, which would ban all discussion of LGBTQ+ issues, history, and people from the classroom.

• NOW, he’s trying to silence the voices of communities of color by pushing gerrymandered maps.
_**[If this is the kind of damage Ron DeSantis is capable of doing in just two weeks, imagine what he could do with _another four years_ — or if he runs for president. Charlie Crist is doing everything he can defeat DeSantis in November, and he needs all of our support. Donate now to Team Crist! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044195/335449585/1828375930?refcode=20220316_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Z8hOcV9e57l5HxHuDS_Hd1ARRpmDPEx47lOjRfmW0s=)**_

But now we have a chance to deny him another term as governor (and stop his presidential ambitions in their tracks), so we need to take advantage of it before it’s too late. None of us want to wake up the day after the election and wish we’d done more. = — Team Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Hi Peter,

Hello! I'm Christy's political director, and I wanted to reach out directly because it's my favorite season – ❁❀ spring ❀❁ – and that means it's canvass time!

I've been working for Christy for nearly 3 years, and let me tell you, she's one of the hardest working women in politics I know. Her commitment to the dignity of working people, to women's and LGBTQ+ equity, to high quality education for all, and to the values of justice and democracy is fierce and unwavering.

**That's why I wanted to reach out now because this is such a critical moment in Christy's race.** Now is when we launch some of our biggest volunteer events to start hitting the doors and organizing phone banks all across the district.

**Voter outreach and field organizing is what wins elections,** but it takes money and a lot of bandwidth to make sure we can reach voters everywhere. We need clipboards, we need campaign literature, we need yard signs, and we need a lot of organizers to train volunteers in all corners of the district.

**[Chip in $5 or more at this critical moment to make sure Christy can GET OUT THE VOTE to folks across the district.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044243/335449751/946308265?refcode=em22_220316_MichelleSend-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkHrTLn3aODOtyYWZrBF_-rMuHRASnmEH85m1aWqEe0=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044244/335449752/946308265?refcode=em22_220316_MichelleSend-TestB&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkHrTLn3aODOtyYWZrBF_-rMuHRASnmEH85m1aWqEe0=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044245/335449753/946308265?refcode=em22_220316_MichelleSend-TestB&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkHrTLn3aODOtyYWZrBF_-rMuHRASnmEH85m1aWqEe0=)

You all know by now how close last cycle's race was – but I'll mention it again – because **it was just 333 votes.**

**We cannot leave one single voter behind.** Not in a race as close as this one, and certainly not in a race that's one of the few toss-up districts in the country.

And we're committed to talking to everyone we can.

We're talking to commuters and gig-economy workers who can't afford to fill up their tanks to get to work.

We're talking to parents and teachers who are reeling from the tremendous burden the pandemic has placed on them and their children.

We're talking to young and new voters about issues that impact them the most: gun legislation, climate change, housing, and the absurdly high cost of an education.

We're talking to frontline workers fed up with stagnant wages and a higher cost of living.

**We're talking to everyone.** It's not only how this campaign is going to win, it's the right thing to do. It's why Christy is running and why she needs your help.

[**Peter, Election Day is not just Nov. 8th, 2022. It's starting right now. Chip in $5 or more to help us canvass every corner of this district so we don't leave any voter behind. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044250/335449758/946308265?refcode=em22_220316_MichelleSend-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkHrTLn3aODOtyYWZrBF_-rMuHRASnmEH85m1aWqEe0=)
[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044251/335449759/946308265?refcode=em22_220316_MichelleSend-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkHrTLn3aODOtyYWZrBF_-rMuHRASnmEH85m1aWqEe0=)
Thank you so much for your help. I know it means so much to Christy and will mean so much to the people of CA-27 when she wins in November.

See ya out there,

Michelle Kampbell

[**P.S. We need everyone on board to win this race. If you want to volunteer at one of our in-person or virtual events, write postcards, or host your own event, you can sign up here >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044252/335449760/712177193?refcode=em22_220316_MichelleSend-TestB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTNiZWZjNC02NWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkHrTLn3aODOtyYWZrBF_-rMuHRASnmEH85m1aWqEe0=&emci=31f09194-53a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=713befc4-65a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11385749)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: What Laura Ingraham said
body:
[](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) Dear Peter, Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she's a "boy" and hid it from her mother... So, we're dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children. [**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I'm asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can't brainwash any more children.**](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you. One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a "boy." What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual. Her daughter didn't even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs... The teachers recruited Jessica's daughter to join their "Equality Club" where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual. The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom. They even created a "Gender Support Plan" for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother's knowledge. And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica's daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn't be "trusted**." The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening... They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children's education. Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control... It's disgusting. It's awful. And we have to stop them. That's why I'm asking for your help today. [**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?** ](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions... Because the only way we're going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court. The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica's daughter is just one example. We know the California Department of Education and the teachers' associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents... Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned? Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views. And we have an opportunity to stop it. This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court**! They should be teaching our children math, reading and history -- not pushing them to become transgender or bisexual. But, to stop this from happening -- we need to win this case... That's why I'm asking for your help immediately today. [_**Will you please step up and make a generous donation to help us drag these radical activists to court?** _](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits -- we **WIN****** them!! My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on **Newsmax** and **Fox News** with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We've already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court. We're also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it's one we cannot afford to lose. [**That's why, I'm asking if you can give today -- $35, $50, $100, $250 or more. I will use it to protect our children and grandchildren from the radical Left.**](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they'll know that we're watching and are ready to drag them into court... That is the only way we're going to stop them -- they have to fear the consequences of their actions! With your help, we'll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we'll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won't get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights. Thank you in advance for your support. **God Bless,** **Harmeet K. Dhillon** **Founder & CEO,** **The Center for American Liberty** [**DONATE**](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual. They helped her change into a "boy" with a new identity a new name and new pronouns -- **and told her to hide it from her mother.** Now we're dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win. [That's why I'm asking you to give an emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 to stop these radical liberals from poisoning our children. ](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too! [**DONATE**](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) [](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) [**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](
https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/cc8edbd59cdd6923bb21f?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_CFAL_KBA_REV_SMC-SMC) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
Â(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59852732:6priQQoN_:m:1:3317145305:27CCF352744697A395013AA3C53BADB6:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

That's why I'm asking for your help immediately today. And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits -- we WIN** them!! My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on Newsmax and Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream and Fox and Friends. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles and victories against the radical Left. We've already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court. We're also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it's one we cannot afford to lose. So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they'll know that we're watching and are ready to drag them into court... That is the only way we're going to stop them -- they have to fear the consequences of their actions! With your help, we'll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we'll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won't get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights. Thank you in advance for your support. God Bless, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO, The Center for American Liberty P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual. They helped her change into a "boy" with a new identity a new name and new pronouns -- and told her to hide it from her mother.** Now we're dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win. We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too! The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Katie Hill
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0T3Fv83uRKlLhJ-VIcr1MGOqWiMsN2RMkFXBPWSiA5w=/gpNAHbqsWpmyUU0i1QnKM7Y8YcaFSObMwUNZm3oNq8U=)
Peter,

When I left Congress, I made a promise that I will continue our fight. **That 's why I launched HER Time in 2020 -- to support**** candidates who are not typically seen in positions of power.**

Since then, we've helped to elect women from diverse backgrounds -- candidates with the vision and drive needed to make lasting systemic change in America.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0T3Fv83uRKlLhJ-VIcr1MGOqWiMsN2RMkFXBPWSiA5w=/oVdq0FzC0Pnqbi7-_H-iGxrwVraM87joWpdSSykEvag=?refcode=X_031622_Intro_E)
I started as a longshot candidate -- few people believed that a 29-year-old woman could win in a historically red district. But we proved the naysayers wrong.

**I was elected with a wave of women who have changed the structure of Congress and have shifted the very idea of who is electable. **

But things aren't changing fast enough. Congress has never been more diverse AND YET women comprise only 25% of the body and people of color make up just 32%.

**My mission is to ensure that great candidates who are traditionally overlooked have the resources they need to win. **

**[Will you support HER Time 's class of 2022 frontline Congresswomen so we can make change from the ground up?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0T3Fv83uRKlLhJ-VIcr1MGOqWiMsN2RMkFXBPWSiA5w=/oVdq0FzC0Pnqbi7-_H-iGxrwVraM87joWpdSSykEvag=?refcode=X_031622_Intro_E)**

name: Team Oakley
subject: Peace Action just endorsed Imani!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Imani’s made no secret of her opposition to the military industrial complex. Her entire career, she’s fought against unjust wars, useless “defense” spending, and military corruption.

And today, we’re proud to announce that Peace Action — the nation’s largest grassroots peace network — has endorsed Imani! Click here to chip in $27 and join them in supporting our progressive movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=peaceaction]

Here’s what Peace Action had to say about Imani:

“Peace Action is excited to be endorsing Imani Oakley in her Congressional run. She knows that people should come before the special interests of the military industrial complex. [...] Imani will fight to instead send resources to our communities and to working families, and we look forward to supporting her in that fight."

Imani is ready to fight against the military industrial complex in Congress. She’s ready to make sure that our government puts our communities first — not a bloated military industry that profits off of violence and unrest.

And she’s excited to work with groups like Peace Action — powerful grassroots groups that put our communities first — to redirect resources where they’re needed most. If you’re with her, click here to join Peace Action and support our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=peaceaction]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $17 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=17&refcode=peaceaction] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=peaceaction] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=peaceaction] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=peaceaction] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=peaceaction] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=peaceaction]

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbnccq9m6ln2fo9bkn89a36ql106e7ink7mib090_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5hm4or0cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecb16lhr8cjgmmp76dpl6kon2dtge9im9cjkc3ie0tb0euqnfctkslpr9cbkeurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5ddicup74phh6spm9ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs5kn50jr59dumqvohna8npb0jmmf2lf0m0uia0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5hm4or0cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeqd31icvanke387lssl8999cug3lcspctc2s7co_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5hm4or0cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3b24qom7t9b6j60cf809m5p92i0htu2g48o8qtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5hm4or0cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene is anti-democratic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.

name: Haley Link Krogman
subject: We need to recalibrate
body:
Yesterday, the Maryland Court of Appeals postponed our state primary by three weeks - from June 28 to July 19.
#

Hey team,

Yesterday, the Maryland Court of Appeals **postponed our state primary by three weeks** \- from June 28 to July 19.

We know to "expect the unexpected," but this change means we need to recalibrate all of our campaign plans for this extended timeline. **This is a _make-or-break moment_ – candidates on both sides of the aisle are already trying to sway Maryland voters, and if we wait our turn, we risk Tom's message getting drowned out.**

I'm meeting with Tom on Friday to go over our revised strategy, and I need to tell him we have the resources to remain competitive. **_[Will you please rush $10 before MIDNIGHT tonight to ensure we're able to implement our recalibrated strategy to get Tom in front of voters ahead of the primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43045202/335454020/1234338550?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220316-PrimaryPostponement-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjUwYTRmMy02OWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cn1R_LL6XzyliGeypiC-TYhyYpSgyosHBine6Kq2jPA=)_**

name: Max Steiner
subject: The Case for a No Fly Zone in Ukraine
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43036343/335411790/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2MTUyMi00OWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20HqmRkL-cIL9hs3_MmTNHZGQ8HpYftrK2mxgnn2DAM=)
Friend,

There's been a lot of discussion over the past few days of implementing a No Fly Zone in Ukraine. Biden and LaMalfa are both opposed, staying that a No Fly Zone carries too great a risk of escalation to World War 3.

I disagree. A No Fly Zone has minimal escalatory risk, but it would save thousands of Ukrainian civilians and cripple Russian military power.

What do I mean by No Fly Zone? I mean deploying stealth aircraft to Ukrainian airspace to shoot down Russian aircraft on Ukrainian airspace. It means turning the sky above Ukraine into an air war zone between the US and Russia. It does not mean shooting Russian forces on the ground, or at Russian aircraft in Russia or Belarus. It would almost certainly lead to a small number of US casualties. Russian losses would be higher (worse planes, and terrible performance to date). It would save hundreds, if not thousands, of civilian lives.

No one wants nuclear war: not the US, not the Russians. How do we know that Putin does not WANT to use the bomb? Simple, because he has the bomb now and has not used it. Instead, Putin wants Ukraine for it's resources, population, and strategic location. He originally wanted Ukraine intact - but his attacks on civilian infrastructure over the past week have shown that he is willing to settle for a heavily damaged Ukraine over failure.

Biden and LaMalfa both claim that shooting down Russian aircraft will lead to nuclear weapons use in Europe. This claim ignores what's happening now and what's happened historically. We already provide the Ukrainians with thousands of anti-tank missiles, which have killed far more Russians (and destroyed far more equipment) than our Air Force would through shooting down a handful of planes. And yet... no nuclear war. The claim also ignores history: Soviet planes flew missions against U.S. aircraft during the Korean war. These air battles (and losses) did not lead to WW3.

So a No Fly Zone is not much MORE escalatory than the status quo (sending weapons) and there is historical precedent for non-escalatory, geographically-defined air battles between nuclear powers. This is a very low risk and the upside is obvious: saving innocent Ukrainian lives and defending a nascent democracy in Europe. That's a win.

That's my position. It comes from years as a soldier, as a diplomat, and as a defense analyst at RAND. It is not the empty sword-rattling of a chicken-hawk, or the empty "expertise" of a TV pundit.

I think Biden did a bad job in Afghanistan and I think he's doing a bad job here. I think LaMalfa is taking his talking points from pro-Putin propagandists like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson. Both are shamefully incorrect and both have the blood of Ukrainian women and children on their hands.

Everyone likes to imagine that they would have stood up to Hitler when he seized Czechoslovakia in 1938. This is our 1938 moment and our leaders are choosing appeasement. Worse, they are shamefully cloaking their cowardice with claims of prudence. There is nothing "prudent" about standing by as civilians are killed, or about letting a dictator grow his empire through war. Make no mistake, Putin will not stop with Ukraine -- and the next conflict with Russia may be far worse than a No Fly Zone.

I stand with Ukraine.

Max | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43036344/335411791/360059203?refcode=em-3.15.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2MTUyMi00OWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20HqmRkL-cIL9hs3_MmTNHZGQ8HpYftrK2mxgnn2DAM=)**
---

name: Breland Ridenour
subject: I need your help!
body:
Breland Ridenour - the Right Choice for Nebraska | We're halfway through the month... | My fellow Nebraskans, We're halfway through this mon
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=D52ywLfzcTXqNZnRVeLt-qr6diAXlYxHJ2bJsp2_6Dk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzA0Tl9KWEV4Uj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdmNDE2ZDFjLTU3ZDUtNDBkYi1hNTNjLWYyYmMyODgzOTFkMCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | I need your help!
---
| | Breland Ridenour - the Right Choice for Nebraska
---
| | We're halfway through the month...
---
|
---
| | My fellow Nebraskans,
We're halfway through this month and are pushing on with our fundraising goals. The home stretch is in sight, and the race is really begin to heat up. With all sorts of allegations surrounding both of the presumed leading candidates for the Republican nomination, people are really beginning to seek out the third strongest option. I think we can all agree that we hope my campaign can serve as just that for folks who are concerned with the current "ring leaders".

Those two candidates are swimming in money, and that helps them appear to be the frontrunners. However, the support I've received in my travels and conversations with voters has me feeling pretty good about our campaign - considering the show string budget we've been operating on from the start! This is where I need your further support - this campaign does NOT pay for itself. I need your help. We're trying to raise the funds necessary for making a strong final impression on voters across the state as May 10th quickly approaches. Please review our gameplan below and consider contributing further to help push us over the finish line with strength! Nebraska deserves a candidate who is a sincere Christian first and foremost, a devoted Patriot second, and third, a Republican candidate within a winnable party in this state. Thanks for the support thus far, and for your continuing perseverance amidst what is arguably the craziest primary race we've had in our state in a long time. Let's hit this thing hard so we can let the citizens of Nebraska know what we're all about - empowering our fine state to be a leader in not only marketing and exporting Nebraskan products, but also in exporting a rejuvenated sense of Nebraskan liberty! God bless, Breland Ridenour
---
| | | [**Donate Today**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=WW_vZkTWNfp3uK5Z4FjqN0NlaXcSQVvGYfzTnm08DZs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jaGVja291dC5zcXVhcmUuc2l0ZS9idXkvV0paWUxCM1haVEpERVNDNklNNklHREFKIiwiciI6IjMwYzA0NTBkLWZkMDYtNGI0NC1kMGU4LTk1ZDljMGQ0OThmZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdmNDE2ZDFjLTU3ZDUtNDBkYi1hNTNjLWYyYmMyODgzOTFkMCJ9)
---
| | The Gameplan:
---
| | Our goal is to raise $5,000 by the end of the month. If everyone receiving this email pitched in at least $20, we'd be well on our way to crushing that goal! This $5,000 will help us with our strategy to exercise further reach than Breland has already established thus far. This strategy would include purchases of: \- Reserving spaces in key regional areas of the state to hold intimate meet and greet events with Breland\- Mailers to inform folks around those regions of said meet and greets of the event in their region\- Gear such as pamphlets, yard signs, etc. to give out at these events\- Accommodate these events with basic snacks, drinks, gear, etc.-Assembling a call team to cold call voters to close out primary season Why this strategy? We've decided this is the best path for Breland's grassroots candidacy, as money is limited by nature of his campaign. The big money guys can make $5,000 with just a few phone calls, and only appreciate that kind of money so much. But to a grassroots campaign such as Breland's, it could mean the difference between having a puncher's chance and losing. You heard that right - your contribution TODAY could very well be what swings this election in favor of the candidate you personally support against all odds! How awesome would it be to pull this feat off? We've researched and analyzed lots of election data. The typical TV ads, radio ads, billboard rentals, door to door field teams, etc. appear to have little return on investment considering the lofty investment each method demands. Our research shows us that ultimately, the voter prioritizes face to face interactions much more. Breland's specialty has been his priding himself on driving the four corners of our state to have those conversations with voters. However, these are usually in the context of candidate forums or county party meetings. While great and conducive to sharing his liberty centered message with voters, these events are often capped for time for a single candidate to really have the ideal, intimate interaction with the voters in attendance. By securing places to hold intimate meet and greets/Q&A's with Breland as the sole topic, we believe we could put these funds to tremendous use in a much more cost effective manner! After all, we don't wish to waste your hard earned dollars. Breland himself loathes government waste of our taxpayer dollars, so you can count on him emulating how he'll conduct himself while in office right now while he's still campaigning. That speaks volumes, does it not? Please consider Breland's personal message above, and consider the forces that we're up against here and help us get him across the finish line as the third of the three strongest candidates. If you want a more transparent and vocal leader in the Governor's Mansion, then we need to rally around him and his fundraiser goals! Unfortunately money talks in politics. Even though he's not about it himself, it does ultimately cost money to get his name and message in front of others. That's half the battle...a sound message is the other half, and he's got that one nailed! Thank you for considering donating to the Ridenour campaign. We all want better leadership in our country, and it all starts at the local/state level. The 2022 election is where we can make our voices heard through our candidate! Looking to help in other ways? Please read below! Breland Ridenour: "I need YOUR help TODAY - this is a call to action! The state of Nebraska needs you."
---
| |
---
| | | [**Donate Today**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=4uLPPdZ56PCMI-kVzzWlNkXKngtKU7HBZFyCIruVinI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jaGVja291dC5zcXVhcmUuc2l0ZS9idXkvV0paWUxCM1haVEpERVNDNklNNklHREFKIiwiciI6ImE0ZDM2NjdmLTJkNjctNDBiYy1iNmY5LWMyZjY4ODU3MDMwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdmNDE2ZDFjLTU3ZDUtNDBkYi1hNTNjLWYyYmMyODgzOTFkMCJ9)
---
| | Other Ways You Can Help:
---
| | Here are some ideas on how you can get involved and help get Breland elected:
* Join the Facebook group Ridenour Support Team to share key posts with others and more by [clicking here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=NPvWJ9sqNSXVwW94Ldt58Y87aboU8sls6HGH2zIXM9Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2dyb3Vwcy81MTgwNzYwMzI5MDAyODgiLCJyIjoiMTJlNTVmMTMtMGJhNy00NDE2LTA4YjYtMjI5Y2YzMzQxY2QxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2Y0MTZkMWMtNTdkNS00MGRiLWE1M2MtZjJiYzI4ODM5MWQwIn0).
* Talk to your GOP chairperson and have them invite Breland to speak at the next meeting
* Host a candidate party or pot-luck. Invite your family, friends, and neighbors. Hand out flyers and encourage them to vote for Breland.
Even better - contact our team to have Breland join your group via Zoom. Put him on the big screen and connect with him directly!
* Grab a shirt! T-shirts are a great way to raise awareness and support the campaign. You can get yours today by [clicking here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=sF4Vp1Dc95PdI3_hSmr6LnqIn96v_UyXqudCAFBw8lA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9yaWRlbm91ci1mb3ItZ292ZXJub3ItMjAyMi5zcXVhcmUuc2l0ZS8iLCJyIjoiMTJlNTVmMTMtMGJhNy00NDE2LTA4YjYtMjI5Y2YzMzQxY2QxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2Y0MTZkMWMtNTdkNS00MGRiLWE1M2MtZjJiYzI4ODM5MWQwIn0).
* Have a place in mind to host an intimate meet and greet event? Let us know!

As always, no donation is too small and EVERY dollar goes directly to supporting the needs of our campaign - no frills or specialty treatment. To the many people which have already supported our campaign, we humbly appreciate your continued sacrifice and generosity.

---
| | What's Coming Next:
---
| | | [**Upcoming Events**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=i-dhTLjpFJa07s-ytOg1BbR-b9yjFjm7MqEDBHwwfPs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmlkZW5vdXJmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vci5jb20vIiwiciI6ImFiOTAyZmEwLTI3M2MtNDgwNC1hZWRiLWYwZmVhY2M4MjJlYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdmNDE2ZDFjLTU3ZDUtNDBkYi1hNTNjLWYyYmMyODgzOTFkMCJ9)
---
| | We also encourage you to follow the campaign on Facebook and other social media if you haven't already. Liking, commenting, and sharing our posts are free and easy ways to support Breland. You can find our social media links below.
---
|
---
| | “Liberty must at all hazards be supported. We have a right to it, derived from our Maker. But if we had not, our fathers have earned and bought it for us, at the expense of their ease, their estates, their pleasure, and their blood.” \- John Adams
---
|
---
| | Follow Breland on Social Media
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=fFPewdkXtaBP0eoIYfziUFsLJzut8MO4dXgvJ5-3vzE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL25lYnJhc2thbnNmb3JyaWRlbm91ciIsInIiOiI3NjJiNzZmNC03YWNiLTRkMDAtNTFjNy1iYTQ4YzNjOTcxZGUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZjQxNmQxYy01N2Q1LTQwZGItYTUzYy1mMmJjMjg4MzkxZDAifQ)
---
| [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=ViuSy07D5u28210wJwoSpApFeX5XhOo5qXZE9SujBnI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9yaWRlbm91cmZvcmdvdmVybm9yLyIsInIiOiI3NjJiNzZmNC03YWNiLTRkMDAtNTFjNy1iYTQ4YzNjOTcxZGUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZjQxNmQxYy01N2Q1LTQwZGItYTUzYy1mMmJjMjg4MzkxZDAifQ)
---
| [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/04N_JXExR/c?w=KDSdF2-lqT3DAxypO1J-N4pUbpS3h-emM67R4WhdDsI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9icmVsYW5kcmlkZW5vdXIiLCJyIjoiNzYyYjc2ZjQtN2FjYi00ZDAwLTUxYzctYmE0OGMzYzk3MWRlIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2Y0MTZkMWMtNTdkNS00MGRiLWE1M2MtZjJiYzI4ODM5MWQwIn0)

Even though he's not about it himself, it does ultimately cost money to get his name and message in front of others. That's half the battle...a sound message is the other half, and he's got that one nailed! Thank you for considering donating to the Ridenour campaign. We all want better leadership in our country, and it all starts at the local/state level. The 2022 election is where we can make our voices heard through our candidate! Looking to help in other ways? Please read below! Breland Ridenour: "I need YOUR help TODAY - this is a call to action! The state of Nebraska needs you." | | | | | | | Other Ways You Can Help: | | Here are some ideas on how you can get involved and help get Breland elected: Join the Facebook group Ridenour Support Team to share key posts with others and more by . Talk to your GOP chairperson and have them invite Breland to speak at the next meeting Host a candidate party or pot-luck. Invite your family, friends, and neighbors. Hand out flyers and encourage them to vote for Breland. Even better - contact our team to have Breland join your group via Zoom. Put him on the big screen and connect with him directly! Grab a shirt! T-shirts are a great way to raise awareness and support the campaign. You can get yours today by . Have a place in mind to host an intimate meet and greet event? Let us know! As always, no donation is too small and EVERY dollar goes directly to supporting the needs of our campaign - no frills or specialty treatment. To the many people which have already supported our campaign, we humbly appreciate your continued sacrifice and generosity. | | What's Coming Next: | | | | | We also encourage you to follow the campaign on Facebook and other social media if you haven't already. Liking, commenting, and sharing our posts are free and easy ways to support Breland. You can find our social media links below. | | | “Liberty must at all hazards be supported. We have a right to it, derived from our Maker. But if we had not, our fathers have earned and bought it for us, at the expense of their ease, their estates, their pleasure, and their blood.” \- John Adams | | | Follow Breland on Social Media | | | | | | Created with | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Critical Race Theory bill becomes law
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/crtbecomeslaw1?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Our Critical Race theory bill was signed into law by Governor Tate Reeves on Monday. When we published our report on Critical Race theory in Mississippi a few months ago, we presented clear evidence that it is being promoted in our state. **Our report also included a model bill, which i am delighted to see has now become law.** As Mississippi’s free market think tank, we believe that Critical Race theory is an extreme ideology that seeks to divide America. Far from banning the teaching of history, our bill helps ensure that young Mississippians will grow up with a real understanding of the past. **From now on, teachers will not be allowed to compel their students to believe that some Americans are superior or inferior to any other due to their immutable characteristics.** We believe that our bill is consistent with the Founding principle that all Americans are created equal, and with Dr Martin Luther King’s dream of America as a country where we judge individuals on the content of their character, not the color of their skin.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9f04cd5d0b&e=5703353baa)
---
Mississippi Governor signs CRT bill into law. We explain why this is good for our state, and for those that believe in equality for all.
| Our bill is good news for Mississippi – **and we believe our bill will become a model that other American states will start to use, too.** It is great to see Mississippi lead the way. Let’s hope our lawmakers will now be as active in passing legislation to eliminate the income tax!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?

**_"Their rematch is widely considered the most competitive congressional race in Minnesota."_**

Peter,

Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, **I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders.**

So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. [**Today, I’m asking for you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce076121a268493eac3286af90c3ba4d&_e=LD63JvxMKgNK_NggytJeAMnIklHKSxqo3R4q-rnYC1AgJIXvWsO6oDzBxTyFLnK2GApV2OrYINQzTQeQ2AVvURLhddJw_ISmf0UOPrid-_YYbSvdwkN1YTUOkbe99YkcnLNkl7p-kb3MO3LI2mwDqg4uVaSoazk0YlEZsYJPTt7ExFA49PjHK5z3K0JHCeeR-yhp9DbXpbVrfg3rE1fpO7OfbrvA8M1Vj05QzgVWjvaXNBjjNNonT0tCf9kE3019KNSPdyIZF2tRqv7eGv-rfusPugIvZ_VwxfHHsacpwk9HSMfwQQsocOjetIIDnbso9IMriC7PSh9w5LSR3BZMeBFDcI1oDOYMubtFmbgwEtU2J2zaSmla-slqI9BySYYV)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce076121a268493eac3286af90c3ba4d&_e=LD63JvxMKgNK_NggytJeAMnIklHKSxqo3R4q-rnYC1AgJIXvWsO6oDzBxTyFLnK2GApV2OrYINQzTQeQ2AVvURLhddJw_ISmf0UOPrid-_YYbSvdwkN1YTUOkbe99YkcnLNkl7p-kb3MO3LI2mwDqg4uVaSoazk0YlEZsYJPTt7GfwwV3srIot4kz8MWDtc5h3XoXOyKnjujqYHkzM1B-MMDnl2bOO0HLaCdc17fqIAyb3ULJ15RwuUIRKVG5WXi7Fj2NN5Osn0R3jg7ZYrP9fPHq7ifZD6umtJxToCo57LG5E0pM48jgzfbhYz1wpnHIaDuEJnDjBWsUYIx0Ca7dmnJcZaXPx1MJm67bNvxAviC3rGmKaKwF-K5etU1VtIP)

[**In 2020,**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce076121a268493eac3286af90c3ba4d&_e=LD63JvxMKgNK_NggytJeAMnIklHKSxqo3R4q-rnYC1AgJIXvWsO6oDzBxTyFLnK2GApV2OrYINQzTQeQ2AVvURLhddJw_ISmf0UOPrid-_YYbSvdwkN1YTUOkbe99YkcnLNkl7p-kb3MO3LI2mwDqg4uVaSoazk0YlEZsYJPTt4e2sHBhYetcxmIJSHbZ3rfqzQiWbvna81ylqatsoZPgSey6PuZ-ENAYPScb34HyGg0AyTqu-4cKvYQ9tTS9k6HIBPvDZDqVLLBdJC99sUP8J51iOSbMM-nAVf_p1p2pNgfFA8JSYB-H5wPe1HljHDRODN-eaxGpxtGKwnSdxW-HFwHHNmHLB0aFgrsJqFrx8zRwS8xAxpvudpAT5ZJBbuw) I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. **Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent.** For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year.

But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.**Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us.**

I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C.

[**I’m coming to you today with a humble request: would you be able to spare a dollar or two to help me make sure that this time our campaign doesn’t come up short of victory?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce076121a268493eac3286af90c3ba4d&_e=LD63JvxMKgNK_NggytJeAMnIklHKSxqo3R4q-rnYC1AgJIXvWsO6oDzBxTyFLnK2GApV2OrYINQzTQeQ2AVvURLhddJw_ISmf0UOPrid-_YYbSvdwkN1YTUOkbe99YkcnLNkl7p-kb3MO3LI2mwDqg4uVaSoazk0YlEZsYJPTt4E8ZjcJxt9ufGZ8kDCMS0ceBFMtbmclUBdxZrYv4l5lE66g4nVnsPfAVMwof78GXbgfDXzFwMUrXgFZuzXusQxLXAlhQul9M7DBtdzvXtMAX41utPuM9z6rxxsxHgowblPYIjdMww1cV-LXcMSCtl0MiVjjmdyGzLlHZojH0Ce4Huh6aOKn66u6O-84U7n-fb2kaMzuv7HQmuNOiX7dyIH)

Peter, Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders. So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent. For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year. But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us. I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C. if Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we have to PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY. I know that saving America from the socialist Democrats extends far beyond what I can do on the front lines in Washington, but I also know that we can’t afford to keep our country in the hands of people who HATE AMERICA. body:
Right now, we have scripts ready for our next TV ads, but as of today, we don’t have enough funding to film them and get them on the air.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: 50/50 split in the Senate isn’t cutting it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2816%2E3611125%2EfS9M7B ][IMG]

Folks, our 50/50 razor-thin Democratic majority in the Senate
allows the GOP to obstruct us at every turn.

Here’s what I mean: Every time we’ve tried to pass urgently-needed
legislation that would make it easier to vote and protect our elections
from partisan interference, Senate Republicans have shot it down.

So if we want any chance of delivering more results for working families,
defending our majority isn’t enough—we have to expand it, and electing Tim
Ryan is our best shot to do that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9065?t=1007&akid=2816%2E3611125%2EfS9M7B ]Senate control hinges on Ohio, folks—can I count on you to
chip in $25 to elect Tim to the Senate so we can not just defend, but
EXPAND our Democratic majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9066?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2816%2E3611125%2EfS9M7B ]Donate $25

Thanks,

Sherrod Brown
Senator, Ohio

name: Alex Walker
subject: I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert
body:
Hi,
I’m Alex, and I’m running for Congress against the most deranged, brainwashed, dumpster-fire-of-a-human in Colorado... Lauren Boebert.
I’m asking if you could help us build our team as big as possible by splitting a donation between us and CommonGood. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker]
Let’s face it: I’m running against a conspiracy theorist who somehow wandered into Congress in a delirious rage. Her racist rants, failed attempts to overthrow the government, and the fact that she gets her policies from QAnon Reddit posts all feed into this epic shit-storm that is politics today.
And all the while, folks like us are left behind to deal with actual, real world problems.
We deserve better: I’m not a sellout. I don’t change my opinions based on what polls well. I stick to my values, and don’t waiver just for a big check or a shout out.
And I’m building a team of skeptics like me who are tired of the BS, the pandering, and the mind-numbing stupidity that people like Boebert have brought to the table.
So I’m asking you to join me. Will you split a donation between our team and CommonGood today so we can take down the national embarrassment that is Lauren Boebert? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_aw?refcode=20220316_CGVA_Walker]
Let’s build something real – something that can bring more common sense governing and less phony grandstanding. And let’s burn the MAGA-machine to the ground.
Sincerely,
Alex Walker
Candidate for Colorado’s 3rd District
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Arlington, VA 22215

clean_body: Wow. | | | Peter, wow. We have new details about what Kyrsten Sinema is saying when she’s in closed-door fundraisers, and yikes. → Excerpts from a new book by two New York Times reporters show that Sinema openly mocked President Joe Biden at a closed-door fundraiser attended primarily by GOP lobbyists. → She called herself “anti-government” and “anti-tax”... and said other Democrats are “hiding behind (her) skirt.” → Sinema also praised Republicans including Kevin McCarthy and Andy Biggs. "I love Andy Biggs," she said. "I know some people think he's crazy, but that's just because they don't know him." Notably, Biggs is one of the chief proponents of Trump’s Big Lie and claims that Black Lives Matter was behind the January 6th insurrection. Is Kyrsten Sinema even a Democrat?? She’s blocking our agenda, hurting our chances of keeping the Senate in the midterm elections, and now she’s been caught talking trash about President Biden when she’s in a room full of Republicans. We can’t afford to let her stay in the Senate. Kyrsten Sinema needs to know that pitching herself to GOP lobbyists as “anti-government” and praising a pro-Trump, seditionist member of Congress are completely unacceptable actions for a Demoratic Senator. A contribution right now to the Primary Sinema Project helps us send that message. As a reminder, 100% of proceeds to the Primary Sinema Project fund Arizona organizers on the ground who are holding Sinema accountable and laying the groundwork for another Democrat to replace her ASAP. Thank you for taking action tonight, — The Primary Sinema team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. | Mark learned a lot about how to govern when he was the Mayor of Kansas City. He always said _“There is no Democratic or Republican way to pave a street”_ and that approach is what makes his race for Senate _**so**_ important:
* He has practical and level-headed experience that we need in the Senate.
* He is committed to rising above partisanship to get the job done.
* Mark is the right person for the job because he understands that Kansans need a leader who will protect _the environment, support our schools and ensure that we have well-paying jobs._

Jerry Moran is not cut out for the job. At a time like this, our country and our state are facing real challenges that need real solutions. **Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

body:
do you still check this email?

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: BREAKING: New Trump ally under scrutiny
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yorz9W8K08B4s72EJBEJB6t7UB43w2K2&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Few people did more to promote Donald Trump's lies about voter fraud in the 2020 election than Mark Meadows, Trump's chief of staff. Now it appears that Meadows' participation in this effort was not just dishonest - it was also ripe with hypocrisy.
The New York Times reports that - as Meadows was leading the president's staff in the West Wing and falsely suggesting that Joe Biden's victory was fraudulent - Meadows was registered to vote from a mobile home in battleground North Carolina _where there is no evidence he ever even spent the night, let alone lived._
The blatant hypocrisy of Trump and his cronies knows no bounds. It is critical to our democracy that Trump never sets foot in the Oval Office again - but the only sure way to prevent that is to hold him and his allies accountable for their wrongdoing. **That 's why I'm looking for 2,000 more members of this team to join me in speaking out to demand accountability before midnight tonight, and I hope I can count on you to make your voice heard:**
[**Please click here to share: Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump and his allies for un-American attempts to overthrow our democratic election?**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-Meadow-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1155-su-nd)
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43047063/335461601/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220313ladders2_TK_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWJjMjU2MC03MGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYBL3haUgvENOINnb6a8mbOLUE_iaAZtjTf8n8wB2Ns=)
---
Assemblyman Kevin Kiley likes to keep his options open. He won’t say if he thinks Biden won the election. He won't share if he voted for Trump, or if he supported his policies. He’ll claim he’s a moderate, and then headline rallies with alt-right leaders. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43047066/335461605/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220313ladders2_TK_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWJjMjU2MC03MGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYBL3haUgvENOINnb6a8mbOLUE_iaAZtjTf8n8wB2Ns=)
---
After going for a State Senate promotion and getting rejected by the voters, Kiley tried to oust Governor Newsom in the recall election, coming in 6th place.
But just like _that guy_ at the bar who was already told no, he just keeps coming back.
**Now, he’s running for Congress against Dr. Kermit Jones in one of the top toss-up races in the country.**
Kiley knows this is his last shot at failing up, so he’s going all out. He’s already banked over **$800,000** to spend against Dr. Kermit.
**Can you help us flip this TOSS-UP seat blue, PROTECT the House majority and send Dr. Kermit (NOT career politician Kevin Kiley) to Congress?**

clean_body: | | = Assemblyman Kevin Kiley likes to keep his options open. He won’t say if he thinks Biden won the election. He won't share if he voted for Trump, or if he supported his policies. He’ll claim he’s a moderate, and then headline rallies with alt-right leaders. | = After going for a State Senate promotion and getting rejected by the voters, Kiley tried to oust Governor Newsom in the recall election, coming in 6th place. But just like that guy at the bar who was already told no, he just keeps coming back. Now, he’s running for Congress against Dr. Kermit Jones in one of the top toss-up races in the country. Kiley knows this is his last shot at failing up, so he’s going all out. He’s already banked over $800,000 to spend against Dr. Kermit. Can you help us flip this TOSS-UP seat blue, PROTECT the House majority and send Dr. Kermit (NOT career politician Kevin Kiley) to Congress? I’m running for Congress to provide a commonsense voice for us and ensure the American Dream I defended in uniform is within reach
of all Americans. We can acknowledge historical injustices and modern-day disparities in society while working to correct them
without dividing the country along lines of race, class and gender for political gain.

We should be united as Americans as we strive to ensure the United States lives up to our founding principles and the words of our
Declaration of Independence that: “We hold these truths to be self-evident, that all men are created equal”.

I hope you’ll share with your family and friends, and encourage fellow Republicans to join our team!

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
body:
|
---
| | Let me make something perfectly clear. — I watched Trump officially hire campaign staff for his next Presidential run.
— I watched McConnell raise $30 MILLION to claw his way back to power in the Senate.

name: Gary Black
subject: YOU’RE INVITED: Statewide Tour Kickoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/648f6ec52f274adcc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — The May 24th Republican primary is closer than ever and we’re hitting the road to meet Georgia voters across our entire state!**

---
To celebrate the start of our statewide tour, we’re holding a B.I.G. (Believe. In. Georgia.) kickoff event on Tuesday, March 29th and you’re invited! [**It won’t be the same without you there, and I hope you’ll take a few seconds to claim your free ticket here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/5edbd3ffabfc967dc3d6b838967d376c/37793) **Then, I hope you'll help us build the crowd and grow the team by sharing this email with your family, friends, and loved ones! **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/32803cc73ced69a1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
So much is at stake in this election. Georgia will decide who controls the U.S. Senate majority, and I have the trusted experience to not only win the job, but to actually do the job. Your support has been critical to our efforts so far, and I hope you’ll help us celebrate the launch of our statewide tour and send us off with the wind at our backs. [**You don’t want to miss out. Claim your ticket today!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/5326ae59f1c3517cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/013808e3692efa15c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**CLAIM YOUR TICKET »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/baf1066b3d8fabe6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/3c75677cb561a19ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/15ec4a19645f93c2/500ad10695c77771c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=15ec4a19645f93c2&d=1ec8bb72abae1fd8c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=15ec4a19645f93c2).
---

Athens, GA 30604

It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2j1ok2tr12f64nj50u5vmsfcae4hq8sovpunjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5hm6oj4c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6obtrpv9nuoqd0dmp01qdah81pdgdlguf3svpvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c5hm6oj4c9h2bs)

God Bless you and your generosity,

Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars. I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. | | | | | | Thank you for your help. Thank you for your encouragement. Thank you for having my back. God Bless you and your generosity, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team at United Rural Democrats
subject: GOP is ignoring rural America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Peter, school choice policies aren't working

| |
---
Hi Peter – The GOP is honing in on a single issue with no consideration for how rural Americans will be affected. [__**Rural Americans are being left behind by GOP representatives. Chip in here to turn the tide and support Democrats running to move rural communities forward.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43038852/335423033/311099802?refcode2=701fcfa8-50a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220316_team_schoolchoice_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwMWZjZmE4LTUwYTUtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HAw40LkhhKjS14rL2Vup4PUc8yB5KZUbuIGRhZijo_8=) At almost every convention, campaign rally, or speech, Republican politicians are promoting "school choice." We heard Gov. Kim Reynolds talk about school choice in the Republican response to the State of the Union. We also saw that Sen. Rick Scott put school choice as his first agenda item for the Republican agenda. But now, the issue of school choice is moving beyond Washington rhetoric and into rural states across the country. **Republicans in states like Oklahoma, Iowa, Missouri, Georgia, Texas, and Wisconsin are passing education bills that would harm rural schools and students.** **"School choice" doesn't work for rural districts.** In most rural areas, there are a limited number of alternative school options, if any. That means that families would have to drive potentially hours away from their homes, and many children from low-income families (which represent nearly half of rural students) would be left out of that choice entirely. Republicans have honed in on school choice under the guise of "freedom" and "opportunity." But really, **they're leaving rural schools and students behind** without a second glance. [**Peter, we've let this go on for too long. It's time for Republicans to stop treating rural America as an afterthought. Chip in here to support candidates who will fight for the education that rural students deserve.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43038854/335423035/311099802?refcode2=701fcfa8-50a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220316_team_schoolchoice_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwMWZjZmE4LTUwYTUtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HAw40LkhhKjS14rL2Vup4PUc8yB5KZUbuIGRhZijo_8=) name: Derek Kilmer
subject: My friend, Senator Patty Murray, needs our support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In a few moments, I'm going to ask if you will please split a contribution between my campaign and Senator Patty Murray's campaign. But first, I want to explain why it's crucial we keep a Democratic champion like Patty fighting for us in the Senate.

A role model for all of us, Patty Murray has been a fierce leader for working families ever since she was elected as the first female senator to represent our great state. And soon, Patty will help make history again when she confirms Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court of the United States.

In the years I've worked alongside our senator, I've gotten to know her as a strong advocate and dedicated public servant. Simply put -- Patty Murray gets things done.

But here's the situation, Peter: Senate Republicans are already trying to stall President Biden's nomination and block important legislation. We can't let petty politics stand in the way of progress, and that's why I need your help today.

With Republicans only ONE seat away from regaining control, we cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat. We need to take every race seriously and defend every Democratic incumbent, including the terrific Patty Murray.

**[At midnight, Patty and I are facing an important mid-month deadline. Will you split a donation between our two campaigns to help us defend the Senate and House majorities?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eGJ5R5tP1QGUIlFIET4oG6EXVF3LEy2JrxdgtTbyTx4=/y1aWlCpmsuRKvuNtR50f7gqNGVVLD9J2rxwTZr-c5k4=?refcode=em22_220316_mrry_fndt_gq_act_mm2_de_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220316_mrry_fndt_gq_act_mm2_de_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/eGJ5R5tP1QGUIlFIET4oG6EXVF3LEy2JrxdgtTbyTx4=/y1aWlCpmsuRKvuNtR50f7gqNGVVLD9J2rxwTZr-c5k4=?refcode=em22_220316_mrry_fndt_gq_act_mm2_de_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220316_mrry_fndt_gq_act_mm2_de_ettx&utm_medium=email)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
#DefendDemocracy
#DefendDemocracy
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43039345/335425729/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220316Battleground3_B_KK_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlhYTM5M2U3LTUyYTUtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T94fMmSFzOlllyQN95nyK1pchAzs6umsDuzTphLAzzs=)
Defender of democracy,

March has been a big month across our nation. We’ve been writing letters and holding rallies to demand that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson be confirmed, without delay, to the U.S. Supreme Court. While we’re advocating for fair and representative courts, Florida lawmakers are approving problematic bills, including an “elections police force” – the very first in our nation and a chilling reminder that anti-democratic extremism is thriving.

We’re at a turning point in our country, so it’s no surprise that within weeks of seeing the first Black woman nominated to the SCOTUS that extremist Florida lawmakers would approve an outrageous violation of our constitutional right to vote.

Florida’s bill is voter intimidation and, ultimately, voter suppression. That is their goal. This is what you do when you fear voters voting because your ideas and policy proposals are inferior. #VoteThemOut #DefendDemocracy

We have not met our March fundraising goal. We’re close – but we’re not there yet. We still need another $375 to get us over the line and move forward through the rest of the year. The New Pennsylvania Project is funded largely by small-dollar contributions like yours. **[Will you dig deep and give just $5 right now to move us forward through the rest of the month?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43039346/335425730/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220316Battleground3_B_KK_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlhYTM5M2U3LTUyYTUtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T94fMmSFzOlllyQN95nyK1pchAzs6umsDuzTphLAzzs=)**

clean_body: #DefendDemocracy #DefendDemocracy = Defender of democracy, March has been a big month across our nation. We’ve been writing letters and holding rallies to demand that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson be confirmed, without delay, to the U.S. Supreme Court. While we’re advocating for fair and representative courts, Florida lawmakers are approving problematic bills, including an “elections police force” – the very first in our nation and a chilling reminder that anti-democratic extremism is thriving. We’re at a turning point in our country, so it’s no surprise that within weeks of seeing the first Black woman nominated to the SCOTUS that extremist Florida lawmakers would approve an outrageous violation of our constitutional right to vote. Florida’s bill is voter intimidation and, ultimately, voter suppression. That is their goal. This is what you do when you fear voters voting because your ideas and policy proposals are inferior. #VoteThemOut #DefendDemocracy We have not met our March fundraising goal. We’re close – but we’re not there yet. We still need another $375 to get us over the line and move forward through the rest of the year. The New Pennsylvania Project is funded largely by small-dollar contributions like yours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you, Kadida Kenner Founding Executive Director The New Pennsylvania Project = The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us.
