clean_body: American Energy Independence Fellow American, We are working with leaders across the country to rapidly push through smart energy policies as international tensions rise. We must find ways to relieve the price at the pump for our truckers, commuters, and families. In Maryland, Governor Larry Hogan worked with the Democrat-led legislature and acted quickly on this crisis by announcing an agreement to suspend the gas tax for 30 days. America is becoming unaffordable, and we're going to do something about it. Let's expand bipartisan efforts on a national scale and call on the Biden administration to increase domestic energy production in America with oil, natural gas, wind, solar, and more! Between rising inflation, rising energy costs, and supply chain issues, Americans need relief. It's up to our leaders to provide smart, common sense solutions. We are helping make this happen because we cannot beg nations like Iran, Russia, Saudi Arabia & Venezuela for temporary relief. An America United will lead the way to advocate for policy that will ease the burden on the American people, help make us energy independent and pave the way for a prosperous future. Thank you for your support, Team An America United Join An America United on social media! | | | ---|--- Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

| | Peter, I have some exciting news!

**Our campaign was recently endorsed by the California Democratic Party!**

I am honored to have the support of the California Democratic Party behind our campaign during this historic election. subject: Our rulers are asleep at the wheel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
America is losing her place on the world stage | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066229?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=12969da32b&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

America is losing her place on the world stage.

In its blind hatred of Russia, the Biden Regime has made a series of incalculably stupid moves that have—in the span of less than 2 weeks—put our country in the _weakest_ position it’s been in history.

The world’s biggest oil producers are now conducting business in Chinese Yuan instead of American Dollars.

Saudi Arabia and the UAE refused to even pick up the phone when our illegitimate “President” Joe Biden called.

The Saudis are meeting with Xi in a few weeks.

Russia and China are now entangled in an unbreakable economic alliance.

Even India, China’s ancient enemy, is being pushed into China’s arms.

_The rest of the world is moving on, building a new global order without America in it._

World leaders know that Joe Biden is senile, and they know that he was not legitimately elected.

They don’t respect him. Why should they?

_Even foreign criminals don’t fear the U.S. Government anymore._

Just this week, a Mexican drug cartel shot up the outside of a U.S. Consulate just miles away from the Texas border.

**Our criminal, decadent Ruling Class is intentionally destroying the Dollar—and with it, our economy.**

_Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to afford basic necessities. It’s only going to get worse with these fools in charge._

**_We have to replace THEM before they replace US._**

[Replace Do-Nothing America Last RINOs like my opponent with an American Nationalist.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=af7046e930&e=eda539b26b)

**[_I will IMPEACH our treasonous, senile, illegitimate "President" and his bimbo sidekick_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3c5ed1ab43&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=34b38d7b74&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=78785d2333&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=074fde39a4&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Louis DeJoy’s plan to sabotage the Post Office hits a dead-end in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| There is just one step remaining — President Biden signing this legislation into law.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=107%2E5257348%2E54KXVk)
Derek,
The Senate just passed House legislation that will completely overhaul the United States Postal Service and put it on a secure footing for years to come.
After Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy released plans representing the largest consumer rollback of USPS services in the agency’s history, Congress responded with a vigorous pushback that will protect the Postal Service for generations.
DeJoy will no longer be able to carry out his internal sabotage campaign and will be prohibited from cutting service days. Our legislation will mandate delivery 6 days a week. And no longer will the Post Office have to pre-fund retirement benefits for its employees, a unique Bush-era requirement only applied to that agency, that opponents (including DeJoy) have used to falsely claim the Post Office was losing money and on the verge of bankruptcy.
There is just one step remaining — President Biden signing this legislation into law.
[**Add your name to my petition urging President Biden to sign Post Office reform into law, and stop Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy from sabotaging this institution once and for all.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220312-post-office-reform-dejoy?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_IN_20220316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=107%2E5257348%2E54KXVk)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220312-post-office-reform-dejoy?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_IN_20220316_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=107%2E5257348%2E54KXVk)
---
It has been a long, ugly fight to stop DeJoy’s assault on the Post Office. And we’ve nearly won. There’s just one more step to take. Or maybe two — the next is finally seeing DeJoy fired. More to come.
Thanks for standing with us.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=107%2E5257348%2E54KXVk) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=107%2E5257348%2E54KXVk)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---

body:
| | I just wanted to forward this email from my Campaign Manager.

Will is absolutely right – the current disarray among our GOP opponents here in WA-04 could present a big opportunity for our campaign to flip this district blue.

[Can you take a moment to share your thoughts with me on the current state of our race? I really appreciate your input!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040421/335429687/-1998012771?refcode=DW_EM_SV_90DO_220316_1_2&refcode2=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=1si1PjJqi8YcaZd70pRQaHcF3SB+JGCEzZFG6HGzYQtfg0TnUjj3stNQgSqREl/t&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFiMTA2ZS01NGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLSrRA8ta9tu68sJRxjrfNTh_zU7Kb5qbtArbFVzV0s=&emci=44baf403-aea3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)

– Doug

_Forwarded message from Will DeMarco:_

As Doug’s Campaign Manager, I wanted to reach out with an update on where things stand in our race to flip Washington’s Fourth District from red to blue.

Despite a long history of Republican control in our district, it’s clear that **the GOP is in disarray** , with Rep. Dan Newhouse facing a crowded primary from other Republicans like Trump-favorite Loren Culp and uber-conservative Brad Klippert.

**The divisions among Republicans have put our race on the national radar as one of the biggest pick-up opportunities for Democrats – but, we want to hear where you stand.**

[Please take a moment to fill out our Campaign Strategy Survey and share your thoughts:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040422/335429688/-1998012771?refcode=DW_EM_SV_90DO_220316_1_2&refcode2=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=1si1PjJqi8YcaZd70pRQaHcF3SB+JGCEzZFG6HGzYQtfg0TnUjj3stNQgSqREl/t&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFiMTA2ZS01NGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLSrRA8ta9tu68sJRxjrfNTh_zU7Kb5qbtArbFVzV0s=&emci=44baf403-aea3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040423/335429689/-1998012771?refcode=DW_EM_SV_90DO_220316_1_2&refcode2=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=1si1PjJqi8YcaZd70pRQaHcF3SB+JGCEzZFG6HGzYQtfg0TnUjj3stNQgSqREl/t&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFiMTA2ZS01NGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLSrRA8ta9tu68sJRxjrfNTh_zU7Kb5qbtArbFVzV0s=&emci=44baf403-aea3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)**
---
_250 Responses Needed_
Here’s where we are:
* **FIRST:** Lore Culp and Brad Klippert announced their campaigns to challenge Dan Newhouse from the right.
* **THEN:** Donald Trump weighed in, endorsing right-wing extremist Culp for the seat.
* **AFTER THAT:** Many Republicans in the district rejected Trump’s endorsement, backing Klippert instead.
* **SO NOW:** Our chances of flipping this district from red to blue may have just increased dramatically.

[But we need to hear from Doug’s supporters – please take our survey to weigh in!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43040424/335429690/-1998012771?refcode=DW_EM_SV_90DO_220316_1_2&refcode2=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=1si1PjJqi8YcaZd70pRQaHcF3SB+JGCEzZFG6HGzYQtfg0TnUjj3stNQgSqREl/t&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFiMTA2ZS01NGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLSrRA8ta9tu68sJRxjrfNTh_zU7Kb5qbtArbFVzV0s=&emci=44baf403-aea3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=811b106e-54a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)

Thank you for taking the time!

Will DeMarco
Campaign Manager
Doug White For Congress

Will is absolutely right – the current disarray among our GOP opponents here in WA-04 could present a big opportunity for our campaign to flip this district blue. – Doug Forwarded message from Will DeMarco: As Doug’s Campaign Manager, I wanted to reach out with an update on where things stand in our race to flip Washington’s Fourth District from red to blue. Despite a long history of Republican control in our district, it’s clear that the GOP is in disarray , with Rep. Dan Newhouse facing a crowded primary from other Republicans like Trump-favorite Loren Culp and uber-conservative Brad Klippert. The divisions among Republicans have put our race on the national radar as one of the biggest pick-up opportunities for Democrats – but, we want to hear where you stand. | | 250 Responses Needed Here’s where we are: FIRST: Lore Culp and Brad Klippert announced their campaigns to challenge Dan Newhouse from the right. THEN: Donald Trump weighed in, endorsing right-wing extremist Culp for the seat. AFTER THAT: Many Republicans in the district rejected Trump’s endorsement, backing Klippert instead. SO NOW: Our chances of flipping this district from red to blue may have just increased dramatically. Thank you for taking the time! Will DeMarco Campaign Manager Doug White For Congress | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: The world's bullies are emboldened
body:
the outlook is not good
---
| | | | | | Volume 34 | March 16, 2022
---
|
---
| The world's bullies are emboldened.
---
| | |
---|---
|
As if the situation in Ukraine wasn't tragic enough, now Iran is firing missiles on Iraq, just steps away from the U.S. Consulate there.

China has amped its aggressive rhetoric, with that government warning the world of the "worst consequences" to anyone supporting Taiwan's military.

And in Ukraine, Russia has attacked a military range close to the border of Poland, where U.S. troops were training Ukrainian forces just a short time ago. And, a U.S. journalist was shot and killed at a Russian checkpoint.

Why are these leader posturing so? Because as demonstrated by the botched removal of troops from Afghanistan last year, America appears to be weak militarily, and has gutless leadership. Because of our lack of energy independence and our diminished military strength.

The Heritage Foundation has issued its [2022 Index of U.S. Military Strength](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001epN7pVD8e48FWlcT04XTMXZvUZTr3sd23kSDenWjR-kSEcr9mPT_HbkSgkg4PrEdfr4DHGorDxMnb7tPak346psaXi18l14xvpZ9f9elG1pwNiVENddKWmrsq-i4XanI6DHp1ogJEeEQ6ofHfJP0FbWTUxSo2bMxWrpIbywW6LHxUVSHc5glnalERBwqpwT0&c=cG_tFfrFsTv73pCtLOhqxfDaWLhUHnVl4ICsUrI_8rR7Cb0aehie8A==&ch=nj9uVewStOxZXatwS-o7JYCSDoeSim72FPWws2kMIOafpcTEUuSRqA==) and the outlook is not good. Several branches of the armed services were ranked marginal to weak. The Army, it said, remains "weak" in capacity with only 62 percent of the force it should have. The Navy is marginally trending toward weak because it desperately needs a larger fleet of 400 ships, but current and forecasted levels of funding will prevent this from occurring for the foreseeable future. The Air Force, the index shows, is weak because it is not mission ready and its fleet is aging, in addition to other challenges.
| | |
---|---
|
Only the Marine Corps is considered to be strong because of its ability to modernize and its readiness. However, as the index states, it is hamstrung by a lack of funding and old equipment.

The government's job is to protect the American people. I support funding our military in the strongest ways and fortifying our forces, so we are a formidable nation--one respected for its strength.

Send me to Congress so I can refocus priorities that make our country strong. Together we will deter foreign leaders from attempting any threat against us, and sleep well at night knowing we are once again respected as a world leader.
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001epN7pVD8e48FWlcT04XTMXZvUZTr3sd23kSDenWjR-kSEcr9mPT_HV-IAvY0UyopJvmKdgyHUkezFdc-E1nRRC1Xi6Ek_qeXKPRHUGcA2jo8tU_Cjf-4PB9IkZdiR-mRxTkC4xVlQLw3b4n9k4xwcgXqhf8lEJGRam9fY6y-mAB-ZKeaDbicouYZkm30iXmafx7rmlTJH5ezRQ0iD7JZpsaJvmK5b29M&c=cG_tFfrFsTv73pCtLOhqxfDaWLhUHnVl4ICsUrI_8rR7Cb0aehie8A==&ch=nj9uVewStOxZXatwS-o7JYCSDoeSim72FPWws2kMIOafpcTEUuSRqA==)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
It's been a busy week on the campaign trail.
Erik appeared on the radio with Peter Boyles and Jimmy Lakey (hear the interviews at the link below).

County Assemblies are in full swing and Erik is speaking at them. He impressed crowds in Teller and Park counties on Saturday, and plans for a presentation at the Jefferson County assembly this coming Saturday.

Last night, he participated in his fourth debate at the event hosted by Mountain Republicans and Tea Party 285 held at "The Barn" in Evergreen. The energy level was high and Erik pulled 40% of the vote in the straw poll.

Check the upcoming events at the bottom of this newsletter and find where to join the fun with Erik.
| | [Check out Erik's Radio and Podcast appearances](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001epN7pVD8e48FWlcT04XTMXZvUZTr3sd23kSDenWjR-kSEcr9mPT_HRGcwzW2FWWE3qlkw72jxP1sMwML10RPyqLAquU2LU-JIpXEal0mRjv9LJk8shFVpPe49J5uee3ia3WEHL6qpykYaxw5ra8GRVjmKlHuBFLv_c8sNPMs06E=&c=cG_tFfrFsTv73pCtLOhqxfDaWLhUHnVl4ICsUrI_8rR7Cb0aehie8A==&ch=nj9uVewStOxZXatwS-o7JYCSDoeSim72FPWws2kMIOafpcTEUuSRqA==)

| | |

| A True Grass-Roots Campaign
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: Do you have my six?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. **_"Their rematch is widely considered the most competitive congressional race in Minnesota."_**

Peter,

Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, **I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders.**

So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. [**Today, I’m asking for you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=81c06e47fa33404aa43c27edaa4b7bb5&_e=nmEsisUC1ukJl3uxqlXVBCgq6U2J7EJ4Hh8Sm-UhJiw5I35XnXoETl3tzsgpmduKjWwP4niQ332qZ25WcRY9ypilUJs1vOPjkB_4PGko0opGDkpiJZmhYp5A-pAu7H6pwSSvk_a6RsUngRMtPSKwF9cE-St2E1C0cvRaWDPCjPbWVuphhb7cwEzdjtGCqdnboy2S32GxBrPKyjZkDobHKpcgo01fO-8rbCqOJgMuWXCWXck1ddVSzua_BmBZQmonxLelOLITeiHqGtECRp248jiTDDDij2e24UNVGK1Urd8udIcJkM8O5o5E-gb6djvZVcPk3Mz7gZcRRg5KArGVlJC9uKlKPP52yuslSxq1viVKK2oFJc4o0rgDcUgGGed4)

[**In 2020,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=81c06e47fa33404aa43c27edaa4b7bb5&_e=nmEsisUC1ukJl3uxqlXVBCgq6U2J7EJ4Hh8Sm-UhJiw5I35XnXoETl3tzsgpmduKjWwP4niQ332qZ25WcRY9ypilUJs1vOPjkB_4PGko0opGDkpiJZmhYp5A-pAu7H6pwSSvk_a6RsUngRMtPSKwF55ckDdWgy-Ss5Q6BJu0k_k9UlOJq0z1lyp6vV1QBclQBfFX1cXCIUolTBI8bk3P2OARMJt4LGRse_nK2POtCgiQB-HColK14BT_iftFqIwBQywCbvCgPqIFCEmChlPxHrN7b29z1I8hYlt-WfdRrMAtmQt1OEjPRKOsHGxtwG3ovfzT6ck57d_1BDjzKitWSPMLZQOPAG-uK8VpxO5agRu-beauUpRN1xgYQc19vG2-) I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. **Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent.** For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year.

But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.**Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us.**

I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C.

[**I’m coming to you today with a humble request: would you be able to spare a dollar or two to help me make sure that this time our campaign doesn’t come up short of victory?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=81c06e47fa33404aa43c27edaa4b7bb5&_e=nmEsisUC1ukJl3uxqlXVBCgq6U2J7EJ4Hh8Sm-UhJiw5I35XnXoETl3tzsgpmduKjWwP4niQ332qZ25WcRY9ypilUJs1vOPjkB_4PGko0opGDkpiJZmhYp5A-pAu7H6pwSSvk_a6RsUngRMtPSKwF33Ilo6McE8nK0e_V_EH98pBRGe49Bh87y0_pDDKL-hFdCE6CM9ZmrSEDAJUsH4TAZYJmiPbJrLYjjqyLtaLHgwRBpkFCV6kTo4uHXL_RUcXz3oOWMHSPMOhr-n0XeoIJOG5dlgBP4AVEW9vtmAONxcafwuISr6-g_6W3iUro2GjdwAyVfFB6bzg21za6Ad7Vryxs23oy2QPIxtAAOHvdhWAeiykdg47CdCrifxmEhrZ)

With just five seats needed to take control, we have to PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY.

I know that saving America from the socialist Democrats extends far beyond what I can do on the front lines in Washington, but I also know that we can’t afford to keep our country in the hands of people who HATE AMERICA.

The radical Left is on the verge of destroying the very country that I —and so many others— have sacrificed and even laid down their lives for. We must retake the House, it’s our only option if we want a country to leave to the next generation.

That’s why I need your help today, Peter. subject: Mike DeWine is willing to risk the lives of Ohioans to appease the gun lobby
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| **BREAKING:** DeWine signs law removing training, background check, permitting requirement to conceal carry -- _Ohio Capital Journal_
This week, Mike DeWine signed Senate Bill 215 into law, selling out law enforcement officers and Ohio families in order to keep the gun lobby happy. Make no mistake -- DeWine broke his promise to voters to ‘do something’ to combat the threat of gun violence in Ohio.

It's clear DeWine is no longer fit to serve as governor -- _especially_ if he's willing to put countless lives on the line to curry favor with his own party and gun manufacturers.

We don't yet know who the Democratic nominee for Governor will be, but we do know we have to do everything in our power to build the resources to make sure we have a Democratic governor come November.

clean_body: Preparing to close out the FIRST FEC quarter of 2022. | Peter, It’s not enough to just flip the 50-50 Senate from Kamala, we need to ensure our NEW Republican majority is a pro-Trump majority. That’s why I became the National Chair of Navy SEAL and MAGA warrior Eric Greitens’ must-win U.S. Senate campaign – the race for the 1 SEAT needed to END Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority. But I’ll be honest, with the election year’s FIRST FEC quarter nearing an end, we’re pacing $33,150 behind on our goal, and March’s mid-month deadline is TONIGHT. Peter, there are far too many feckless RINOs in the Senate today... ...Too many who abandoned President Trump when it mattered most, and too many who have caved to the radical Left at every turn. Taking back our country requires taking back the Senate in 2022 with a pro-Trump majority, but building a pro-Trump Senate requires America First leaders like Eric. That’s why as we approach tonight’s critical deadline, I’m counting on the help of grassroots patriots like YOU to help me reach our goal. body:

| Peter, We wanted to take a second to thank everyone for the outpouring of support for John's message earlier today. This campaign is fighting an uphill battle against an outdated and backward establishment — **and we're so glad to have supporters like you in our corner.** If you haven't already, we hope you take a moment to read John's note and, if you are able, pitch in whatever you can to help us fight back and ensure John has the resources to lead our state forward, not backward. | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048841/335469375/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3a9736c6-78a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTk3MzZjNi03OGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50hh3ghnWIkOGEjOPGrTxMP4Ta_OnXQNL__7OUu2DN0=)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **John King** <info@johnkingforgovernor.com>
Date: Wed, Mar 16, 2022 at 10:42 AM
Subject: They don’t think a Black candidate can win
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Peter, I want to take a moment to write to you about the recent offensive statements made by a Maryland Democratic Party official. In an article released by Axios, it was revealed that an email was sent among establishment insiders claiming that Black candidates cannot win in Maryland.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048842/335469376/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3a9736c6-78a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTk3MzZjNi03OGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50hh3ghnWIkOGEjOPGrTxMP4Ta_OnXQNL__7OUu2DN0=)
**As someone whose family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president in just three generations, I am incredibly disappointed by this backward thinking from within my own party. **
_More than disappointed, I’m tired. _
In 2022, there is no place for outdated, disproven, and outright racist ideas about the electability of leaders who look like me. Especially in a state where 44% of the voting population is people of color, this kind of backward thinking has no place in the future of the Democratic Party of Maryland – and it’s up to us to prove them wrong.
_**[So I have to ask: will you take a moment to help our campaign show folks in the establishment that we won’t tolerate racist remarks and we have what it takes to win this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048843/335469377/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3a9736c6-78a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTk3MzZjNi03OGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50hh3ghnWIkOGEjOPGrTxMP4Ta_OnXQNL__7OUu2DN0=)**_
Our campaign has received nearly 5,000 individual donations, putting us in the top tier of this election with over $2.5 million raised — including contributions from every county in the state and Baltimore City. But despite our successes, we are still being put down and underestimated because of the way I look.
Race shouldn’t be seen as a limiting factor, but so many of us have been told to stay in our place time and time again just because of our skin color. And in 2022, it’s appalling that many people still believe that there are things we can’t do.
It’s going to take everything we’ve got to overcome the misguided notion that Maryland can’t elect a Black governor. _**[Every single contribution you make — whether it’s $5 or $500 — makes a difference in our grassroots campaign to move our state forward, not backward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048844/335469378/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220316-b2_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220316&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3a9736c6-78a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTk3MzZjNi03OGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50hh3ghnWIkOGEjOPGrTxMP4Ta_OnXQNL__7OUu2DN0=)**_

clean_body: An uphill battle against an outdated and backward establishment... | = | Peter, We wanted to take a second to thank everyone for the outpouring of support for John's message earlier today. This campaign is fighting an uphill battle against an outdated and backward establishment — and we're so glad to have supporters like you in our corner. If you haven't already, we hope you take a moment to read John's note and, if you are able, pitch in whatever you can to help us fight back and ensure John has the resources to lead our state forward, not backward. | | = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: John King <info@johnkingforgovernor.com> Date: Wed, Mar 16, 2022 at 10:42 AM Subject: They don’t think a Black candidate can win To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter, I want to take a moment to write to you about the recent offensive statements made by a Maryland Democratic Party official. In an article released by Axios, it was revealed that an email was sent among establishment insiders claiming that Black candidates cannot win in Maryland. = As someone whose family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president in just three generations, I am incredibly disappointed by this backward thinking from within my own party. More than disappointed, I’m tired. In 2022, there is no place for outdated, disproven, and outright racist ideas about the electability of leaders who look like me. Especially in a state where 44% of the voting population is people of color, this kind of backward thinking has no place in the future of the Democratic Party of Maryland – and it’s up to us to prove them wrong. = Our campaign has received nearly 5,000 individual donations, putting us in the top tier of this election with over $2.5 million raised — including contributions from every county in the state and Baltimore City. But despite our successes, we are still being put down and underestimated because of the way I look. Race shouldn’t be seen as a limiting factor, but so many of us have been told to stay in our place time and time again just because of our skin color. And in 2022, it’s appalling that many people still believe that there are things we can’t do. It’s going to take everything we’ve got to overcome the misguided notion that Maryland can’t elect a Black governor. = | = Thank you, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: John Lira
subject: Reaching out personally
body:
Peter, I wanted to reach out to you personally today to tell you about a big deadline we have coming up at the end of this week.

I spoke with the team and in order to stay on track for our fundraising this month, we need your help to hit our March Mid Month Goal.
This month is CRITICAL. That’s because we’ll be hitting our first End of Quarter fundraising deadline as the official Democratic nominee in this race.

What we are able to raise this month will be public, giving pundits, the media, and especially our opponents a glimpse into our campaign. And we want to make sure our numbers match the excitement this movement has been able to create so far.

To make sure this month goes well, we need to stay on track — and that starts with hitting our March Mid Month goal of $10,000 by Sunday at midnight.

Can you help us begin to chip away at our $10,000 goal for the week by making a donation right now to ensure we can keep fighting as hard as possible? Together we can show just how powerful our movement is.

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220316?refcode=em20220316]

I appreciate every single person who has given me and this campaign their support so far. It’s the only reason we have gotten as far as we have together.

And with your help, I know we can bring our fight all the way to Washington. I’m ready to be that fighter in the halls of Congress pushing on the issues you and your family care about.

Please consider showing your support for our fight in the form of a donation right now. To hit this goal in just 4 days, we need all hands on deck! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220316?refcode=em20220316]

Let’s get to work,
John Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

name: Roger Marshall
subject: I gave truckers a tour. Then this happened.
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
96
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-email
?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf Friend — I
stand with truck drivers, not with Joe Biden’s tyrannical mandates and
bureaucracy.

So of course I was happy to give truck drivers who came
to DC as part of the People’s Convoy a tour of our nation’s Capitol.
That didn’t sit well with some folks. They tried to sic the feds on me
for giving truckers a tour. Seriously.

This kind of insanity needs
to END, and so do the mandates. If you agree, I hope you’ll help me
send the woke left a message.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf&amount=10
Please chip in just $10 right now.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf FIGHT
BACK: CHIP IN NOW » America’s truck drivers are essential workers. They
showed up every day during the pandemic to deliver essential goods,
foods, and services.

They deserve our support. Hard-working Kansans
and Americans deserve access to the Capitol. And the mandates need to
be stopped in their tracks.

I’m not going to back down to the woke
left’s hysteria and smears.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf If you
agree, I hope you’ll stand with me, and with our truck drivers, right
now.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf Senator
Roger Marshall
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/stand-with-truckers-emai
l?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf FIGHT
BACK: CHIP IN NOW »

urce=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march16hf Keep reading for a
personal message from Doc:

Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to
defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. And
that's exactly what I'm doing.

But I can't keep up the fight without
your help. We're facing an onslaught from the woke left, and Democrats
across the country are raising millions to keep their power.

I'm not
about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If you're able, I
hope you'll chip in below. Taking back the Senate in 2022 depends on
patriots like you standing with us.

-Senator Roger Marshall

##

## My story is similar to the stories of those who know the American Dream as more than a cute political talking point. Those of you who have been forged in the crucible of adversity know how important difficulties in life are to developing character. Let me share with you what that means to me.

First, you must know that the terror of socialism and communism was burned into my psyche from a tender age. My mother, brother, and aunt came to America from Eastern Europe (former Yugoslavia). They lived under and fled from communism.
Growing up, I listened to stories of how people in other parts of the world lived and I was taught why America is the greatest nation on Earth.

---
| | [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y2LupsghBHQ9FvSgiB-_ZhXySJi4NviMQXp26e0DQ89WyB95PIiG-Iji8fG_IjVfN1SztOzfLWJpcM9JuhL3cc-jIbh695m9bXPdJQAMzmhcJYH6SSkNJJsbpIbh_wSWyecBZ4OWvWpj2YXXzuMQebYIuv7r-qpL&c=6OF5zEYGoRPZh7rgUz4lC2E-FBT2Mc0XSOTl0lN0z2Yr5YeHkFkizw==&ch=Jpt3lAQ4tGtA9znMAqAnZkWwp-bNkheuhmL-CCVWDsOubQzPvT2D9A==)

### March 8 - Meridian, ID

The Plan is "Politics NOT as usual." This is a time for the Patriots to take a stand before it's too late.

---

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

clean_body: There’s an empty spot on the wall at the Ronchetti for New Mexico Campaign Headquarters here in Albuquerque. It’s just a plain, empty wall... But I have Peter, There’s an empty spot on the wall at the Ronchetti for New Mexico Campaign Headquarters here in Albuquerque. It’s just a plain, empty wall... But I have big plans for it. You see, this section of wall is in plain view from my office, and my whole team walks by it every day. We want to transform it into a Team Ronchetti Donor Wall – to showcase the names of our biggest supporters and remind the whole team of who we’re fighting for. All you have to do to get your name on the wall is chip in ANY AMOUNT right now: Get Your Name on The Donor Wall Email: Status: MISSING This is going to be a long, difficult fight. When the days get long and the team needs a boost, I want YOUR support to be what keeps us going. Having your name on this wall will make all the difference. To that end, my team created a new link for you to add your name to the wall. All you have to do is chip in $10 or more: It is my sincere hope that when the Donor Wall goes up, I’ll be seeing your name on it. The truth is, we can’t win this race without you. Your support is what keeps us going. Your name on the Donor Wall will remind myself and the whole team of your dedication and commitment. The only question now is, will you add your name? Mark Ronchetti | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. body:
We’re celebrating the only way we know how | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk4sCpPQ-q_QTvWBASpFaL5ZY-OToe097rtW-aBDE6e-yp6JuqmG2ULd61tPB5ODt2TZEVscFy9awjc8PZWLZ-yHSxWCo7rDl_W-Q9LQGNptCt_vGB8cqoxADoJUlPhHlp2aY702lPOvt0_pNKgOB25D35xwQTIDYodyNwFdzsJluqDe2Y7h6IfNZVWYTiH4BJw/3ke/EnFx7ixnSxSiQ9mcHCbbCQ/h0/7A1U6_kaCVCT4r30Kx9S-R1bkBwKQQlCnl_8g7JZg48) Dear Team, It is shocking to say out loud, but this Sunday we will be 100 days out from our primary day on June 28th. We have achieved so much in the months since we launched back in June 2021, but there is a lot left to do. Here are a few stats:
* We made over 75,000 phone calls
* We knocked 7,000 Doors
* We collected 6x the minimum petitions needed to get on the ballot.
* We’ve received over 7,000 individual donations
* We’ve gotten press in more than a dozen national news outlets

**But the truth is, this campaign is just getting started. So we are going to celebrate 100 days the only way we know how: with a massive field mobilization.**
* [**If you live in or near IL-7, sign up to join our 100 days canvass this Sunday March 20th.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmCDdcvRnvyBt-sgvnfEYAix8q-kix3Swas9ObPP6VMS-_-qq3thWJq3L1pj6Lux1VZWg5i6-ykMxWLOHcl2-QfNZs18llEHIXg-0DHLndjKx2O8M56YWUuHhvl5fKmTeM1w_xuMriG3Q7rrBqj0kbYalCem7IbWbxCjG8rGPXP7hFg-5bzKSV1gtW_uF6jZgvNfSGs4ZDqQW-rdsedTXdg_JRZyEQ33TseKQYOGVBbaKyExfnPm84lICYXsTAUpglkn2WODT4Bh0xB3P8d4mbM9dWikGogk8F-waJt4h01rQ/3ke/EnFx7ixnSxSiQ9mcHCbbCQ/h1/TAtXEdnc878lgchXT3Xh2Minxygt10koXzgCQi5tKAM)
* [**If you live anywhere in the country, sign up to join our 99 days phone bank on Monday March 21.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlawiSfuaa28h9IbbC61XuE_4MX0PgSUrHbt4pD1Bqsv9jgeNVO_fE2b08B5oOH3AE74D3fEl_KaksB0oPG_ljGx8hrsvsFY5Ik18LGiKZ3k9O8k2zZmiNTsY6Q_iIxfauajaolM7S-pWRCL9ZP5THyVRYANRmOU-mlVXz4QWX5wuABcNxmWL9vExTnC20_2lde1h7WgGIqOIfDi43yOemrxZChbmbqT9y1nKiKYXmH6jynJXboscKmRUYbKnQ9ADX7Z3XLvMJjvIZthLI4JnnnoG1BzQzj17E7JCyefH-eIw/3ke/EnFx7ixnSxSiQ9mcHCbbCQ/h2/EzLpez-xGKzW6cUkVqN01SUhjnf2AJssfVnp49Jji24)
* [**And if you aren’t able to make either donate $100 or $10 to mark 100 days.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES5DoNb0Oz9VtXKyC1KrB-mafYEnzb_Cavo_6PfsldZHZpoFkf-PJTVkSayQQsLmdPam_lqUFiPThuXoxxbsUbithXZp0o4b775pLVV7FL7W1LhyVM0QJUJzUvzIDbWS6Yt33BpzlvIDprgfkDy0XJI6MgJsqaUDXBt-TCqavy9XXtjmDVQTJYH0nEJ_I36p81AnhNUKuRPILExap1k2bwU5fZidtR4_At51aeLE-J9H8_VEzZ0sgQJA1SXKYg55g6_pgGASpXpdENz62Ak08ajQ/3ke/EnFx7ixnSxSiQ9mcHCbbCQ/h3/V7PhK_bWodp7gfjAZidYdBIiFIBExgU0BUlkE-UNPog)

Team, in every possible way, it's go-time. This is the moment to lift the fight to a new level. We need every voice, every call, every dollar to win this together. **We already know why this election is so essential, and we know what we have to do to win. Now it’s time to do it.** See you out there, Kina Collins

See you out there, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Hello,
I am old enough to recall when Donald Trump was first impeached for holding military aid to Ukrainian President Zelensky hostage: ‘You either begin an investigation into Joe Biden or you won’t get the Javelin missiles Congress authorized.’
I’m also old enough to remember when my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, said that Trump’s behavior was perfectly fine – and voted against his removal from office.
Thankfully, we now have a President who understands the real threat Russia poses, and American Javelin missiles are currently helping Ukrainians defend themselves against the Russian tanks pouring across their border.
**We need more leaders in the Senate who will defend democracy and put the interests of America and our allies first – not partisan political gain and the whims of a deranged demagogue. Chuck Grassley has proven that’s not him.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. But grassroots contributions keep campaigns going, and I need your help today if we’re going to win.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $20,000 before midnight tonight so that we can fight back against all of McConnell’s Super PAC attacks. Right now, we’re still falling dangerously short, but there’s still time to make up the gap if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43049315/335472131/-42398318?refcode=em20220316pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE4OGFkMS03Y2E1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_jUGPFZNzP1y3NuF_-jnPyO7g0XQdypN6i3Tk0kaUU=)

Every day, members of the congressional committee investigating the attack work tirelessly to expose the truth, while GOP partisans continue to throw up roadblocks to shield Trump from being held accountable.
Now, **The** **New York Times****is reporting that Trump KNEW he lost the election** and did everything in his power – including potentially committing criminal conspiracy – to overturn it anyway.
With Trump increasingly hinting at a 2024 presidential run, it's more important now than ever that we protect the country from GOP extremists and their endless web of lies. body:
Make sure our emails reach your inbox. See details inside >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/4d38c55223ac5a68/eeac2d5124da4890c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for being a supporter of the Indiana Republican Party. We’re happy you’re part of the team!

The 2022 cycle is heating up fast, and we have a number of critical election priorities that will rely on your involvement to ensure success.

We’re working hard to reelect Senator Todd Young and to support our Republican candidates for Congress to flip the House and fire Speaker Pelosi **_once and for all_**. We’re also working to protect our strong Republican supermajorities in the statehouse.

As a subscriber to our email list, you’ll receive regular updates as we move forward, as well as have opportunities to share your opinion and get more involved.

To make sure you don’t miss any of our updates, take this one quick action today:

_Add_**[ _info_ _@indiana.gop_](mailto:info@indiana.gop "info@indiana.gop")** _to your email address book, contacts list, or safe senders list. This will help keep our emails out of your “Junk” or “Spam” folder._
Thank you, again, for being a part of our team! We’ll be in touch again soon.

Sincerely,
---
---
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

, we have the power to transform South Carolina into a state where generation after generation can thrive. A South Carolina where a person's future is brighter than their present, where young people want to stay and raise a family, and where we are all cared for, educated, and treated with dignity. That's why today, I officially filed my paperwork to run for Governor of South Carolina.
---

I am so grateful for the many friends and family members who joined me today, and it reminded me of the historical significance of this moment. Movements are always powered by the people, and as I file to be the first Black woman Governor of South Carolina, I am honored to have so many supporters from across the state who believe in my vision for our state and know that I have the track record to deliver.
---
With much gratitude, Mia

About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor.

clean_body: I just signed the official paperwork to become South Carolina's next Governor. | | , we have the power to transform South Carolina into a state where generation after generation can thrive. A South Carolina where a person's future is brighter than their present, where young people want to stay and raise a family, and where we are all cared for, educated, and treated with dignity. That's why today, I officially filed my paperwork to run for Governor of South Carolina. | Winning this election won't be easy, that's for certain. It's a good thing I'm no stranger to a fight, and I've never lost. Even when the GOP targeted my race in a swing district, I won. I've won because I counted on grassroots supporters just like you, and this election, I need you even more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: I am so grateful for the many friends and family members who joined me today, and it reminded me of the historical significance of this moment. Movements are always powered by the people, and as I file to be the first Black woman Governor of South Carolina, I am honored to have so many supporters from across the state who believe in my vision for our state and know that I have the track record to deliver. With much gratitude, Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mia for South Carolina, please .

| Friend, – I have some good news and some bad.
---
First, the bad: Last night, we fell short of our mid-month goal by **$8,845**.
---
**But now, for the good: We still have another 12 hours before we have to officially record this shortfall...**

**_...And for those next 12 hours, generous Wisconsin conservatives have offered to MATCH all contributions to help us get back on track._**

clean_body: \-------------------------- | Friend, – I have some good news and some bad. First, the bad: Last night, we fell short of our mid-month goal by $8,845. But now, for the good: We still have another 12 hours before we have to officially record this shortfall... ...And for those next 12 hours, generous Wisconsin conservatives have offered to MATCH all contributions to help us get back on track. So please, rush a contribution to help me make up this shortfall and get back on track to TAKE THE LEAD in Wisconsin’s must-win governor’s race – and your contribution will be DOUBLED. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Mon, March 14, 2022 Subject: I wish I had better news To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, There’s simply too much at stake for this FIRST quarter of 2022. When we close the books at the end of the month, you can rest assured Tony Evers will be waiting to see even the slightest sign of weakness. And if we fall short of our Q1 fundraising goal, we’ll be giving him the exact lifeline he needs in this 50-50 TOSS-UP race. But with the mid-month deadline tonight at 11:59 P.M., we're still pacing $23,390 behind. Polling continues to show Evers in deep water... Not only has Biden’s net approval rating slipped tonegative 15% in a brand-new poll, but 53% of Wisconsin voters have already said they will NOT vote to reelect Tony Evers. While this race may be a DEAD HEAT, Evers is losing ground by the day – and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas. That’s why crushing our fundraising goal for the first quarter of the election year is so critical. The ball is in our court, but by falling short this month, we’d be giving Evers the opportunity to take the upper hand. Now more than ever, I’m counting on YOUR help to ensure that doesn’t happen. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Join us on March 31st

| Dear Friend, This is former Speaker Newt Gingrich. Under the Trump administration, Americans projected strength abroad and enjoyed prosperity at home. How quickly that went away under the disastrous policies of Joe Biden and radical Democrats in Congress! Voters in Georgia's 6th Congressional District can help get our nation on the right track by sending a bold conservative trailblazer to Congress. That's why I've endorsed Jake Evans. I've known Jake literally his whole life, and he'll fight for us to restore the America First policies that Biden is trying to dismantle.

body:
I’m a conservative, not because someone told me to be. I’m a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9cklJXIMaTmpw8fKd3wQNgu9UuEwRxEOxTdtOG6Sr7xIP2r1g2fbS58zTQ-YMwdewUZ5OIxHXEI5H_u0BWmxn_FLUB_3UyLSeCwMyFPavpS6DGFKhYXqW5OCsh7RN4dTYy2emo7htoLEgc8sftH4uuShkYz-6V3hEP6CoTsM92HLT2OpGLAZ_0jG-delUWZ7Ta8P-qxUXjohhJEXUZ6GrUiwPLdcVMARECBM3_otpFR8Eg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9cldC5bnHsXcv0Qn-XTkqv5sp5OK4oPTtcBvv82YsQbaLDRsUH8i9pmAK2TNftbbLRL2vG-HD9tndGX4ShIbZhx38HJiQW9Tr1hldkim4rRz3wXVyWcU_2ahuS7vHzvNi2nj6N1uwCOQFmfISREArgtbAgr9OvVc5t9p5cFFhbhu-PD-E-tuI4hc8APNcV_5DoeUSVGLCEgnKgAaPWKNp7jgW42niveFEFVEoNxOl_J0kQ%3D%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9clAm6am_JwSSYSKf4YoKg5Xep3HCrDHNoORwF7IRWwwSdBzSwzAIDlqm5EcFu5JRl65bcJaoLiJKgw0cOED_vi6VGjHPiJtHRNPN3d09w9wILu2JsNcHnVCKrk8KUtAtGJwbaSSvyHSRnm1LkzGxHKvv0nNTVVmiPC2BJDgEMQydy8UfRasF6QgaRB5ab-hSPJ_BmWMSQc7s0O6E80ahl8e04A6m7Zk8__w8fplsUJbcQ%3D%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9cnqAITOy4z_jxWasqXM3OlVLAymFkUJ3lb_HCjqWJcxfl4b6-RC-ooB1luY7WZ9m-JfyzuFQ_ZkTIQi2DUl-DSslzbm3apYvS45kffvR6GQmhfjL-Ta2dbp7SLaJyiZmG_C9on0_YbOvP27em0YDtEAIlG3v58Xc2-t139L8s3X1M8MvXGmC1ldCiFhd5pCtaYc6R5t2Cu_xauPgaH3r-zQGnCVgAAPH-kz7BiOub6YNg%3D%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9cnWnCjfG-FGvGAwqUZ5r0TRTwr18yZiFBgN4Ps1UBe0F_bjYDfPi3axyusdu1d9k6Jssc5hlWosAVHiD76CbLO-eGnamtX4UjQsDAQAQsxrD6LuKNmlvuyebM5RqSBgCecTLWDvA0NrC2UOD37S5H2PcPNVGDQqMDVLZOC19PDtulNzp6qeKomaALsq1fARoQYR5oW2ZN7gjmlaKl-ZDIQxFumYMzEFBQmQ9K4jmnif5Q%3D%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9clMibh15II7Rbh8kZB34ih8cwYuQB-xpO0J_a0_HFRK9IQQkErE8cHcsMTdjTMVm19ZeBLQ3vsJJwgA_Yxs0Zh_wT8Kbls_Z9IsLYUme6agB00mX3D778DNlVwiOzzSf8xQ1eEVWLsXUG1nvZ6CHmGKGXcI7bOAbI9J77Hs5iTAdXDLHnG6cOTS-7YdUY3KMQMOiCjaHrZEqtKLhl_Dw64JCLL0Jj49COYb8FYmTG1ZKw%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=d2f470f8e452472d8cb183d1a65fa346&_e=tzn8Xa74NNdK_UzT1j9dWtRb3vJXVB-yjwuWw46wV4ZdzoO61JnC8QjCG2qp8TCoystzSxbmOd8QrCg2qRIrge3ijED0ni5ne1yqSOzNTHo8C70m6lBdTGpmnMAnqMdIPNFsDWddoGfyyYClD-0joBSLYmTvLtBv_RBDdQvykqcD-eXW-AnGsabTYoKoDbMaAqI5ueSBxg9a6DKRa-3CMQC9QmvLNPlTKFeoCL4V9cmfUVOr6F0z16LiqN4Pjew7-5ZukjAjtbLPbWsw-IiiuoolWZtrR4yGgoHsLpuYu3gAfXbnQhzXivb8d-rOegilA7QuX3VghGqo-9MIUtSNu65nuPWWQA3hpZ82BN5dMik_CCOm_a__19aHPHGtl7XnQpmi0uhG6NzhUdKAF4FbcdRzUwAnQxrZx-feiN5gUQrf7ZZffUYOF6ZgRt4gpr3LdfTuRbemgodsE_FBepB3SA%3D%3D)** Thank you.

Peter,

Last month, Elder for America made its first endorsement by backing Retired U.S. Army Captain and black Republican **Wesley Hunt** for Congress in Texas’ 38th District.

We’re thrilled that Capt. Hunt went on to win his primary for TX-38 on March 1 and will be fighting to win back a Republican House in November! [**With your support, we’ll be right there with him in this fight.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c860c4273ab14e9388f0acee5a279692&_e=_VASC2thG5UmaMOG2TMIqjs8y55qrBpjiMdirNO7mMcAUQZbdRgA-F7czxgHYtvKPMZsJogFVZZ62O9ZIu4oGDchyNdnpulFdUH5S1QRygOOXZU3-yopJgp2nD_-SPVfILAZjPftrfPUSXxG9J3IkAzavbD3NFnHhvut9yMlX98jexzfntr9-l8mFYfWv_r_zhbRdViO1c1_E5bQhaTYfi_9QLl12ok1_m4vw-DpS2fUMjtlzPG5JWFIPsUsc0Z-L2jLpYxF8lMCsnufD8nIhdhw8IXy7gariAeVelzkhZaqMDxK6EJBmsHrzXzizYvt3pQBEgrvxBN45A1uVBzoka8GFRQGOzq0JJBpT0xMmkFsttb49ZLkdcFslKoVO8xzshaVCAMscOy7LjwY8qcAS1MqdMm77Q-0f2nKk6VbaNQrv_xsos0mmyLfpWiTvZLh)

More endorsements in key races will be announced soon as part of our effort to help Republicans win back control of Congress and stand against Biden’s destructive agenda and failed leadership.

These candidates are doing everything in their power to win their races, but they can’t do it alone. Elder for America will be joining in each fight to help bring home wins, [**and this is where we need your support.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c860c4273ab14e9388f0acee5a279692&_e=_VASC2thG5UmaMOG2TMIqjs8y55qrBpjiMdirNO7mMcAUQZbdRgA-F7czxgHYtvKPMZsJogFVZZ62O9ZIu4oGDchyNdnpulFdUH5S1QRygOOXZU3-yopJgp2nD_-SPVfILAZjPftrfPUSXxG9J3IkAzavbD3NFnHhvut9yMlX98jexzfntr9-l8mFYfWv_r_zhbRdViO1c1_E5bQhaTYfi_9QLl12ok1_m4vw-DpS2eoD1k6Q3oUvadCtaCvSYL2n5cVspvY8o9OKI5WP2h3xxDbCjE-Xb_UfbRGCZ7BF4kKFf2GuYBr0r4oXaCl4KiqzoVLlrWZ9JBjHGLTJZlTxt_rMH3Qrb0ZQEAkpUui80EeZDlFHih-gUgodwuFunxqbRWdDvcVcCEeuXc2JWcA8WQxlfUEiPzK_kpVTbzg8b7JP5wBhazdEwerKOATZgxq)

Every dollar you donate to Elder for America will help support the restoration of Republican control of Congress and the defeat of the radical leftist agenda.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.

| | |

| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:

Hello,
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success.
From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149739&L=81433&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvZWR1Y2F0aW9uX3N1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0tlbGxpV2FyZDAzMjAyMkJlbkNhcnNvbg==) [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149739&L=81433&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvZWR1Y2F0aW9uX3N1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0tlbGxpV2FyZDAzMjAyMkJlbkNhcnNvbg==)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_
I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.**
They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.”
Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen!
At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.**
I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149739&L=81433&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvZWR1Y2F0aW9uX3N1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0tlbGxpV2FyZDAzMjAyMkJlbkNhcnNvbg==)
The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you.
I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149739&L=81433&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvZWR1Y2F0aW9uX3N1cnZleS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0tlbGxpV2FyZDAzMjAyMkJlbkNhcnNvbg==)
Thank you for your consideration.
Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| Team, as a state senator, I have watched for months as my fellow legislators in the AZ GOP have relentlessly attacked voting rights in this legislative session.

Now, all because Republicans are worried their current tactics aren’t extreme enough, the AZ GOP has launched a desperate lawsuit to try and end all early voting in Arizona. It’s ridiculous!

As I told the press, this lawsuit is just the next step in pushing Donald Trump’s lies about 2020.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3LNGdjjp_6L5R-butU81DC_GBshmIF8mx9OFUrjz3an-uPRDIBPmUmjgRCYobCJkzPJ-DfWTgEFERU1wlG-SLSm2fHPo8OtZ_L3zVMyFO-O-vWC8fntQf9spn9xtQObhETTKjpYsFxn21BCw58Y3mMqxwpOMRop6XmvuAgLOM74NbrobE6aO5gKBy0oPV0jqFeHI31aT1rSxe9quSkKC043-NE54pvoZZgpTDrea59TTTfSlqAWD9vUk2AdXTMiAkKVsy1tcgvCs_BQHq5IvqjBtb5-8GQcox24ed0XChoZeU99edIrwC8r2AQ7-AK7NpJVdYvM2RJDVJZj_fgpaXCaWfkLTOgAMN3A0uYw8f70zaS34AHcu1kVtYTZF6wqSeazUFibTskxHUgcq2iVMHxvDs6cr52Y-OZL13Xqn_iI-8CIFfySu49FR0zQj0XSeJOoa8tl7sJ7frGYglhLaf/3ke/u8GsIfF1S9aHDMkE2090sw/h1/XGp_FbspsKJbqrf8Bvgci9KdHOkGgZ7BWH509HBRoZo) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-10-million-rushing-into-arizona-2&email_referrer=email_1477213___body_1934996&email_subject=we-cannot-let-the-az-gop-end-early-voting)

clean_body: | | | This is all because Trump lost | | | Team, as a state senator, I have watched for months as my fellow legislators in the AZ GOP have relentlessly attacked voting rights in this legislative session. Now, all because Republicans are worried their current tactics aren’t extreme enough, the AZ GOP has launched a desperate lawsuit to try and end all early voting in Arizona. It’s ridiculous! As I told the press, this lawsuit is just the next step in pushing Donald Trump’s lies about 2020. | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-10-million-rushing-into-arizona-2&emailreferrer=email1477213body1934996&emailsubject=we-cannot-let-the-az-gop-end-early-voting As a state senator, I have a front-row seat to bill after bill the AZ GOP is pushing to try and satisfy Donald Trump’s lies about 2020. Republicans had no problems with early voting, PEVL, or mail-in voting before Joe Biden won AZ. But because Trump says so, they are desperately trying to end all the voting rights Arizonans first pushed for three decades ago. It’s so clear to me how important it is that we flip Arizona completely blue this November. It’s the only way we’re going to stop these attacks on our voting rights – and the rest of the AZ GOP’s nonsense. body:
The man who used to own the Delaware computer repair shop where Hunter Biden left his notorious “laptop from hell” says bankruptcy looms, as his life has been turned upside down by private citizens, tech giants, and federal agencies since the contents of the laptop became public.

| |

[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149743&L=6606&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20=)
| |

**Hunter Biden’s ‘Laptop from Hell’ Repairman Says Life Upended, Bankruptcy Looms**
| |
---
| |
---

name: Rep. Demings
subject: the road ahead isn't easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
But I'm never one to tire from a challenge
| | |
---
Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South, the youngest of seven children and in segregated schools.
It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43050501/335476421/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2674-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWQ4NjRiOS04MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jick2xUI6JADMpNv8l1lGd7kROZZBn1sbHzmipGp6M=)
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – will be easy. **But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win.**

**That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most:** [**Will you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race? Whatever you contribute will build up our resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43050502/335476422/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2674-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWQ4NjRiOS04MWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jick2xUI6JADMpNv8l1lGd7kROZZBn1sbHzmipGp6M=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Neil Shah Donated to Tim Walz & The Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Whose side is he really on? | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=845f93c591&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | |
**Neil Shah has traveled the state as a candidate that stands for our values, but does he really?**

In the past several years, Shah donated to Tim Walz and the Democrats.**** According to campaign finance reports, Shah donated **$1500 to Democrat groups in 2017 alone.**

While the Republicans and our grassroots fought hard to hold on to the slim majority in the Senate - **Shah was giving money to Democrats** who were just a single seat from taking control.

****

In 2018, Shah even donated to Tim Walz **AFTER** Jeff Johnson had been nominated as the endorsed Republican candidate for Governor.

**How can we trust someone to honor your endorsement now, if he didn't support it just four years ago?** Is Neil Shah a Democrat or just a political opportunist?

I will stand for our values and I will continue to **fight for you in St. Paul as Governor.**

**[Join with me and fellow Minnesota Conservatives by volunteering with our team!](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=bcf343de9d&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=be2c2799b1&e=9d6926af69)
**Michelle Benson **
[Candidate for Minnesota Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c28fcecc0d&e=9d6926af69)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Biden's Tik-Tok Diplomacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Joe Biden has enlisted a group of dancing teenagers to try and pass off his foreign policy blunders on to others. | |
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2a97f5a8739483ea7d83964fc7473d7&_e=aso3Uvb8Rg-IOYYlb74TJbg3FFzF0anSfBOvYREaIuqZyw_sfwtNNEjQ850RcHebuDCDnN_CtSuDtYK7AmYSTfQ0oDWzNRMcQZV8t0PPH8rUaUSZh86DxdGy4NPDoHrj3YJoqxgzHJqWS2LjCn5XFlMwrvTuI4o5t_-mCoh7-AvgRA7tw7nI-Ujeps-ImmsZ8GJY2g84CseUXKMdXEevLsn9tcw65oTIT2cHsNXgVdO2hmwlvJ7279mn7gBLGloX-G_68frKrGpKowozkBMfPMIZKmeggKZsSYL6ejT5SvcaomgXpIYnadU7DGHiJty28aNa_P58ZPtV8VoaQoqRRJ5YXXueB6DAXwuYAUl2qHUxmhKv8Or23zyzwvw7zYAE2TekLK86XpQQVn9otlOmEF1pWolhIRnpI6EkCkQUv7Q%3D)
Peter,
Remember the pitiful hashtag diplomacy of the Obama Administration? Joe Biden has taken it a sad step forward with Tik-Tok diplomacy. Joe Biden has enlisted a group of dancing teenagers to try and pass off his foreign policy blunders onto others. It's sad and pathetic.

I talked with Jesse Watters about Biden's Tok-Tok diplomacy. Watch the clip below.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2a97f5a8739483ea7d83964fc7473d7&_e=aso3Uvb8Rg-IOYYlb74TJbg3FFzF0anSfBOvYREaIuqZyw_sfwtNNEjQ850RcHebuDCDnN_CtSuDtYK7AmYSTfQ0oDWzNRMcQZV8t0PPH8rUaUSZh86DxdGy4NPDoHrj3YJoqxgzHJqWS2LjCn5XFlMwrvTuI4o5t_-mCoh7-AvgRA7tw7nI-Ujeps-ImmsZ8GJY2g84CseUXKMdXEevLqpMoKgOFqGD3vG7gEZpliEcWjAMl4o9E9_f9lh9frb1lsFlFOx6isfsM78gY73y49_d8suDytZn_mTe1H7RMTZIPFmfkdzSX7VESPYgMUsp-Ihzgi9hyOEsw1dhjRhIPD4rkCb5E4hDT09IrHRb1_p_EtPYXcbYiXVUiqYlAcgYavPdYHHnxSS4dt-eJyJPUbR08Hm6yFQQ6w7UwxlmPGY%3D)
**EXCERPT FROM THE TRANSCRIPT** :
_"__This shows just how incompetent President Biden is, Jesse — that now he's asking teenagers to do his job for him. I mean think about that for a second. This is the President of the United States. It's bad enough that he's going around begging dictators to give us oil because he won't allow Americans to produce our own energy, but now he's going to actual teenagers and begging them on a chinese-owned social media app to do his job. I mean, I've never seen anything like this. You cannot make this stuff up!"_

name: Mckayla
subject: I want to take a moment to thank you for receiving these emails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **I want to take a moment to thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for receiving these emails from our campaign.** We send a lot of emails, we know that. And – I’m sorry – we’re probably going to be sending more in the next few weeks as we get closer and closer to the election. **The truth is, these emails are a really important part of our campaign.** We use them to tell you what’s happening and, yes, to raise money. I’m not somebody who has a huge network of wealth donors. I’m not a 40-year incumbent who can just pick up the phone and raise thousands of dollars. **I’m just a single mom from Southern Maryland who wants to do everything she can to see justice done.** I wish we could do all that without needing to raise a grotesque amount of money. I really do. But that’s not the country we live in right now. One day, it will be. **One day, we’ll look back and won’t believe how we let the rich have unfettered influence over our democracy.** **Until then, I really hope you’ll continue opening and reading our emails.** It means the world as a candidate to be out in our community knowing there’s thousands of people who have my back. Thank you, Mckayla
---

name: Dory MacMillan, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Republican insiders are questioning if their candidates can even win.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Republicans are worried about this race, which they know is a must-win if they want to take back the Senate.
#

Republicans are worried about this race, which they know is a must-win if they want to take back the Senate.
A GOP insider recently leaked audio to Politico of Donald Trump openly expressing his concerns about the Republican primary here to a room full of major GOP donors.
While they fret about our Republican opponents and their trainwreck primary, they can see Democrats are united behind Cheri — and that together we are building out a strong general election campaign. They know that we get one step closer to winning and expanding our majority every time someone pitches into our campaign.
[**Want to keep them worrying? Pitch in $3 or any amount you can to Cheri Beasley’s campaign right now. Every dollar will go directly toward our efforts to organize on the ground in North Carolina — in every community from the mountains to the coast.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220316-1-MA&refcode2=546.357359.gfZvpY&t=1&akid=546%2E357359%2EgfZvpY)

**Politico reported that there are “concerns among [Ted Budd’s] powerful backers about his prospects in a race that is key to control of the Senate.”**
They have already poured more than $11 million into this race propping up his campaign, and Donald Trump has been hosting massive fundraisers at Mar-a-Lago to dump more money into this race too.
