name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: The GOP proposal to raise taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The stakes could not be higher.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220316-803-footer-ak&t=2&akid=803%2E90090%2E8OrRrT)
Control of the Senate might come down to flipping Ohio’s open seat from red to blue — and the stakes could not be higher.
**This month one of the top Senate Republicans, Sen. Rick Scott, released a Republican tax proposal to raise taxes on nearly half of Americans.**
That’s right: Republicans want to raise taxes on as many as 100 million Americans while continuing to cut taxes for the ultra-rich and big corporations. **[To make sure we have a progressive advocate in the Senate fighting back against this far-right plan, can you rush a contribution to Morgan Harper today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29564?t=3&akid=803%2E90090%2E8OrRrT)**
According to the nonpartisan Institute on Taxation and Economic Policy, **Rick Scott’s tax plan amounts to a _tax increase on 34.4% of Ohioans._**
And that’s not all. Scott’s plan also says that when in power, the GOP will:
* Give politicians in Washington, not teachers or parents, final say over what our kids learn about our history in school.
* Ban the Census from even collecting data on people of color in this country.
* Shrink the government by 25% at a time when we need it to do more to help struggling families, not less.
* Further discriminate against LGBTQ people in government policy, taxation, and data collection.

This is our Republican opponents’ agenda: gutting the federal government and taxing the working class, disabled people, and retired people in order to enrich the wealthy at our expense.
We can’t defeat it with some middle-of-the-road equivocation by a moderate Democrat. We need a bold vision of what the government can do to help people to fight against the far-right crony capitalism of the current GOP.
**[That’s why Morgan is running for Senate: To represent working people and to fight for the progress our communities need. If you’re with us, chip in $5 before our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29564?t=4&akid=803%2E90090%2E8OrRrT)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29570?refcode=em20220316-803&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=803%2E90090%2E8OrRrT)**
Rick Scott’s plan has made it clear that the GOP is seeking to use culture war tropes and scare tactics to divide us from our neighbors — in order to exploit us and enrich their corporate friends. **If we come together, we can beat them.**
Thanks for being on our team.
Team Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220316-803-footer&t=24&refcode2=803_90090_8OrRrT&akid=803%2E90090%2E8OrRrT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=803%2E90090%2E8OrRrT)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: A Record Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
| [ ](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziook9GM6ZCJmtpUFYCf-NUON&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, By any account, we’ve been shaking things up at the State Capitol. Now, there are a lot of people desperately trying to stop us from doing the same at the U.S. Capitol. We have to respond with a record day. [Here is the link to donate](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=2), but I want to say a few words about what we’re dealing with. In addition to the personal attacks from Newsom – accusing me of "letting people die” and helping “petro-dictatorships” – now the national Democrats (known as the DCCC) have fully turned their fire on us. According to one DCCC piece, I am a “dangerous extremist.” Another says that because I “oppose vaccine mandates, Kiley is a threat to the voters.” Another adds: “one wonders how much more rejection Kiley can take before he buckles.” It would almost be funny, if there weren’t so much money behind this nonsense. Rest assured, there’s no sign of “buckling." To the contrary, I am more fired up for this fight than I’ve ever been. To truly fight back, [I need you by my side.](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=3) The DCCC is even now promoting another Republican candidate, who’s been convinced to stay in the race despite losing the Republican Party endorsement. Their obvious goal is to fracture support and give the Democrat a chance to steal this seat. That would be a blow to our chances of regaining the Majority. It would also mean I could no longer fight for you, could no longer report to you from inside the Capitol. That’s one reason I really need your support today: we must unify the Republican vote. The end of March is the only official FEC deadline before voting begins, and we need[ to show as much strength as possible](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=4). To be honest, I used to hate fundraising. It’s always awkward to ask for money. I simply wanted to focus on fighting for change. But I’ve come to appreciate it as a key to returning power to the grassroots. No other campaign has thousands of citizen supporters like we do. It’s because of you – patriots willing to sacrifice for the cause – that we’ve taken command of this race. That’s not just something I’m saying. It is absolutely, 100 percent the truth. If it weren’t for your tremendous support, the swamp would just install one of their own. They still hope to do so, which is why [I need your support now more than ever](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=5). I cherish the bond I form with supporters. I sign every thank you note by hand not because I enjoy hand cramps, but because I feel a personal connection with everyone who dedicates a bit of your hard-earned money for the good of our state and country. When I see your name and that you've given what you can, it is more heartening and energizing than I can describe. It’s a thousand times more powerful than the slings and arrows cast by our opponents. Whether that’s [$50, $250, or the maximum of $2,900](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=6), your support makes the sacrifices of public life worth it. It reminds me what I’m fighting for. It empowers me to practice the kind of politics our Founders intended. An open seat in Congress comes along once a generation. It’s even rarer to have an opening in such a pivotal election year. If we allow this to slip through our fingertips, we may never have another chance. I don’t want there to be any “what ifs.” What if we’d had the resources to reach a few more voters? Could this election, could our movement, have taken a different course? [With your help, there will be no regrets](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=7). On June 7, we'll celebrate a resounding victory and begin our greatest battle yet, a fight for the America we all believe in. With humility and gratitude, Kevin p.s. Voting starts in less than two months. [Here is the link one more time.](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=8)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar16_final&n=9).

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: Rep. Sean Casten explains how we weaken Putin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Rep. Sean Casten is partnering with us to demand clean energy investments.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/congress-stop-funding-petro-dictators-casten/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&t=2&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2) Friend, Big Polluters are trying to capitalize on Putin's stunning, unprovoked invasion of Ukraine by spreading lies. Here's the simple truth: A key way to weaken oil-rich autocrats like Vladimir Putin is by investing in cheap, clean, reliable energy produced right here in the U.S. **Rep. Sean Casten agrees—that's why he's joining us to fight back against disinformation and demand we prevent future wars, protect national security, and lower energy costs by investing in clean energy ASAP.[_And your representatives need to hear it from you._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/congress-stop-funding-petro-dictators-casten/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&t=3&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4293?t=4&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2) | [CALL NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/congress-stop-funding-petro-dictators-casten/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&t=5&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2)
---
There's a lot of misinformation out there about Russia, fossil fuels, and energy costs. So let's set the record straight:
Will more oil and gas drilling in the U.S. help us depend less on Russia in the long term? **No.**
What about just in the short term? **No.**
And anyone who is suggesting otherwise is, well, lying to you.
Investing more in fossil fuels means buying into a volatile global energy economy on which Russia exerts huge influence, no matter where the oil comes from. The only way to lessen Putin's influence is by transitioning away from the source of his petro-state power.
And thanks to climate leaders like Rep. Casten, Congress has already done a lot of the work. The House passed $555 billion over four months ago. Every Democrat in the Senate is ready to negotiate these climate investments. It's time to get these funds out to our communities so we can undercut petro-dictators like Putin.
[_**That's why it's imperative that you take action right now. Call your representatives to make sure they hear our message loud and clear.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/congress-stop-funding-petro-dictators-casten/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&t=6&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2)
[CALL NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/congress-stop-funding-petro-dictators-casten/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&source=ema_2022-03-16_casten_call_&t=7&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2)
---
Sincerely,
Lena Moffitt
Chief of Staff, Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=12954%2E53494%2EnpWDy2). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: Team LBR
subject: Our last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Who are the "Trump 5?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/email20220316 [secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220316]
Team,
There are five members of the House – Cindy Axne (IA-03), Matt Cartwright (PA-08), Jared Golden (ME-02), Andy Kim (NJ-03), and myself – that have something special in common: we all won districts that Donald Trump won in 2020, which means the five of us outperformed President Biden and other Democrats in our districts, which all lean Republican.
In the past, we’ve called ourselves The Trump Five, but we’ve been thinking that name could use a bit of an update.
That is why we’re called The Formidable Five.
secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220316 [secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220316]
Out of 435 members and 222 Democrats, we’re the only five that won a 2020 Trump district who are running for reelection. It shows that we have earned the trust of each of our districts by working day and night on bipartisan solutions to some of our toughest issues.
But, it also means that we are each top targets as Republicans look to overturn the slim Democratic House majority.
We have our work cut out for us, but all five of us have only known tough elections. We will each need to be strategic as we organize on the ground, purchase advertisements, and build up our grassroots volunteer networks. That’s why I’m asking if you will chip in $15, $25, or anything you can spare. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220316]
The Formidable Five stick together, so your contribution will be split between the five of us as we each campaign in our districts and work to keep the House. Thanks for considering it – and thanks in advance for your support.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220316]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Peter,

donation this month.)

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220316?refcode=em20220316-1656&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1656_346206_FxOhA3&akid=1656%2E346206%2EFxOhA3 ]DONATE NOW →

It’s inspiring to see how energized our movement is to turn Kentucky blue
and end this chapter of divisive, dangerous politics that Rand Paul has
been leading in the U.S. Senate. And with just 62 days to go until Primary
Day — our work is only ramping up.

All the work ahead — voter outreach, organizing, reaching new audiences,
traveling to places in our Commonwealth to meet people where they’re at —
isn’t possible without the support that grassroots donors like you
provide. Full stop.

That’s why hitting goals like our $13,000 mid-month goal is so important,
especially during a critical month like March, which is our first
end-of-quarter deadline month this year.

this grassroots movement to transform our future?

Thank you,
Peter,

"Usually, if you find yourself having dinner on a boat with a Navy SEAL, you'd suspect something BIG was about to happen."
| |
> _**Don’t Miss the Boat!**
>
> Get onboard the ship to victory with Ed Thelander, candidate for Maine's 1st Congressional District, at DiMillo’s on the Water in Portland.
> Saturday, March 26th ~ 5:00-6:00 ~ Sponsors Hour
> 6:00-8:00 ~ Ticket holders
>
> Special Guests include Yasin Ahmady, a.k.a. General Joe Gomez, Afghan Freedom Fighter during the Russian invasion of his homeland, and interpreter for SEAL Teams and Special Forces during Operation Enduring Freedom Afghanistan.
>
> **\- ALSO - **
>
> Hear remarks by 8th generation Maine lobsterman Jason Joyce. Jason brought the struggles of the Maine lobster industry to the national spotlight when he addressed the Republican National Convention in 2020. Jason will provide an update on state and federal regulations that threaten the lobstering way of life, and the ongoing clash with the offshore industrial wind industry. Jason will also show a preview of his son Andrew's excellent documentary, "The Maine Reset", a beautiful yet alarming look at the many threats facing this industry which is so integral to Maine._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Ducey?=
subject: WSJ: A Big Taxpayer Victory in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ducey for Governor
body:
The state will soon have a flat 2.5% income tax, after flirting with 8%. | |
---
| | |
---
| | | Hello,
---
| Governor Ducey and our Arizona Legislature have been fighting to make personal income taxes flatter and fairer, passing the lowest flat tax in the nation last year. And all the while, they have been battling an unconstitutional tax hike that would have hurt small business owners.

Their recent successes on both fronts are making Arizona a great place to live, work, and grow a business.

The _Wall Street Journal_ editorial board wrote this week about what this means for Arizona taxpayers getting to keep more of what they earn. Read the full column below or [online](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=9fc6f08e54&e=55d4e2f84a).
---
|
---
|
# [A Big Taxpayer Victory in Arizona](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=19306b5e72&e=55d4e2f84a)
_The state will soon have a flat 2.5% income tax, after flirting with 8%._ By The Editorial Board

Arizonans who fled California for sunnier tax climes can breathe easier after a court ruling that has saved the day from a punitive 8% top state tax rate.

A state judge on Friday struck down Arizona’s Proposition 208, which placed a 3.5% surtax on incomes above $250,000, or $500,000 for joint filers. The surtax passed narrowly in a 2020 referendum that sought to raise hundreds of millions of dollars for public schools. But the surtax would also have blown past the cap on education spending in the state constitution.

Nixing the surtax means Arizona will soon have a flat tax of 2.5% on individual incomes, the lowest flat rate among states with an income tax. Gov. Doug Ducey slashed the previous 4.5% top rate in his 2022 budget, and the flat 2.5% rate will phase in by 2024. If the 4.5% rate and the surtax had stayed in place, a combined 8% top rate would have given Arizona the 10th-highest state income tax rate.

Judge John Hannah hewed to the letter of the law in reviewing the surtax. “School district spending more likely than not will exceed the predicted spending limit in 2023,” he wrote. That’s an understatement. Invest in Arizona, the advocacy group behind the surtax, said its proposal would raise at least $253 million for schools that year, pushing spending far above the likely limit.

The state Supreme Court ruled last year that money raised by the tax couldn’t be rebranded as “grants” outside the spending cap, or be put aside to be spent later. It remanded the case for Judge Hannah to rule on the spending cap issue, and he said the constitution didn’t allow the surtax.

Arizona’s teachers union argued that ending the surtax would rob funding from hard-up school districts. State Superintendent Kathy Hoffman agreed after Friday’s ruling, asking “how will we remain competitive when our neighboring states have increased teacher pay?”

How many raises does she want? The courts held that the spending cap couldn’t be surpassed by referendum. But last month the Republican-controlled Legislature voted to suspend the cap temporarily, letting schools claim an extra $1.2 billion appropriated last year. Funding increases in recent years are on top of a 20% raise that Arizona teachers gained after striking in 2018.

Tax competition has helped Arizona draw residents and businesses from neighbors like California, but the surtax would have sent the Grand Canyon State down a Golden State path. The tax’s $250,000 income threshold made it a particular burden on small businesses that pay taxes under the individual code.

The episode is a reminder of the value of constitutional guardrails on state taxes and spending. Arizona voters in 1980 placed limits on school spending through a ballot initiative, preventing unrestrained budget bloat. Taxpayers in other states, take note.

clean_body: The state will soon have a flat 2.5% income tax, after flirting with 8%. | | | | | | | | Hello, | Governor Ducey and our Arizona Legislature have been fighting to make personal income taxes flatter and fairer, passing the lowest flat tax in the nation last year. And all the while, they have been battling an unconstitutional tax hike that would have hurt small business owners. Their recent successes on both fronts are making Arizona a great place to live, work, and grow a business. The Wall Street Journal editorial board wrote this week about what this means for Arizona taxpayers getting to keep more of what they earn. Read the full column below or . | | The state will soon have a flat 2.5% income tax, after flirting with 8%. By The Editorial Board Arizonans who fled California for sunnier tax climes can breathe easier after a court ruling that has saved the day from a punitive 8% top state tax rate. A state judge on Friday struck down Arizona’s Proposition 208, which placed a 3.5% surtax on incomes above $250,000, or $500,000 for joint filers. The surtax passed narrowly in a 2020 referendum that sought to raise hundreds of millions of dollars for public schools. But the surtax would also have blown past the cap on education spending in the state constitution. Nixing the surtax means Arizona will soon have a flat tax of 2.5% on individual incomes, the lowest flat rate among states with an income tax. Gov. Doug Ducey slashed the previous 4.5% top rate in his 2022 budget, and the flat 2.5% rate will phase in by 2024. If the 4.5% rate and the surtax had stayed in place, a combined 8% top rate would have given Arizona the 10th-highest state income tax rate. Judge John Hannah hewed to the letter of the law in reviewing the surtax. “School district spending more likely than not will exceed the predicted spending limit in 2023,” he wrote. That’s an understatement. Invest in Arizona, the advocacy group behind the surtax, said its proposal would raise at least $253 million for schools that year, pushing spending far above the likely limit. The state Supreme Court ruled last year that money raised by the tax couldn’t be rebranded as “grants” outside the spending cap, or be put aside to be spent later. It remanded the case for Judge Hannah to rule on the spending cap issue, and he said the constitution didn’t allow the surtax. Arizona’s teachers union argued that ending the surtax would rob funding from hard-up school districts. State Superintendent Kathy Hoffman agreed after Friday’s ruling, asking “how will we remain competitive when our neighboring states have increased teacher pay?” How many raises does she want? The courts held that the spending cap couldn’t be surpassed by referendum. But last month the Republican-controlled Legislature voted to suspend the cap temporarily, letting schools claim an extra $1.2 billion appropriated last year. Funding increases in recent years are on top of a 20% raise that Arizona teachers gained after striking in 2018. Tax competition has helped Arizona draw residents and businesses from neighbors like California, but the surtax would have sent the Grand Canyon State down a Golden State path. The tax’s $250,000 income threshold made it a particular burden on small businesses that pay taxes under the individual code. The episode is a reminder of the value of constitutional guardrails on state taxes and spending. Arizona voters in 1980 placed limits on school spending through a ballot initiative, preventing unrestrained budget bloat. Taxpayers in other states, take note. | "GET THE LINK" | | Please help us get the word out! name: Nan Whaley HQ
subject: Will you volunteer to help change Ohio?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Team,
As we get closer to Election Day this year, the most effective messenger to Ohio voters isn’t going to be TV ads or a letter in your mailbox.
**It’s you.**
Our friends, family, and neighbors are the most important messengers in our lives – we know and trust them. You are the best person to reach out to your community and get the word out about why it’s so vital to get to the polls this year and vote out Mike DeWine – and elect Nan Whaley as our next governor.
**It’s why right now we’re starting a list of people who are ready to roll up their sleeves and get to work to elect Nan Whaley and Cheryl Stephens – and we’d love to see your name on that list.**
**[We’ve got a lot of work to do this year to get the word out and ensure that we’re helping every Ohio voter get to the polls. If you’re in, join our Facebook group of grassroots supporters and we’ll keep you posted with upcoming volunteer opportunities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051166/335489368/1267062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTM1ZTg0MS04OWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmlbOefSm52hNu9i0-zdab8OUyd3gT7EYVdZoHRX1E0=&emci=aecce9e7-88a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7e35e841-89a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051167/335489369/1267062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTM1ZTg0MS04OWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmlbOefSm52hNu9i0-zdab8OUyd3gT7EYVdZoHRX1E0=&emci=aecce9e7-88a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7e35e841-89a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051169/335489371/1267062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTM1ZTg0MS04OWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmlbOefSm52hNu9i0-zdab8OUyd3gT7EYVdZoHRX1E0=&emci=aecce9e7-88a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7e35e841-89a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)
Mike DeWine may have his special interest friends behind him. He might have dark money ready to prop him – and his record of corruption – up.
But with **YOUR** help we can get the truth out and spread the word to Ohioans that Ohio deserves better – and then we can elect Nan Whaley and Cheryl Stephens to clean up the mess.

Dear Peter,

The prices at the pump are getting outrageous!

I just filled up my tank and _saw my total soaring higher and higher._

I remember paying around $30 to fill my tank under the Trump Administration when our energy industry was flourishing.

Those were the days.

Now, we are all fully experiencing _**Bidenflation**_ — _**and this pain even puts tax hikes to shame!
**_
_**Even natural gas has risen from $1.75 to $4.89**_ Dollars per Million BTU. That’s a 279% increase.

But the Biden Administration doesn't care. They'll make us GIVE UP EVERYTHING for their Green New Deal utopia.

_**To Biden, it's our fault if we don't PAY UP and BUY a $55,000 electric vehicle. **_

I won't stand by and watch **Biden's** **gas and energy price-hikes harm America.** That’s why we are out in front opposing his efforts to decarbonize our nation and eliminate our energy independence.

Just two weeks ago, my Office argued at the U.S. Supreme Court against Biden’s costly climate agenda.

We are currently LEADING on several key legal initiatives to push back against Biden’s attacks on our energy security. _**When we succeed, it will keep our energy and gas prices LOW.**_
[
_**Will you take a stand with me and join our fight against this overreaching administration? >>**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMeZNvay271S9j45X5JTCVBiw-3D-3D8sTt_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6TUdVUuqQHi-2Faed5bjMOkLA-2FaUzYxmqxH2n1begLtxXgzc2zqyVMJDXa0a3wZhKpVBMNFgIAGd40aMpdDos2ZXiZDOMDvfOcIMu-2FHC-2B57MiGS7ooW4zeeQO8Ms8QbRTC3DHVMfLygW8SvmIfuUyZFpy6VvYRjzaPRBt8BgFXv3c9evyc3bessDEenTKCjan-2F7CcWX1lBAVxCww-2FgXZyXGG5iyO9ng-2BIFu73wco4Xt91QUX59GFX1wyHxBHDge8EuLi9Jbq-2BpcarpElnQ9AxJGnA-2FdfBQPUPn-2FTDTAwgenOPpjGHs1EFjs7sclFLC4IsG8Ap2UjuQAMNZ0cz0hIn1RvbarJZ-2BUGzpZcVwNaE-2FWcILKJmD2oEI74NM0fIKlLrwzTl-2F2lr9CuoJV-2F7k7sEsRHvm8Zld3zfIE1qB72uP-2FA4MkXNFW2w91Wu0Li-2BGGfZpiw2dY3T0cVvTzS5RPeldk-2FaidXjOPLLExpeRxlpgxmIiovCuZ4-2FldFDYvkkH1MqCmq3C0nBA-2Bq-2FXMFIaMiM5TtudKo3x6go7juFko3FoGz-2BNUWfcMfTecDs7i8M4Xf1rpxMEJDwFb6lGaMsBk7r6rtl8utbViQtMP7-2FjiX0lC1xXJhBT3KV0WLMy1mczTSPrUyaz8iAck62ANyqS1nxl7VT47EhWYjLpnHi6UVCAM3Cg2oBhx0qDHjtMTBkNesEbPPBcQhpPUmDrTgLzNHFs8ZlTYxIFCkAXV02n5jKzPKo1s6GyfvzZH2fPgmhVjHnE3P9VbQeljIRB-2ByIccxtA5IaBf50pMcdVxxMbzYkIXnUIrPlbHdQlGZ-2FCB7T4UpPP3vw4RcaBX4rAteptQ-2BOT5LQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | This morning, I filled up my tank and watched as my total soared up higher and higher. Dear Peter, The prices at the pump are getting outrageous! I just filled up my tank and saw my total soaring higher and higher. I remember paying around $30 to fill my tank under the Trump Administration when our energy industry was flourishing. Those were the days. Now, we are all fully experiencing Bidenflation — and this pain even puts tax hikes to shame! Even natural gas has risen from $1.75 to $4.89 Dollars per Million BTU. That’s a 279% increase. But the Biden Administration doesn't care. They'll make us GIVE UP EVERYTHING for their Green New Deal utopia. To Biden, it's our fault if we don't PAY UP and BUY a $55,000 electric vehicle. I won't stand by and watch Biden's gas and energy price-hikes harm America. That’s why we are out in front opposing his efforts to decarbonize our nation and eliminate our energy independence. Just two weeks ago, my Office argued at the U.S. Supreme Court against Biden’s costly climate agenda. We are currently LEADING on several key legal initiatives to push back against Biden’s attacks on our energy security. When we succeed, it will keep our energy and gas prices LOW. | | | | | | You're support would be a tremendous boost to our efforts. We're working hard to make America ENERGY INDEPENDENT AGAIN, and fight Biden's efforts to import more oil from Iran and Venezuela. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 == \-

| | | Republicans are LOSING ground in the redistricting battle, and NO ONE is talking about it!

Grassroots patriots around the country need to be on high alert as Democrats redraw lines in an attempt to FLIP 11 Republican-leaning seats to safe blue districts in:
**🚨 Illinois 🚨 Nevada 🚨 New Jersey 🚨 New Mexico 🚨 New York 🚨 Oregon 🚨**
The Congressional Leadership Fund is sounding the alarms and launching an **EMERGENCY REDISTRICTING RESPONSE FUND** to shore up support for Republicans in the uphill battle to flip the House red, and we need grassroots support to counter Dems' attacks.

| | Hi Peter, As one of our loyal supporters, I know you get a lot of emails from the team updating you on the status of the race. I wanted to look past the politics to boil this race down to what it’s really about: _people_. I am ecstatic to be back on the campaign trail, meeting constituents of Michigan’s new Eleventh and learning what matters to working families in our district and beyond. I’m so proud of the work my colleagues and I have accomplished while in Congress, putting forth ideas and policies that support the progressive agenda and help make this country a better place for all. I recently received endorsements from leaders in the Democratic Caucus, including Senator Elizabeth Warren and Chairwoman Maxine Waters. Polling numbers and fundraising dollars from both my opponent and me are making headlines. All of this is important as I hit the campaign trail and work to win the new Eleventh, Peter, but it’s not everything. **For me, this campaign is about people — their lives, their jobs and their families all have a stake in this race and similar ones across the country in November.** That’s why we need representatives who aren’t afraid to get their hands dirty if it means it will improve lives in their communities. We really need people in Washington who will do the right thing rather than whatever is politically expedient. Here’s why: our very democracy is in peril. Our planet is frying. Income inequality is at century-high levels. If we want to build a just future for our children, we have to act at this critical moment. **I want to continue to be one of those folks who acts.** I’ve spent my career making ripples of change in the water — shaking up the norm and fighting for what’s right. Having one another’s backs is the only way we can make progress, Peter, and the little investment you make today can create a big difference. I am looking to you to help me out today, so I can help you when I’m reelected to Congress. [_**Can you give to my reelection campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? I would greatly appreciate your support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43044924/335452567/882283677?refcode=em_20220316_f_a_mm3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGI0MWJhMC02OGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIDUyEZ6wH4QJ5bU94NgJdN9N-DI-CfvW4KuM7_KEVE=) Let’s go!

name: Val Demings
subject: The difference between winning and losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
re: how we defeat Marco Rubio
| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend: I'm just 2 POINTS behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control –****and I'm falling short of my critical mid-month goal at the worst possible moment.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051214/335491374/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjgzNGMxNS04YWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmU-CjBlrEvRSZn9f1dlRQVCnNPJgQe8PDKeVXdh6Aw=)
I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to close this polling gap and flip Florida blue – **but** **if we don't see a surge in support by midnight tonight, we won't have a shot. Here's why:**
Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records, and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to crush our momentum. **Now, with polls showing us neck and neck, Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me.**
Republicans will spend _whatever it takes_ to protect vulnerable incumbents like Rubio, and I can't compete with their deep pockets without you. Florida's last Senate election came down to just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – so every single dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing.
**This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign, and I'm counting on your grassroots support like never before. It's the only way to keep the Senate in Democratic hands and defend our democracy from the GOP.**
**[Please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $5 right now – split between our campaign and Jacky Rosen's – to help close this gap, flip Florida blue, and EXPAND our Democratic Senate majority? We can defeat Marco Rubio and stop the GOP from retaking power, but only if we all pitch in at moments like this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051215/335491375/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjgzNGMxNS04YWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmU-CjBlrEvRSZn9f1dlRQVCnNPJgQe8PDKeVXdh6Aw=)**

clean_body: re: how we defeat Marco Rubio | | | This is urgent, friend: I'm just 2 POINTS behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control –and I'm falling short of my critical mid-month goal at the worst possible moment. = I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to close this polling gap and flip Florida blue – but if we don't see a surge in support by midnight tonight, we won't have a shot. Here's why: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records, and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to crush our momentum. Now, with polls showing us neck and neck, Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me. Republicans will spend whatever it takes to protect vulnerable incumbents like Rubio, and I can't compete with their deep pockets without you. Florida's last Senate election came down to just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – so every single dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing. This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign, and I'm counting on your grassroots support like never before. It's the only way to keep the Senate in Democratic hands and defend our democracy from the GOP. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Val Demings and Jacky Rosen: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 United States

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Checking on your 2022 supporter record before the end of the quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re getting close to our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, so we took a look at our supporter records since the start of this year. Here’s what we have on file for you:
#
Peter, we’re getting close to our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we still have a lot of ground to make up, so we took a look at our supporter records since the start of this year. Here’s what we have on file for you:
**2022 Supporter Record for Peter**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2022 Donor?:** No — not yet!**
****2022 Total:** $0
**Suggested donation:[$3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10937?refcode=em20220316-1110&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)**

_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
[**Unfortunately, fundraising has slowed down this quarter, during our critical election year. As of right now, we have a long way to go to hit our quarterly fundraising goal before March is over. Can you chip in for the first time in 2022 to help us reach this goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10937?refcode=em20220316-1110&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10937?refcode=em20220316-1110&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)**
Since Pramila's first run for Congress in 2016, our campaign has been funded by grassroots donations and individual donors — not corporate PACs or lobbyists. Every dollar you chip in directly supports our work for Washington's 7th congressional district and our progressive movement.
After Democrats took back control of Congress and the White House, our movement wasted no time getting to work. From passing the American Rescue Plan to fighting for a comprehensive and sweeping Build Back Better Act that puts working families first and building serious momentum around ending the filibuster, we've engaged in crucial and necessary fights for our communities and our futures.
**But we have a lot more to do if we're going to deliver on the promises we made to voters in the last election — starting with pushing back against the corporate interests who have stood in the way of our progressive agenda, protecting our Democratic majority, and electing even more bold progressives to Congress.**
[**All this organizing work is only made possible because of the individual contributions from folks like you****, Peter. So, we're asking you to chip in for the first time in 2022 today to keep our work going, especially during this critical time before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10937?refcode=em20220316-1110&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)
We know how much we can do together as a grassroots movement against corporate influence. Let's keep it going.
In solidarity,
Lauren
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220316-1110-footer&t=25&refcode2=1110_420207_LUpfwJ&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=26&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1110%2E420207%2ELUpfwJ)

name: Bobby Maggio, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU, PA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'm so proud of this team.
#
Exciting news, Derek!
Our primary ballot petitions are FILED!!! In other words, John is officially on the Democratic primary ballot in the race for Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat.
Not only that, we got...
✅ Well over 11,000 signatures...
✅ From all 67 Counties...
✅ Which is over 5 times the number of required petition signatures !
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45400?refcode=em20220316-4996&amount=5&t=1&akid=4996%2E434096%2E1m1GCl)
_Yes, unfortunately that is a bottle of Hunt’s ketchup. My sincerest apologies to yinz that it is not Heinz._
**On behalf of John and our entire team, thank you, thank you, THANK YOU, PA!**
So what’s next, Derek? Now that we’re officially on the ballot, 100% of our attention is on earning votes across Pennsylvania. That means keeping John on the road, expanding our 67-County organizing program, and pouring more resources into advertising, too.
And everything — seriously, everything — we do to ensure John wins the Democratic nomination in May and PA’s open U.S. Senate seat in November will be funded by grassroots donations like yours, Derek.
[**_So I need to ask: Will you please donate your first $5 to our campaign to flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat? With our grassroots campaign, even a modest donation would help — even just a buck or two._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45400?refcode=em20220316-4996&amount=5&t=2&akid=4996%2E434096%2E1m1GCl)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45400?refcode=em20220316-4996&amount=5&t=21&akid=4996%2E434096%2E1m1GCl)**
This is such an exciting milestone to celebrate with yinz. Thank you so much for all you do for our campaign.
More soon,
Bobby Maggio
Campaign Manager, Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220316-4996-footer&t=22&refcode2=4996_434096_1m1GCl&akid=4996%2E434096%2E1m1GCl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4996%2E434096%2E1m1GCl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4996%2E434096%2E1m1GCl)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
[****](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee389b99eab147fa9fc362c81b51dc3a&_e=WjpmJ2ox7j1CHsLOeHx6cKro9uksSfIUQLc7SDFO4jRV4ruYfUWOES3HBixV8_5gaAvbrJ5XPCvfBRmU-mHvFDX0Dsa35a3BXFTIchEwR7XSaXNhN8xszFnNBZmFEi_foVAzNOtaHj6q5Hf3Wrrmrm5rRVqF1nklA9QfSdn3J84KYhUm6YtSNaDHFCPqdpFA9iQDkHch5xLvbPKfIViVcPdBg_OrN7Oa5ZDb4Kb887PiiscqttIFfa1AALYmGjqucApe1VGmBvvQXXvEXtYUjqsV064AtW2b1HbYI44AzND7dmN4DTNUo4Lyw1JXQnHCIaezTFDMPMtUuve136kf1to074Rp9XVb42Bvy8iRqK9s_QU6dCC0FTrCZKUg1kpUoSX6PT-vv6KGHjclawRv9TPgkqGkQXxzh4hscjq8eiY%3D)

Peter,
Being a leader requires standing up for what's right even when the powerful are arrayed against you.
I'm not going to kowtow to woke corporations, no matter how powerful they might think they are. I will ALWAYS fight back and do what's best for the people of Florida.
**[>>> RUSH IN $25 TO HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT <<< ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee389b99eab147fa9fc362c81b51dc3a&_e=WjpmJ2ox7j1CHsLOeHx6cKro9uksSfIUQLc7SDFO4jRV4ruYfUWOES3HBixV8_5gaAvbrJ5XPCvfBRmU-mHvFDX0Dsa35a3BXFTIchEwR7XSaXNhN8xszFnNBZmFEi_foVAzNOtaHj6q5Hf3Wrrmrm5rRVqF1nklA9QfSdn3J84KYhUm6YtSNaDHFCPqdpFA9iQDkHch5xLvbPKfIViVcHpZas1sWtKFkP7zse8FqaBOB15ewzlJTLVEyYuSBB36wuX-EfrwQqpQI2oUGBunb57AbVPRG26tK0-nPzLaV6Z5tbjLf72aULB6Wfhi-vaPSSm2thXNtroOgZ2e0pQRPkGKfHozUiHMjy-MNXETXWYI4qAO40LxMpgHNA0lcbN5L97qhs_WIDZU7HUq8j1wmi8OBK4vpHFSRDzcJ7cd-sg%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/i-will-not-bend-the-knee-to-woke-corporations")**
This is not the time for elected officials who are spineless and willing to do anything to keep themselves from being attacked by the Left. We need leaders who have the courage to hold the line and who won't cave to virtue-signaling liberals on Twitter.
Floridians know I am going to bat for them every single day and no woke executive or corporate bully is going to change that.
**I won 't be forced into harming Floridians to appease woke corporations, but I need your help to continue my fight, DeSantis. [Can I count on you to rush in a contribution of $50, $25 or $15 to help me continue to fight against the woke corporate tycoons and their business partners in the media?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee389b99eab147fa9fc362c81b51dc3a&_e=WjpmJ2ox7j1CHsLOeHx6cKro9uksSfIUQLc7SDFO4jRV4ruYfUWOES3HBixV8_5gaAvbrJ5XPCvfBRmU-mHvFDX0Dsa35a3BXFTIchEwR7XSaXNhN8xszFnNBZmFEi_foVAzNOtaHj6q5Hf3Wrrmrm5rRVqF1nklA9QfSdn3J84KYhUm6YtSNaDHFCPqdpFA9iQDkHch5xLvbPKfIViVcIJNSqg47ENxDIciTwcLHOSTgq9lujtmoIKV7ycxA6iySZ-tg8Khcj8bzq-OknzadzuFIlLPllr3CiWdL79_KwD-cql624eyN9DnpedFLTPs2rEP1zENTAyfNO-tyYpg70sPszyJUPUYIRY7BeI6TXGRbJM3DFN4k-8VdX-ajjOnduF2qOTCegZeDEWgbqOAFjm_ehgaEertyMwSqYk9Fok%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/i-will-not-bend-the-knee-to-woke-corporations")**
Thank you for your continued support,
Ron DeSantis

Floridians know I am going to bat for them every single day and no woke executive or corporate bully is going to change that. I won 't be forced into harming Floridians to appease woke corporations, but I need your help to continue my fight, DeSantis. "" Thank you for your continued support, Ron DeSantis "CHIP IN" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Andy Kim
subject: One year after Atlanta: a renewed call to Stop Asian Hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
The murderer who perpetrated the Atlanta spa shootings targeted Asian American moms thinking they were weak.

What he didn't know is that Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) moms are the strongest among us, and our moms raised a generation of tough AAPI children ready to stand up. Today's anniversary is a renewed call to action.

Headline: 8 People Shot Dead at 3 Massage Parlors [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl1.png]

A year ago, I was putting my kids to bed when I felt my phone vibrating—alerts of a mass shooting in Atlanta targeting AAPI women. I think many of us remember where we were. We had already been on edge about rising violence, but Atlanta felt like it changed everything .

Makeshift memorial at Gold Spa [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl2.png]

I had never seen the fear and pain of the AAPI community so raw and exposed. That pain exploded into full outrage when a local official dismissed the idea that the killing was racially motivated and said the killer was having a " bad day ."

Sign that reads: Bad day? We all are having one [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl3.png]

The Atlanta murders did something else I've never seen before. It galvanized the nation to pay attention to challenges facing the AAPI community. Many people who never were politically engaged or active before decided to stand up and speak out. The energy gave us hope.

Protest with signs that say: Stop Asian Hate [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl4.png]

Protest with sign that reads: I am not your scapegoat [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl5.png]

The attention faded, but the violence didn't. For many AAPIs, especially AAPI women, every day this past year felt like March 16, as we have seen countless attacks. Just days ago, a 67-year-old woman was punched and stomped 125 times while being called "Asian bitch".

Before that, Christina Yuna Lee was followed into her apartment and murdered. And before that, Michelle Go was pushed in front of a subway train. And many others. It's hard not to feel helpless when you lose track of the numbers.

This anniversary comes at this crossroads of fierce passion and reluctant helplessness. Violence is not abating, but solutions seem so complex. It's not just about hate crimes or law enforcement. We need to address mental health, housing, and so much more. Sometimes it feels out of reach.

But on this anniversary of the Atlanta shootings, I keep thinking of this one sign I saw at the makeshift memorials outside the crime scenes. The sign stood out to me and was different from the others. It conveyed in just a few simple words a deep love. It conveyed a rich life.

Sign that reads: Hyun Jung Grant loved karaoke. She made the world's best kimchi stew. Age 51 [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl6.png]

The person who wrote the sign wanted us to know the victims, not just mourn them in the abstract.

The victims... they weren't perpetual foreigners.

They weren't model minorities.

They weren't the fill-in-the-blank stereotype or statistics.

They were people–full of life and love.

They were moms.

I met with some of the victims' children. They talked about how hard their moms worked to provide for them—how mom would make their favorite Korean food whenever she visited. Their words sounded like how I would describe my own mom and her selfless care.

Many bouquets. One bouquet has a card that reads: Our deepest condolences! May you all rest in peace. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/atl7.png]

Our moms taught us to reject helplessness and instead to be resilient, full of grit and determination. On this anniversary, let us mourn the love that was lost. And let us recommit to protecting the love that we treasure.

Andy

Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

This email was sent by Andy Kim [https://andykimforcongress.com/]

P.O. Box 211
Marlton, NJ 08053
United States

clean_body: The murderer who perpetrated the Atlanta spa shootings targeted Asian American moms thinking they were weak. What he didn't know is that Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) moms are the strongest among us, and our moms raised a generation of tough AAPI children ready to stand up. Today's anniversary is a renewed call to action. Headline: 8 People Shot Dead at 3 Massage Parlors [] A year ago, I was putting my kids to bed when I felt my phone vibrating—alerts of a mass shooting in Atlanta targeting AAPI women. I think many of us remember where we were. We had already been on edge about rising violence, but Atlanta felt like it changed everything . Makeshift memorial at Gold Spa [] I had never seen the fear and pain of the AAPI community so raw and exposed. That pain exploded into full outrage when a local official dismissed the idea that the killing was racially motivated and said the killer was having a " bad day ." Sign that reads: Bad day? We all are having one [] The Atlanta murders did something else I've never seen before. It galvanized the nation to pay attention to challenges facing the AAPI community. Many people who never were politically engaged or active before decided to stand up and speak out. The energy gave us hope. Protest with signs that say: Stop Asian Hate [] Protest with sign that reads: I am not your scapegoat [] The attention faded, but the violence didn't. For many AAPIs, especially AAPI women, every day this past year felt like March 16, as we have seen countless attacks. Just days ago, a 67-year-old woman was punched and stomped 125 times while being called "Asian bitch". Before that, Christina Yuna Lee was followed into her apartment and murdered. And before that, Michelle Go was pushed in front of a subway train. And many others. It's hard not to feel helpless when you lose track of the numbers. This anniversary comes at this crossroads of fierce passion and reluctant helplessness. Violence is not abating, but solutions seem so complex. It's not just about hate crimes or law enforcement. We need to address mental health, housing, and so much more. Sometimes it feels out of reach. But on this anniversary of the Atlanta shootings, I keep thinking of this one sign I saw at the makeshift memorials outside the crime scenes. The sign stood out to me and was different from the others. It conveyed in just a few simple words a deep love. It conveyed a rich life. Sign that reads: Hyun Jung Grant loved karaoke. She made the world's best kimchi stew. Age 51 [] The person who wrote the sign wanted us to know the victims, not just mourn them in the abstract. The victims... they weren't perpetual foreigners. They weren't model minorities. They weren't the fill-in-the-blank stereotype or statistics. They were people–full of life and love. They were moms. I met with some of the victims' children. They talked about how hard their moms worked to provide for them—how mom would make their favorite Korean food whenever she visited. Their words sounded like how I would describe my own mom and her selfless care. Many bouquets. One bouquet has a card that reads: Our deepest condolences! May you all rest in peace. [] Our moms taught us to reject helplessness and instead to be resilient, full of grit and determination. On this anniversary, let us mourn the love that was lost. And let us recommit to protecting the love that we treasure. Andy Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

name: Karl Rove
subject: Jeremy Hunt is a WINNER
body:
Peter, We’ve watched as President Biden and this Democratic Congress made some of the worst bone-headed decisions we’ve ever seen.

As inflation pummels every American family at the grocery and the pump, Democrats want to pile on trillions in new spending that will push prices higher.

And while they want the biggest expansion of the welfare state in history, Democrats oppose giving our military what it needs to deter our adversaries in China and Russia.

We must provide a check-and-balance on President Biden by electing a Republican majority in the House.

**Jeremy Hunt is a strong new leader who can help put our country on the right course.**

He’s a U.S. Army intelligence officer who’ll stand up for America, its values, and our free enterprise system.

**_Jeremy faced America’s enemies abroad: this veteran will have no_**
** _trouble taking on Washington._**

A strong and effective new leader, this American hero will flip a long-time Democrat seat in southwest Georgia and help put the GOP back in charge of Congress.

_We have a chance to more than double the number of Black Republicans_
_in the House and Senate and Jeremy Hunt is key to that strategy._

**Please, will you join me in backing this bold conservative?**

[**Pitch in TODAY to support Jeremy Hunt for Congress and send an Army veteran to Congress who’ll fight for our conservative Hunt For Congress,
clean_body: Peter, We’ve watched as President Biden and this Democratic Congress made some of the worst bone-headed decisions we’ve ever seen. As inflation pummels every American family at the grocery and the pump, Democrats want to pile on trillions in new spending that will push prices higher. And while they want the biggest expansion of the welfare state in history, Democrats oppose giving our military what it needs to deter our adversaries in China and Russia. We must provide a check-and-balance on President Biden by electing a Republican majority in the House. Jeremy Hunt is a strong new leader who can help put our country on the right course. He’s a U.S. Army intelligence officer who’ll stand up for America, its values, and our free enterprise system. Jeremy faced America’s enemies abroad: this veteran will have no trouble taking on Washington. A strong and effective new leader, this American hero will flip a long-time Democrat seat in southwest Georgia and help put the GOP back in charge of Congress. We have a chance to more than double the number of Black Republicans in the House and Senate and Jeremy Hunt is key to that strategy. Please, will you join me in backing this bold conservative? Thank you, Karl Rove Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Jeremy for Georgia. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

name: Team Mondaire
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] We must end corporate greed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hi friend,
As inflation rises, the negative impact of unchecked corporate power has reached an all-time high. During the pandemic, corporations have made record profits as they have jacked up costs for consumers beyond what their business expenses require. Now, millions of Americans are struggling to afford everyday goods such as food and gas. And for decades, concentrated corporate power has also prevented workers from reaching their full potential, kept wages stagnant, and widened wealth inequality.
The broken merger-review process at the Federal Trade Commission and Department of Justice has allowed dominant corporations to proceed with anticompetitive mergers, driving up prices for consumers and crushing workers in the process.
In Congress, Mondaire is focused on protecting working families just like the one he grew up in. **That’s why today, he announced he’s introducing the _Prohibiting Anticompetitive Mergers Act_ with Senator Elizabeth Warren _._** This __ critical antitrust legislation will protect workers, consumers, and small businesses.
**[Folks, it is time for our government to tackle corporate greed and bring down prices while protecting workers. Please support Mondaire’s efforts to get the _Prohibiting Anticompetitive Mergers Act_ passed by signing on as a citizen co-sponsor today. He needs our grassroots movement standing with him as he fights to protect working families in Congress >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43046470/335459279/-2080319221?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220316_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDc5OTAyNy02ZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8bVxmIBbuElG5P2Famr-xB1OIzevMzlZVC33tWkRT0=&emci=be2e68d3-6ca5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=74799027-6ea5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)**

This legislation confronts obscene levels of corporate power by overhauling the merger-review process, banning the biggest mergers, and strengthening antitrust agencies' tools to unravel existing mergers.
Tackling corporate greed is an important step in our work to combat inflation and protect workers. Mondaire is leading the charge to build a more democratic, vibrant economy that works for every American — not just the wealthy and well-connected.

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | [You are [1] of [8] Democrats chosen from your area to participate in this urgent poll. Please respond within an hour.]() We’re asking only a handful of Democrats in Cresco to complete our poll and let us know if they are lifelong or new Democrats – it’s crucial to our 2022 election strategy! | | \- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Marisa Wood
subject: re: McCarthy's disrespect for teachers.
body:
the hardest two years of my career. body:
| | | Hi there, [**> >>Can you donate now, so I can fight for workers in Congress? It’s time we had pro-worker representation in the House!<<<**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051659/335505484/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjIwNGRmMS05M2E1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DGwz1zys_xYg6IrBAi13oShMlTlAgmE7rUBXoYbR0k=) People shouldn’t have to pay taxes on their unemployment while huge corporations pay $0 in federal income taxes. The federal government shouldn’t be winding down the testing, treating, and vaccination of uninsured people — while spending billions to keep corporations on life support every time there’s a crisis. It’s obvious our government cares more about keeping corporations alive than keeping us alive. 1 million Americans have died of Covid and we still don’t have Medicare for All. Over 300,000 of those people died of Covid _because they didn’t have healthcare._ Despite making up only 4% of the world’s population, the US makes up 16% of worldwide Covid deaths. Congress refuses to even hold a vote on Medicare for All, much less pass it. It refuses to pass the PRO Act, which would strengthen the rights of labor. [**In Congress, I will never waver in my fight for Medicare for All and the PRO Act. In the middle of a pandemic and financial turmoil, we need healthcare for all and stronger workers’ rights. If you can, please chip in a couple bucks to my campaign, so I can fight for YOU in Congress — not corporations.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43051660/335505485/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjIwNGRmMS05M2E1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DGwz1zys_xYg6IrBAi13oShMlTlAgmE7rUBXoYbR0k=) It’s obvious our government cares more about keeping corporations alive than keeping us alive. 1 million Americans have died of Covid and we still don’t have Medicare for All. Over 300,000 of those people died of Covid because they didn’t have healthcare. Despite making up only 4% of the world’s population, the US makes up 16% of worldwide Covid deaths. Congress refuses to even hold a vote on Medicare for All, much less pass it. It refuses to pass the PRO Act, which would strengthen the rights of labor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: I’m officially a “2022 Young Gun” | Peter, I’m honored and humbled. The NRCC just officially named me as one of their “2022 Young Guns” as I battle to win 1 of the 5 seats we need to END Nancy Pelosi’s House majority. My campaign already has the support of leader Kevin McCarty and Whip Steve Scalise. Now, with the NRCC awarding us the highest level of the Young Guns program, we have the national backing we need to WIN in November. But our success has also placed a target on our back. Now we’re getting national recognition, national Democrats are going to invest even more resources into this race to try and stop us. Being elevated to Young Gun status illustrates the belief that conservatives across the country have in our campaign, Peter. They know that I’m a fighter who will battle tooth-and-nail to win this key district that we need to topple Pelosi’s House majority. The NRCC has also seen your dedicated support, and this status upgrade is recognition that you and I have built a winning team here in Southern Arizona. It’s also a great sign for our chances in November. Over 150 “Young Guns” have been elected to Congress, and in 2020, 25 out of the 36 “Young Guns” won their races. But as amazing as this all is, it means nothing without your continued support. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

clean_body: My friend, The abuse of emergency powers by Tim Walz during the coronavirus pandemic was completely unacceptable. Walz took away the liberties of millions of people by: mandating masks & vaccines, closing schools & churches, and fining & shutting down businesses. Enough is enough! Walz's abuse of power has had untold damage to the mental health, learning ability and overall well-being of our children. , and we'll make sure the abuse of executive powers doesn't happen again. Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka Candidate for Governor | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

body:
Did you see the poll? 52% of Democrats just responded to a poll saying that they would surrender to the enemy rather than fight if the U.S. were invad We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7f2561e699f548328f8cc02fd8b21607&_e=Nv0sUgADAR-zFFGsNhdgxjoDGKS0nZnxpoJCcKAOvF9Evk9CjdS_Y1kGxVDZvwJOtQzab8hkRFCZBYOiQSeH6nW80z6fyISmsD3ljQBP5ZWqaSMfwReLM9iwYp9wJvCOFCVZ8kWN0LDgijq_EEGAIu0Zctzr7q4XBbWJCKq9moDqIG3_YYmkD75ugXKcq-FU6zH5yAyHOpBDptuSGAEgKEb1xazp2uUWWNB749tx74e39xVU48oi3Zrq8dmEZTfcj81f-P_kPEro4NU_gAcpSDZB97NYg9lNzdoXjrF30V8bN3RsgNqVrnKB9RyNcuVXC1XeVuwbSz1PKbFd_mvoMQuk4bXrgUYvT9bsKbMZJGqLebn9IIdjauMZaMyuvjk23zDzNlm9J-WYtc-YNecsSq2zF2IqqXVfM7wV-m5IyIN1XQMSYJ8NCjQ43w4eXZ02uwnx20Nt_xNSs2vbiaayTQ%3D%3D)

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Peter,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7f2561e699f548328f8cc02fd8b21607&_e=Nv0sUgADAR-zFFGsNhdgxjoDGKS0nZnxpoJCcKAOvF9Evk9CjdS_Y1kGxVDZvwJOtQzab8hkRFCZBYOiQSeH6nW80z6fyISmsD3ljQBP5ZWqaSMfwReLM9iwYp9wJvCOFCVZ8kWN0LDgijq_EEGAIu0Zctzr7q4XBbWJCKq9moDqIG3_YYmkD75ugXKcq-FU6zH5yAyHOpBDptuSGAEgKEb1xazp2uUWWNB749tx74e39xVU48oi3Zrq8dmEZTfcDuoAIA78Hzyh4xhNXEKkc0MhoBbteir96M6TDY0zWRgzxOQ53sEt0hBdE6yAvnAy33OdWUWmudcg8C6Tsjw4LEBymKcXdensx7SbfyC71PBsRlt_Fm0EEgw0tbpDiIs6-o6EVwOycmc-hRDOn2rra9e8LAPQABCsOJJ4OmtPqiwDX5P3MxLukpUCfuo6oNeyOiXXTF5H4u18ujIly7QOHA%3D%3D)
When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. [**They must not be allowed to continue to serve in the House majority.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7f2561e699f548328f8cc02fd8b21607&_e=Nv0sUgADAR-zFFGsNhdgxjoDGKS0nZnxpoJCcKAOvF9Evk9CjdS_Y1kGxVDZvwJOtQzab8hkRFCZBYOiQSeH6nW80z6fyISmsD3ljQBP5ZWqaSMfwReLM9iwYp9wJvCOFCVZ8kWN0LDgijq_EEGAIu0Zctzr7q4XBbWJCKq9moDqIG3_YYmkD75ugXKcq-FU6zH5yAyHOpBDptuSGAEgKEb1xazp2uUWWNB749tx74e39xVU48oi3Zrq8dmEZTfcmu3_3OYB0SmxVRpjbYy4IwkUmBjx834q8lzyXQnJAZXBYRH_kEttunjgxEZ5suquGWBT6Ii7SpM--zzKFACUBqgL6QaPgMzzXy5DLaGbH3Hs33B4Mx1WHLmwzd4DCaQUCTraLTKFTJKURUXjE8wrSyYL42s_db_9nEYBk8IkRCrkJP9oONLStTQy0yh_j8YsZiKjwtzffgOvCeRe2c5mgg%3D%3D)

[**Will you make a donation of $5 or $10 or even $15 right now to make sure I’m able to defeat the far-left Democrat I’m facing in November’s election?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7f2561e699f548328f8cc02fd8b21607&_e=Nv0sUgADAR-zFFGsNhdgxjoDGKS0nZnxpoJCcKAOvF9Evk9CjdS_Y1kGxVDZvwJOtQzab8hkRFCZBYOiQSeH6nW80z6fyISmsD3ljQBP5ZWqaSMfwReLM9iwYp9wJvCOFCVZ8kWN0LDgijq_EEGAIu0Zctzr7q4XBbWJCKq9moDqIG3_YYmkD75ugXKcq-FU6zH5yAyHOpBDptuSGAEgKEb1xazp2uUWWNB749tx74e39xVU48oi3Zrq8dmEZTfcNtwU3IdlmmNogci4M4Dz1AyIWF44_i89oVftWCkpqZug3YQrB9PkIdi1RT1ke0_wICnKv9vFj3VebKVqn11AnpzXG2GTYQ6JYGePCQgJp57U8F9lKkGt9Lp1gYNjBjpCwaoejJEw5LpHVOsXB6u9arl0YmmcxAyvTQTgVuEJ5vU6KBYiX_osdtl33eTpLsixM5mDGTk8lmj9skuZnZh6tg%3D%3D) I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - **I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic.**

[**I’m in an extremely tight race against a progressive socialist - a race that is sure to be one of the most expensive in the nation, and any gift you can make today would be grateful appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7f2561e699f548328f8cc02fd8b21607&_e=Nv0sUgADAR-zFFGsNhdgxjoDGKS0nZnxpoJCcKAOvF9Evk9CjdS_Y1kGxVDZvwJOtQzab8hkRFCZBYOiQSeH6nW80z6fyISmsD3ljQBP5ZWqaSMfwReLM9iwYp9wJvCOFCVZ8kWN0LDgijq_EEGAIu0Zctzr7q4XBbWJCKq9moDqIG3_YYmkD75ugXKcq-FU6zH5yAyHOpBDptuSGAEgKEb1xazp2uUWWNB749tx74e39xVU48oi3Zrq8dmEZTfcKmE_2AHiuq9z1Y5tiOzsm3d2X4Lm63gm-_ID6jEADpiaZQoYtnjSbPPLS6ZvuuiwdNx8FVMWFoFYXeWAStbOtY4d94bPTN2c5n6TAA1R_xMVvkcU2cRCXvDlAIlNSR6Bt2U9A4qJmC6eghiXoKQGg-hyhn8x-P35zxBJB2yYDUgT2vGgXZjOR1aFZIPlH2V_xKev8bWjG-opIi2e3437wA%3D%3D)

**Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats** [** MAKE A GIFT OF $5 ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7f2561e699f548328f8cc02fd8b21607&_e=Nv0sUgADAR-zFFGsNhdgxjoDGKS0nZnxpoJCcKAOvF9Evk9CjdS_Y1kGxVDZvwJOtQzab8hkRFCZBYOiQSeH6nW80z6fyISmsD3ljQBP5ZWqaSMfwReLM9iwYp9wJvCOFCVZ8kWN0LDgijq_EEGAIu0Zctzr7q4XBbWJCKq9moDqIG3_YYmkD75ugXKcq-FU6zH5yAyHOpBDptuSGAEgKEb1xazp2uUWWNB749tx74ee8vppoFyS_msFy7LRZBBqW-YDRT_6lcoNq147ekOmJTMT51YU74gST9AGU-gwApnhEuE-Vy36uPFLXieVkOzzgVz73VLSWdD9MwFTVSchnlRwb96Bh6Vo79vwUK1IS_cTDl4RcnpF5HrtYRC-KA8E4Zg2AWwJmdEW6Cw8Fb2cVEH-BXsoNTVflaQ8TL9iNutho5uAe4Bm_eqUblbXx9JUnvq_LYBQSA08wusqgdY68oFT2xCqXkTJyru3Npcx98U%3D)
What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself?

What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run?

**I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week.**

clean_body: Did you see the poll? 52% of Democrats just responded to a poll saying that they would surrender to the enemy rather than fight if the U.S. were invad We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Peter, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself? What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run? I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week. And in case you were wondering – 70% of Republicans polled said that they would stay and fight. clean_body: Did you see what they did? | Fellow American, Did you see what the Virginia State Senate Democrats did? When Governor Glenn Youngkin took office, he upheld his campaign promise to rid the Virginia Parole Board of its scandals and corruption by firing them. Now as he is rebuilding the Parole Board, Democratic State Senators blocked four of his five highly qualified nominees. As a law enforcement officer, what these Democratic State Senators did was not only shameful, but it shows where Democrat loyalties truly lie. They would rather keep murderers and rapists behind bars than work with Republicans to fix the real issues in our state. | Instead of bringing integrity back to our Parole Board, they decided to play political games and share ‘hot takes’ in their echo chambers on Twitter. This is unacceptable, they should be doing everything in their power to keep our communities safe. God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.
