**_"Their rematch is widely considered the most competitive congressional race in Minnesota."_**

Fellow American,

Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, **I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders.**

So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. [**Today, I’m asking for you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6eb0fb7be794d40bdf4cb834b8165dd&_e=mkyHnWuzFzVNq3naTp4Wri2THUYPe5DPISohpyRnfn4Htig6qtRIWwI4-CbtIzJSpcihNxdNh8fdtx3TVdYy0AmpOydTqWPhDCXpjSHhJNcVHd6YuMIJpFOBF7FqSg_6XYqA1Yz8ATWCufCL7IJOh7c4E0_gG6NZ2jrFjjhUlTRN5LoVj7d7--3h31vkKFo42oN0bKNGXife0fS3PjoznBe_CvUiHfEZlVHLDyfz58RqcLi7rpz6d5-pNuXD35Wnc34ovvnM3qHQzTTVl6XGKSjw4iG_zoZ0Vlt9YWGpkBvL7fX82rKUE6shSRD2ukWdhVhFhDKD5Iz-sI0z6NX4O1MOwvMXqRInh8bclmBpxz2DS-SVKLI0SPnKPrb0UGrk)

[**In 2020,**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6eb0fb7be794d40bdf4cb834b8165dd&_e=mkyHnWuzFzVNq3naTp4Wri2THUYPe5DPISohpyRnfn4Htig6qtRIWwI4-CbtIzJSpcihNxdNh8fdtx3TVdYy0AmpOydTqWPhDCXpjSHhJNcVHd6YuMIJpFOBF7FqSg_6XYqA1Yz8ATWCufCL7IJOh7c4E0_gG6NZ2jrFjjhUlTTmig9NeejtPiFEYx81PnbqZkt6jRAzYGT9_K5919SSgEdJPucElkEioKjvoWyJScCflV5E7SaXsCeSME0LAXj5-XOY5SBz3Zh-ce161ZO_sTYKd09AYOyjD8p3DiTm3UBlZ-3RqSq2piHSAbhJfFet9pbFGwlPEMPV05AUcd61N4Ukf9BRcPpR2kfxhrmp03ewCydO4uoPvuN8MpfqNwO5) I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. **Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent.** For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year.

But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.**Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us.**

I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C.

[**I’m coming to you today with a humble request: would you be able to spare a dollar or two to help me make sure that this time our campaign doesn’t come up short of victory?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6eb0fb7be794d40bdf4cb834b8165dd&_e=mkyHnWuzFzVNq3naTp4Wri2THUYPe5DPISohpyRnfn4Htig6qtRIWwI4-CbtIzJSpcihNxdNh8fdtx3TVdYy0AmpOydTqWPhDCXpjSHhJNcVHd6YuMIJpFOBF7FqSg_6XYqA1Yz8ATWCufCL7IJOh7c4E0_gG6NZ2jrFjjhUlTQ2P2YuzA9I4stH9CGnfCJOVpJamq7dBH9WHMnNrfIEsbcra9_XtNQcl_1JU4M9Q1WX0xU-lGY_Lu4zEeBmT2boHd7sweVX0odPG5LhBgcUqitIkGXtN-eu6RYNEUKIjCrYdEDougwjTigK52SPNCIzB8vIql7QuViCSf9QfWFlI52XIe2XPanfVzLvRGvGug6SIdnkLJU5QdnYiYAZ0Duz)

With just five seats needed to take control, we have to PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY.

I know that saving America from the socialist Democrats extends far beyond what I can do on the front lines in Washington, but I also know that we can’t afford to keep our country in the hands of people who HATE AMERICA.

The radical Left is on the verge of destroying the very country that I —and so many others— have sacrificed and even laid down their lives for. We must retake the House, it’s our only option if we want a country to leave to the next generation.

That’s why I need your help today, Fellow American. clean_body: I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders. | "Their rematch is widely considered the most competitive congressional race in Minnesota." Fellow American, Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders. So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent. For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year. But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us. I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C. if Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we have to PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY. I know that saving America from the socialist Democrats extends far beyond what I can do on the front lines in Washington, but I also know that we can’t afford to keep our country in the hands of people who HATE AMERICA. The radical Left is on the verge of destroying the very country that I —and so many others— have sacrificed and even laid down their lives for. We must retake the House, it’s our only option if we want a country to leave to the next generation. That’s why I need your help today, Fellow American. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. P.S. As a Marine serving overseas, there was zero room for error. One mistake was the difference between life and death. | Tyler Kistner * Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048576/335468466/-2030107315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJkMmJlNi03NmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUNofbaAC9QIyARNIdLTqt5gzmaV0QoWd4ekQPa2ww8=)

| | Fellow Democrats, Tonight, the Ohio Democratic Party endorsed Chelsea Clark for Secretary of State. Let me tell you why. I have often said “elections have consequences,” and sadly, over the last four years, we have seen how disastrous a bad Secretary of State is for Ohio. But, that’s all about to change. [Today, I want to tell you why I am so excited about Chelsea Clark and ask you to join Ohio Democrats in supporting her with a contribution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048577/335468467/-2030107315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJkMmJlNi03NmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUNofbaAC9QIyARNIdLTqt5gzmaV0QoWd4ekQPa2ww8=) Black women have always been an important economic engine for Ohio. They have been the driving force of growth for years, but are especially important as we come out of this pandemic. As a successful entrepreneur, Chelsea knows how to solve problems and overcome the odds. She has proven it time and time again. From growing up as a sixth generation farmer, to finding funding to launch her business, and now running for Secretary of State, Chelsea has torn down every barrier put in front of her. Chelsea’s experience and drive is exactly what Ohio needs right now. It’s critical for us to grow businesses right here in Ohio. It is also critical we undo all the walls being built between voters and the ballot box. Chelsea is the right woman for the job and we need her right now. [Join Ohio Democrats in supporting Chelsea by donating to her campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43048578/335468468/-2030107315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJkMmJlNi03NmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUNofbaAC9QIyARNIdLTqt5gzmaV0QoWd4ekQPa2ww8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Ken Russell
subject: Clean water is essential
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
Friends, I’ll be brief. Our water systems in Florida are in danger. Pollution, runoff, and lousy water practices put our drinking water and the wate | | | Friends, I’ll be brief. Our water systems in Florida are in danger. Pollution, runoff, and lousy water practices put our drinking water and the water of our ecosystems in danger. From ten years of history, we know that Marco Rubio does not care about protecting beautiful Florida. **[I need your help to win this, and our ecosystem needs water to keep all creatures, including us, alive](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=c018d1102b70484eb70db5b8963030a7&_e=1ZK_jp0ef6XbIbIUmsry8Fw-Ad9EwzXe2FZ-K7tNnIXJ_qZaEj-ZBFQFOR8SxwZP-_NVj3qoi60Ck88mdQCneFut_trtwmdRQ3YN3y6fS5utSDpDjN6olaDf8YmIQLLvLvXY5gRvLslJETxwLbmFdEL8Ov3YvNg7_FBrfkP924kzmuuXopwvSLVc4iE4T6OdNSgsLyfZDD3solkPaj3N1BhuZgoS2vBvbBXMQTYSy66CFqPlT02xMX1vnt96wgeKRblDMaPIL-hyIJH4dZkF4x1DfJYWdwVwp32Vhnr7uuSZSyrsxu9ZJu8u1YTNvyZk-qYPqa0cjqM98LYsxmjYzQrfHW5_lam1CGi4ov8A62ENoF7fGZQaNnBUjqC1R9_P1_gh1eMNO2W4t8Nk4yEzHZAhMnHHxuohh9wnRNN5MspVm3DEFAm3s2USpa-2RxEEHgvpIwA5ko7IxNXG-iOLJ4inWCk3B7lwtsJTdGUQS5faTHppQiQwVu2PuqQ_k4Mp)** Water is life, and in Florida, we are blessed with so much of it. It keeps manatees and birds and fish alive, supporting the local economy and making our state a tourist destination. We need to elect someone who is dedicated to protecting all of that. I originally got into politics because I wanted to fight back against pollution in a local park. **[Will you join my team and help protect clean water now, and for generations to come.](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=c018d1102b70484eb70db5b8963030a7&_e=1ZK_jp0ef6XbIbIUmsry8Fw-Ad9EwzXe2FZ-K7tNnIXJ_qZaEj-ZBFQFOR8SxwZP-_NVj3qoi60Ck88mdQCneFut_trtwmdRQ3YN3y6fS5utSDpDjN6olaDf8YmIQLLvLvXY5gRvLslJETxwLbmFdEL8Ov3YvNg7_FBrfkP924kzmuuXopwvSLVc4iE4T6OdNSgsLyfZDD3solkPaj3N1BhuZgoS2vBvbBXMQTYSy66CFqPlT02xMX1vnt96wgeKRblDMaPIL-hyIJH4dZkF4x1DfJYWdwVwp32Vhnr7uuSLO1VBxi8CqvKyYnIn3T0ubSSQIxeWd8uL-RyibtRU14wauqBAPptRYBlY58ZAWS2xzZRvcY86KlpC3F9G9nOs237NWQwFJ90lGtkHBahZb7qehfSb3JRgIarGH70g3inMsX4bpCujMu4O-ls5VjpJViaMSlXrrIVfsACUEtXp7SLB93ejY8IbGZNBxR7HY9N1F_VFGlebWKr-f0QrEhnZ)** In solidarity, Ken Russell _Sent from my iPhone_ Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

Vance has a $10 million billionaire-funded super PAC behind him and my other GOP opponents are multi-millionaires able to self-fund their campaigns. This poll is truly a testament to the power of our grassroots campaign!

We have what it takes to flip this open Senate seat BLUE and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but in a battleground race like this one, national Republicans are working overtime to stop our momentum. name: Beto for Texas
subject: Do you have 23 seconds for a message from Beto?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:

clean_body: | = This is it, friends. The other Democrat running in the primary, Paul Fermo, called Ashley two nights ago to give his full support to her campaign. That means Ashley is the Democratic frontrunner for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District. = | = Ashley is proud to have Paul’s endorsement as a fellow veteran and she looks forward to working with him to ensure we defeat Brian Fitzpatrick this November. Now that we are unified around flipping PA-01 blue, we’re ready to focus on building a strong, diverse coalition of everyday Pennsylvanians to win the general election. While Fitzpatrick competes in a 5-way primary race, we have a huge opportunity to get a head-start by building a massive operation of volunteers, organizers, and grassroots supporters. The success of our people-powered movement relies on supporters like you. In a race as competitive as ours, it’s going to take every one of us to do it. = ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** **= ** **** | **= = ** | **= = Thank you for fighting for a better future with us. subject: Vote Mama Endorsed this Mama!

body:
#ElectMoreWomen | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=b39909eafd&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Peter,

**I am so proud to announce that I’ve been[endorsed by Vote Mama](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=3adb521a0e&e=de8b2615ea), the first PAC in the country dedicated to increasing the political power of Democratic moms! **Women make up more than half of the U.S. population but only 28% of Congress. By the time U.S. women are 44 years old, 86% are mothers. Only 6% of representatives are moms of children under 18 years of age.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=66563c3375&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| _We need more**women** and **moms** in Congress to fight for reproductive justice, equal pay, paid parental leave, education, and early learning._ I’m proud to be counted among the moms endorsed by Vote Mama.

**I’m out with our powerful group of Team Beach volunteers to knock on doors throughout the[15th Congressional District.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=dfd3d181ad&e=de8b2615ea) Will you join us for a 2-hour shift?** [Please sign up to volunteer here](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=da7b07e827&e=de8b2615ea) or contact Andrew at [andrew@emilybeachforcongress.com](mailto:andrew@emilybeachforcongress.com) for more information. We’ll give you everything you need – campaign flyers, training, and a walking list for your own neighborhood! If you've never canvassed before, we can also pair you with one of our experienced volunteers to join you. This is a fun and impactful way to help mobilize the vote for our campaign.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=6a2577f981&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| We are a grass-roots, people-powered campaign and YOU are the reason we will win this race!
---
| Onward,

Emily Beach
---

Madison Horn

I will be ready to restore accountability and transparency in Washington on day one. Thank you for your support, Madison Horn P.S. If you haven’t chipped in yet, here is a link for you: = Let's get to work, Madison | | = | = Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by = Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States **

body:
How porous is the southern border?

---

# [Fourth Deportation for Illegal Alien Wanted for Murder in Mexico, Arrested Thrice by U.S. Police](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58311&L=26932&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm91cnRoLWRlcG9ydGF0aW9uLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLXdhbnRlZC1mb3ItbXVyZGVyLWluLW1leGljby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
How porous is the southern border? An illegal immigrant arrested three times by local police in the U.S. and wanted for murder in Mexico just got deported for the fourth time. Immigration and Customs Enforcements (ICE) classifies the Mexican national, Rafael Silverio Rojas, as a “noncitizen foreign fugitive.” This month the agency’s Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) handed Rojas to Mexican authorities at the international boundary of the Lincoln/Juarez Bridge in Laredo, Texas. Rojas, who is 26 years old, had been removed from the U.S. on three previous occasions before the most recent encounter. Somehow the fugitive managed to enter the country through the southern border again and again.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58311&L=26932&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm91cnRoLWRlcG9ydGF0aW9uLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLXdhbnRlZC1mb3ItbXVyZGVyLWluLW1leGljby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Maryland’s highest court moves state primary to July 19 – The Washington Post ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58311&L=26933&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyeWxhbmRzLWhpZ2hlc3QtY291cnQtbW92ZXMtc3RhdGUtcHJpbWFyeS10by1qdWx5LTE5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) The Washington Post Maryland’s highest court on Tuesday moved the state’s primary from June 28 to July 19, as courts weigh challenges to the state’s new legislative map as well as Maryland’s congressional map.

The trial involves two lawsuits. One was brought by a group of Republican state lawmakers backed by Fair Maps Maryland. The other was brought by the national conservative activist group Judicial Watch. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58311&L=26933&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyeWxhbmRzLWhpZ2hlc3QtY291cnQtbW92ZXMtc3RhdGUtcHJpbWFyeS10by1qdWx5LTE5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---

### [US pushed partnership with Wuhan lab since 2017 – with promise of ‘pandemic preparedness,’ documents show ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58311&L=26926&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtcGFydG5lcnNoaXAtd2l0aC13dWhhbi1sYWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) Fox News “U.S.-China collaboration on the Global Virome Project is an opportunity to lead innovation in science, collaborate with China, and potentially contribute to scientific breakthroughs,” said the summary of the Global Virome Project in the email that was part of 92 pages obtained by the conservative group Judicial Watch in a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit with the National Institutes of Health. clean_body: How porous is the southern border? | | | Because no one is above the law! | March 16, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == How porous is the southern border? An illegal immigrant arrested three times by local police in the U.S. and wanted for murder in Mexico just got deported for the fourth time. Immigration and Customs Enforcements (ICE) classifies the Mexican national, Rafael Silverio Rojas, as a “noncitizen foreign fugitive.” This month the agency’s Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) handed Rojas to Mexican authorities at the international boundary of the Lincoln/Juarez Bridge in Laredo, Texas. Rojas, who is 26 years old, had been removed from the U.S. on three previous occasions before the most recent encounter. Somehow the fugitive managed to enter the country through the southern border again and again. == | | | The Washington Post Maryland’s highest court on Tuesday moved the state’s primary from June 28 to July 19, as courts weigh challenges to the state’s new legislative map as well as Maryland’s congressional map. The trial involves two lawsuits. One was brought by a group of Republican state lawmakers backed by Fair Maps Maryland. The other was brought by the national conservative activist group Judicial Watch. = Judicial Watch “Courts sanctioning lawyers pursuing election law claims in the heat of an election is a dangerous game that could allow election corruption to go unchecked,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The partisan retaliation and harassment of lawyers involved in litigating the 2020 election dispute is unprecedented and undermines the rule of law – and courts should not take part in it.” = = Fox News “U.S.-China collaboration on the Global Virome Project is an opportunity to lead innovation in science, collaborate with China, and potentially contribute to scientific breakthroughs,” said the summary of the Global Virome Project in the email that was part of 92 pages obtained by the conservative group Judicial Watch in a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit with the National Institutes of Health. = | CLIPS = == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

- Matthew Hennessey_
Fellow Conservative,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

body:
We officially launched our first TV ad in Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race. Voters are just starting to tune in and this is one of the most important ways to communicate with them. Hey team!

We officially launched our first TV ad in Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race. Voters are just starting to tune in and this is one of the most important ways to communicate with them — but it’s also one of the most expensive...

So, I’ll be frank: The longer we can keep this ad running, the more voters we will reach, and the better our chances get to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this U.S. Senate seat blue. Would you consider chipping in a small donation to make sure we have the resources to stay on TV?

**If you can, please use this personal link to contribute:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-march22?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43049725/335473304/-1088791470?refcode=em22_220316_mm5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220316_mm5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTg2Yzc2YS03ZGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTfY9XjIcSJDDIJ2vYaHTaBJiZ4_5qw2BQQWJ7E_-lY=)**

Our goal is to keep this ad running as long as we can, especially while Ron Johnson is running his own. The problem is, he has more cash on hand than anyone in the race, Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC is going ”all-in” to help him, and Republicans have more than $200 million to take back the Senate.

Look, that’s an outrageous amount of money, but it’s what we have to compete with in order to win — which is why staying on TV is crucial. If we can't find the resources, there's a chance we may need to pull down our ad buy before every voter gets the chance to hear our message. I don’t want that to happen.

**[Is there any chance you could make a $10 donation to our campaign today? I’m asking you directly because our first FEC deadline of the year is coming up very soon, and we need to hit our goals if we want to beat Ron Johnson and flip this seat. Please click here to make a contribution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43049726/335473305/-1088791470?refcode=em22_220316_mm5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220316_mm5_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTg2Yzc2YS03ZGE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTfY9XjIcSJDDIJ2vYaHTaBJiZ4_5qw2BQQWJ7E_-lY=)**

I'm so grateful for this grassroots team. Your support was the reason we were able to place our first ad buy, and with your help, we'll show Wisconsinites across the state why Ron Johnson doesn't belong in the U.S. Senate.

Thanks so much,

Sarah

clean_body: We officially launched our first TV ad in Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race. Voters are just starting to tune in and this is one of the most important ways to communicate with them. Hey team! We officially launched our first TV ad in Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race. Voters are just starting to tune in and this is one of the most important ways to communicate with them — but it’s also one of the most expensive... So, I’ll be frank: The longer we can keep this ad running, the more voters we will reach, and the better our chances get to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this U.S. Senate seat blue. Would you consider chipping in a small donation to make sure we have the resources to stay on TV? If you can, please use this personal link to contribute:= Our goal is to keep this ad running as long as we can, especially while Ron Johnson is running his own. The problem is, he has more cash on hand than anyone in the race, Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC is going ”all-in” to help him, and Republicans have more than $200 million to take back the Senate. Look, that’s an outrageous amount of money, but it’s what we have to compete with in order to win — which is why staying on TV is crucial. If we can't find the resources, there's a chance we may need to pull down our ad buy before every voter gets the chance to hear our message. I don’t want that to happen. = I'm so grateful for this grassroots team. Your support was the reason we were able to place our first ad buy, and with your help, we'll show Wisconsinites across the state why Ron Johnson doesn't belong in the U.S. Senate. Thanks so much, Sarah = | Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 576 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: Rick Scott
subject: The people need a plan
body:
Peter,
Between roaring inflation, the dangerous mismanagement of our border, the disastrous spending and debt, the shamefully inept withdrawal of Afghanistan, and so much more - Americans are angry.

_And rightfully so._

The Biden Administration’s unprecedented combination of radical Left-wing policies and gross incompetence is bringing harm to our citizens.

_And as a result, they’re going to look to Republicans to pick up the pieces._

_But then what?_

_[**I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and the American people are depending on us to bring our country back from the brink of disaster.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1f5d04a0621e41b197bb7213b72bad95&_e=qwfeZrptleY9GxRPMtmsmKauNcYu6MV2Z6fhpJSQal3i_4T0UjRlr3lQIZsEyj9aeXEZK9BpbGBZu4lATEgLR4vD5KacewVINxeGUsXq5CQQTlDGcJGlpDyf6UuKOd8OzllJr1w55rKdz15SaVLDiMdrWBdzw4XJ73ZXnE-xObocCn9W2b7fJhU3yXdlZX7OXQl7GksMSH2HKqOIvXRfAlvoYRMV0_38VWxbbPW40ezMjanFkzNWXIaWDh6MHHdZe1-UUlVlW-E6Xa4cB87dd1EqJy_LTwGgKGYw8T29EYw9LOuWUl3gkyPuv-NbE46XQgN9VcuEdM3HXHUIu_hCfD4kZVTDVA7XLl6CUNgMqp-JO5zW2duLQtv4xE0A7d2xNpxgQPPQpX4xV2o69C7a_bVX6VgPovbSUpt0gxP-tCo%3D)_ [**READ THE PLAN**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1f5d04a0621e41b197bb7213b72bad95&_e=qwfeZrptleY9GxRPMtmsmKauNcYu6MV2Z6fhpJSQal3i_4T0UjRlr3lQIZsEyj9aeXEZK9BpbGBZu4lATEgLR4vD5KacewVINxeGUsXq5CQQTlDGcJGlpDyf6UuKOd8OzllJr1w55rKdz15SaVLDiMdrWBdzw4XJ73ZXnE-xObocCn9W2b7fJhU3yXdlZX7OXQl7GksMSH2HKqOIvXRfAraFOA8cDJYtUgXKnqsgaY77fz_fBzzBdQ1SHf1KUcyfNP4PAGQhDY_03o20sXmF5RdJpI12wHUf56Q9ab0R3BnIfxof6XfJm0VDPnKEkfFz72XD6GsFe3Sam_MMeuhMtB8nYmsMvrP4rQF-EGP0aBFfSo26IrvnUrjEn7CvMxZWtjamDckos8UG_IP37pNqtQXDRZH17fgvbd66LIi2tpo%3D) We can’t just go on with business as usual in Washington, Peter.

We must resolve to aim higher than the Republican Congresses that came before us.

Our nation can be bright - and with your help, this plan can make America great for years to come.

[**If you’re ready to RESCUE AMERICA, read our 11-point plan today and join our mission to save our great country.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1f5d04a0621e41b197bb7213b72bad95&_e=qwfeZrptleY9GxRPMtmsmKauNcYu6MV2Z6fhpJSQal3i_4T0UjRlr3lQIZsEyj9aeXEZK9BpbGBZu4lATEgLR4vD5KacewVINxeGUsXq5CQQTlDGcJGlpDyf6UuKOd8OzllJr1w55rKdz15SaVLDiMdrWBdzw4XJ73ZXnE-xObocCn9W2b7fJhU3yXdlZX7OXQl7GksMSH2HKqOIvXRfAhnH9c71Ogb1vjZyjz2tBz9dk-OCqtHKQsqIm3gJuwXzSwyycA3BI7LQuOts4hadh73rAqUbrXquA-VPO1WiDgICi_oZy2GDj0jBcdoOL6CYwvmHgGX0yaMo-NYWPw6221GFx0w30znBzOppkVqmjOYyv7qQFjbDvaQUMVBRVMz7tqunnQ9afOn3nFaAnUsgX4swsWMWcMX0174BGLS_7bA%3D)

I understand their opposition. After all, I am a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. name: Alvin Williams
subject: Wesley Hunt needs YOU to win this fight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=1)
---
| Dear Peter, Fed up with corrupt, career politicians in Washington selling out our values and America's future for their own selfish gain... ...a Black conservative Army veteran (and rising star) from Texas is taking matters into his own hands by running for Congress. This American hero is fighting to retake a critical U.S. House seat seized by Democrats last election... | [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=2)
---
**...but he needs patriotic conservatives like you and me to have his back.**
I'm hoping you'll join me in endorsing Wesley Hunt for U.S. House this election...
...but first let me explain why Democrats are so afraid of Captain Wesley Hunt.
As you know, Peter, the Democrats are gearing up to seize power in Washington this election so they can transform the _"Land of the Free"_ into a **socialist nightmare**...
...but their hostile takeover of America hinges entirely on their ability to **scare** Black voters into supporting Democrats with the vicious **LIE** that all conservatives _like you and me_ are all **racists**.
That's why they bombard Black voters with the "Republicans are racist" LIE, stoke the flames of racism and hatred in America, and viciously attack anyone who dares to challenge their empire of lies.
# But Democrats are freaking out...
...now that Wesley Hunt has WON the Republican Primary and is officially the GOP Nominee.
Because if there's anything Democrats fear more than a Black conservative exposing the truth about the Liberal LIES to Black voters...
...it's an intelligent, successful, fearless, Black, conservative, American hero like **Capt. Wesley Hunt** leading the fight to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party.
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=3)
---
##### Capt. Wesley Hunt
West Point graduate, Apache helicopter pilot, and lifelong conservative with 3 graduate degrees (MBA, MPA and MILR) from Cornell University.
**Peter, the Democrats are terrified of Wesley Hunt because recent polling shows he has a REALLY good shot at plucking this crucial U.S. House seat right out of Nancy Pelosi's hands.**
**Just look at how he plowed through his competition in the Republican primary...**
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=4)
---
And right now, his Democrat opponents are locked in a runoff, which means Hunt will have more time to reach voters while the Democrats rip into each other.
As a U.S. Congressman, Hunt would have a national stage to speak the truth to millions of Black voters across the country - _which he'll use to:_
* **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies to the entire nation
* **RECLAIM** Black voters to the Republican Party
* **END** the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community

Peter, the Democrats will do anything - anything - to keep their stranglehold on Black voters because...
**...they know that if they lose _just 12%_ of the Black vote nationwide, it'll be mathematically impossible for them to ever win another election.**
# That's why Democrats are so terrified of Wesley Hunt and will stop at nothing to destroy him!
That's why I really need to know, Peter...
| [Will you endorse Wesley Hunt for Congress today?](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=5)
---
Once I receive your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Wesley so he'll know he has the full support of patriotic conservatives like you.
**[Along with your endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help Wesley FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' vicious attacks!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=6)**
Your endorsement and financial support are crucial to:
* Recruit more conservatives like you to endorse Wesley Hunt
* Run advertising campaigns in Texas up through Election Day
* Propel Wesley to victory in this crucial U.S. House race

With Democrats funneling tens of millions of dollars into an all-out assault on this American hero...
**...it's up to patriots like you and me to help Wesley Hunt FIGHT BACK.**
**[So please sign your personal endorsement to Wesley Hunt today...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0202&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0202&n=7)**

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Fed up with corrupt, career politicians in Washington selling out our values and America's future for their own selfish gain... ...a Black conservative Army veteran (and rising star) from Texas is taking matters into his own hands by running for Congress. This American hero is fighting to retake a critical U.S. House seat seized by Democrats last election... | ...but he needs patriotic conservatives like you and me to have his back. I'm hoping you'll join me in endorsing Wesley Hunt for U.S. House this election... ...but first let me explain why Democrats are so afraid of Captain Wesley Hunt. As you know, Peter, the Democrats are gearing up to seize power in Washington this election so they can transform the "Land of the Free" into a socialist nightmare... ...but their hostile takeover of America hinges entirely on their ability to scare Black voters into supporting Democrats with the vicious LIE that all conservatives like you and me are all racists. That's why they bombard Black voters with the "Republicans are racist" LIE, stoke the flames of racism and hatred in America, and viciously attack anyone who dares to challenge their empire of lies. But Democrats are freaking out... ...now that Wesley Hunt has WON the Republican Primary and is officially the GOP Nominee. Because if there's anything Democrats fear more than a Black conservative exposing the truth about the Liberal LIES to Black voters... ...it's an intelligent, successful, fearless, Black, conservative, American hero like Capt. Wesley Hunt leading the fight to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party. Capt. Wesley Hunt West Point graduate, Apache helicopter pilot, and lifelong conservative with 3 graduate degrees (MBA, MPA and MILR) from Cornell University. Peter, the Democrats are terrified of Wesley Hunt because recent polling shows he has a REALLY good shot at plucking this crucial U.S. House seat right out of Nancy Pelosi's hands. Just look at how he plowed through his competition in the Republican primary... And right now, his Democrat opponents are locked in a runoff, which means Hunt will have more time to reach voters while the Democrats rip into each other. As a U.S. Congressman, Hunt would have a national stage to speak the truth to millions of Black voters across the country - which he'll use to: EXPOSE the Liberal Lies to the entire nation RECLAIM Black voters to the Republican Party END the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community Peter, the Democrats will do anything - anything - to keep their stranglehold on Black voters because... ...they know that if they lose just 12% of the Black vote nationwide, it'll be mathematically impossible for them to ever win another election. That's why Democrats are so terrified of Wesley Hunt and will stop at nothing to destroy him! That's why I really need to know, Peter... | Once I receive your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Wesley so he'll know he has the full support of patriotic conservatives like you. Your endorsement and financial support are crucial to: Recruit more conservatives like you to endorse Wesley Hunt Run advertising campaigns in Texas up through Election Day Propel Wesley to victory in this crucial U.S. House race With Democrats funneling tens of millions of dollars into an all-out assault on this American hero... ...it's up to patriots like you and me to help Wesley Hunt FIGHT BACK. | For America, | Alvin Williams President & CEO BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund | © Black America's PAC Action Fund Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. name: John Legend
subject: about Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9067?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]A personal message from John Legend

Hello,

We’re at a turning point in our country. Even though Democrats have a thin
majority, Republicans are using the filibuster to block important bills in
the Senate.

50/50 is not enough. It’s clear we must expand the Democratic Senate
majority to abolish the filibuster and make the real progress American
people want. I believe Tim Ryan is our opportunity to do just that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9067?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]Will you join me in supporting his campaign? Please, make a donation of
whatever you can afford to help us flip Ohio blue. Anything you give would
mean a lot to me personally.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9067?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]Donate

I was born and raised in Springfield, Ohio. That’s actually how I got my
start in music—performing in my church choir. I will always have a special
place in my heart for the Buckeye State.

Ohio’s U.S. Senate race in November is one of the most important fights of
our lifetime, which is why I couldn’t just sit on the sidelines. And you
can’t either.

Tim’s right-wing opponents and their billionaire backers are already
spending upwards of $80 MILLION to keep Ohio red and ensure Mitch
McConnell retakes total control of the Senate.

If that happens, friend, voting rights, a higher minimum wage,
affordable health care, high-quality education for all our kids, and more
are in jeopardy. I don’t want to think about the damage that Republicans
could do if they regain their grip on our government.

But the good news is if we win Ohio, Democrats can hold and expand our
Senate majority. Even better news? Tim is neck-and-neck with his GOP
opponents in the polls.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9067?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]We CAN win, but only if you help Tim fight back against the attacks
heading his way. Can I personally count on you to add a donation now to
help Tim’s campaign win this important race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9067?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]Donate

Tim Ryan is the leader Ohio deserves. He will do whatever it takes to make
sure working families get the support they need. That’s why we’re both
counting on your help to win.

Thank you. I know how much this team means to Tim and it’s incredible to
see so many supporters join this fight alongside us.

—John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2818%2E3611125%2EMj-HEj

name: Team Josh
subject: need a lot donations today alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress

We’ll cut right to the chase: we’re just over halfway to our $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal.

| Friend,

As President, his incompetence and mental decline has made the world less safe, and weakened America at home more than any President in modern history.

Joe Biden has wrecked our economy and now many experts are saying we are headed for a recession. Joe Biden has destroyed the progress that President Trump made on the southern border and has aided and allowed over 2 million illegal aliens to pour through our border last year alone. His incompetent withdrawl from Afghanistan led to the death of 13 of our bravest soldiers and humiliated America on the world stage, emboldening leaders like Putin and Xi to act in their own interests.

[Joe Biden is a DOPE and now you can show your friends and family what you think of the President with my new shirt!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=6e0650a354&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=642ee4b833&e=598f6aa24c)
Thank you,

David Curry

I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=127989edeeea493db26626d4e6111676&_e=4MZQFytmJsWBQkAR_p_euOLtv_v7uY_UMgIi2DZ6vOXg9h0CIMdRKOsie612DpCrxh1dKaPN1_JfSX5lj8WTOG3q_kjRVbmqAFU5xEFOz3jgANjOj4Hb4FpwNSgKl0bPWFoYVVVd9mZNMO1-3CYCFigs2bZR70JbloiOTtJL-AVtGBnWmm3l_vUQ8UQe6_cL8uDaWQATO9-6qmPsOVJGPRTnvw_LHiDnW57qFNSdcY0zPf382srxZ-Ie57ae7b9H9H-wyYwlQdWjRLgOW3EyQQ8zpsLgrBjIYlzJhI6aNuQDICDcdr9lCSaeGZbcqd9NUnZwangDOE-mfuSR836rPFTb7TQSMVskm4P1sTqBh32W-1ZNrXB9Ih3sxE1xZZT6)

**_"Their rematch is widely considered the most competitive congressional race in Minnesota."_**

Fellow American,

Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, **I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders.**

So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. [**Today, I’m asking for you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=127989edeeea493db26626d4e6111676&_e=4MZQFytmJsWBQkAR_p_euOLtv_v7uY_UMgIi2DZ6vOXg9h0CIMdRKOsie612DpCrxh1dKaPN1_JfSX5lj8WTOG3q_kjRVbmqAFU5xEFOz3jgANjOj4Hb4FpwNSgKl0bPWFoYVVVd9mZNMO1-3CYCFigs2bZR70JbloiOTtJL-AUGv62zDGspBXUyWV3Z0eQavlECfF6E9RyWJChT3iJcbvT_03XneNzDO9znmDrLAMZy5IkOZLZttlKQ8IEoZKU4Wc6t75DqSM5bKBvY42dAOuekjMmfgCyS1ZoYIBrBVy2PQwzSFT5qD2NoEp2NqOsMi3wVDJvCct34GqpJn2NnPS7Ci5w3Oc5oxBNo-0SwD_h2wgC2RW-qIaQvkOIPDp_e)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=127989edeeea493db26626d4e6111676&_e=4MZQFytmJsWBQkAR_p_euOLtv_v7uY_UMgIi2DZ6vOXg9h0CIMdRKOsie612DpCrxh1dKaPN1_JfSX5lj8WTOG3q_kjRVbmqAFU5xEFOz3jgANjOj4Hb4FpwNSgKl0bPWFoYVVVd9mZNMO1-3CYCFigs2bZR70JbloiOTtJL-AXs0VuuFHOZjIn2C0MCCmU14PWAElCKW0_Ar2NdiWqUPulNKXJKb0-y_quTQePr_2ApdhalOwwiQBr81wuK1L6fWXsVoRIcV30HMNKP-ZAc4UCTIwFzadRuNUwTCXWV7_c2Cn9-kLyyEt1EZkhwABfLGJgvwxwPesiBG9xkgRJUeHmItRI_H0ZW9yXMbuvRxCEu6hMO6WYutKKiWkxm9pJ7)

[**In 2020,**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=127989edeeea493db26626d4e6111676&_e=4MZQFytmJsWBQkAR_p_euOLtv_v7uY_UMgIi2DZ6vOXg9h0CIMdRKOsie612DpCrxh1dKaPN1_JfSX5lj8WTOG3q_kjRVbmqAFU5xEFOz3jgANjOj4Hb4FpwNSgKl0bPWFoYVVVd9mZNMO1-3CYCFigs2bZR70JbloiOTtJL-AXhM-0pWMLlsW-LrG0pSy04mbYjCNEzNJYAbSpKBUElE58E1sm15gk00bORb36mLvsXL8t_fzX6186-eLH4qWO_OLd7Fz0qXcAd9WtKOiwx6uD0dql8lF3u6t7jKO9M8xjRxBfCHSEd6MC3v__aIDLAXZ_CCVAjXlxm4lDa6gzpMvXpZmnp93AUhJYkriFt7sON9WArt6OYdbGS1BUHzwiQ) I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. **Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent.** For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year.

But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.**Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us.**

I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C.

[**I’m coming to you today with a humble request: would you be able to spare a dollar or two to help me make sure that this time our campaign doesn’t come up short of victory?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=127989edeeea493db26626d4e6111676&_e=4MZQFytmJsWBQkAR_p_euOLtv_v7uY_UMgIi2DZ6vOXg9h0CIMdRKOsie612DpCrxh1dKaPN1_JfSX5lj8WTOG3q_kjRVbmqAFU5xEFOz3jgANjOj4Hb4FpwNSgKl0bPWFoYVVVd9mZNMO1-3CYCFigs2bZR70JbloiOTtJL-AW1OaSvvGvxejsu0t1Ddhx10CV-XJ5z_1Z83nnSAcFMUk_sqy8YGMvqVNt8xKp99f-gQ2Yj-OOSW3uxNhHm-YcorkOYWw8NPfKP-QSn52Jm98T5y83wwaoU3ff9zc57KAf6jeL6wBo-3s52aEo8Xu4GW6p50Br1_MkyMOfAb0xS3oLd3RqCaTvf3YSEXo86k0zsLz1a7Hya_HlEDDRU_rpk)

Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders. | "Their rematch is widely considered the most competitive congressional race in Minnesota." Fellow American, Before I embarked on my mission for Congress, I spent nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years, I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders. So, I know the importance of a good team when going to battle. I was the Republican candidate for Congress in one of the closest races in the nation; I lost an extremely winnable seat in Congress to a far-left Democrat by just 2%. Yep – just 2 points separated me and my opponent. For a lot of people, that narrow of a loss would have been more than enough to warrant never running for public office again – and I can’t lie, I didn’t originally intend to wage a rematch against my DEM opponent this year. But I knew I had to give this race another shot when President Biden and his Administration began dismantling everything Republicans worked so hard to build from 2016 – 2021.Their insane spending habits and proposed tax increases on the middle class are going to bankrupt us. I owe it to my children to give this race my all, because I’m not sure I’ll be able to provide for my family if we’re all forced to endure another two years of total DEM control in D.C. if Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we have to PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY. I know that saving America from the socialist Democrats extends far beyond what I can do on the front lines in Washington, but I also know that we can’t afford to keep our country in the hands of people who HATE AMERICA. The radical Left is on the verge of destroying the very country that I —and so many others— have sacrificed and even laid down their lives for. We must retake the House, it’s our only option if we want a country to leave to the next generation. That’s why I need your help today, Fellow American. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband.
